\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_R}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-R shifted: XOR draw + page2 ---
    BCC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}                ; normal -> RTS (no-op)
    LDA     #$C0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; draw mode = XOR ($C0)
    LDA     #$60
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; page mask = $60 (page 2)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-S: XOR invert / clear wrap ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_S}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    BCS     .clear_wrap             ; shifted -> clear wrap
    LDA     #$C0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}        ; invert = XOR ($C0)
    RTS
.clear_wrap:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; wrap = 0 (scroll mode)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-T shifted: AND draw mode ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_T}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
    BCC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}                ; normal -> RTS (no-op)
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; draw mode = AND ($80)
    LDA     #$60
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; page mask = $60
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{127}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{128}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl vw~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $957C
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_V}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
; --- ctrl-V: set text window ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}                ; shifted -> RTS
    LDA     $24                     ; CH
    ADC     $20                     ; + WNDLFT
    CMP     #$28                    ; >= 40?
    BCC     .store_lft
    LDA     #$27                    ; clamp to 39
.store_lft:
    STA     $20                     ; WNDLFT = CH + old WNDLFT
    SEC
    LDA     $21                     ; WNDWDTH
    SBC     $24                     ; - CH
    STA     $21                     ; new WNDWDTH
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $24                     ; CH = 0
    LDA     $25                     ; CV
    CMP     #$18                    ; >= 24?
    BCC     .store_top
    LDA     #$17                    ; clamp to 23
.store_top:
    STA     $22                     ; WNDTOP = CV
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8     ; params saved?
    BMI     .do_vtab                ; yes -> skip saving CV
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; saved CV = WNDTOP
.do_vtab:
    JMP     $FC22                   ; ROM VTAB
; --- ctrl-W: set right margin + bottom ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_W}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    BCS     .set_wrap               ; shifted -> set wrap
    LDA     $24                     ; CH
    STA     $21                     ; WNDWDTH = CH
    ADC     $20                     ; + WNDLFT
    CMP     #$28                    ; >= 40?
    BCC     .width_ok
    LDA     #$27                    ; clamp to 39
    SBC     $20                     ; - WNDLFT
    STA     $21                     ; WNDWDTH = 39 - WNDLFT
.width_ok:
    INC     $21                     ; WNDWDTH + 1
    LDA     $25                     ; CV
    CMP     #$18                    ; >= 24?
    BCC     .bottom_ok
    LDA     #$17                    ; clamp to 23
.bottom_ok:
    STA     $23                     ; WNDBTM = CV
    INC     $23                     ; WNDBTM + 1
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    RTS                             ; shared RTS
; --- ctrl-W shifted: set wrap mode ---
.set_wrap:
    LDA     #$FF
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; wrap flag = $FF (wrap mode)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{129}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{130}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl yz~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $95D1
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Y}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
; --- ctrl-Y normal: clear screen (reset window to full) ---
    BCS     .jump_entry2            ; shifted -> JMP \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
; --- shared: reset window to full screen ---
    LDA     $20                     ; WNDLFT
    ADC     $24                     ; + CH
    STA     $24                     ; CH = absolute column
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $20                     ; WNDLFT = 0
    STA     $22                     ; WNDTOP = 0
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8     ; params saved?
    BMI     .set_dims               ; yes -> skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; saved CH = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; saved CV = 0
.set_dims:
    LDA     #$28                    ; 40
    STA     $21                     ; WNDWDTH = 40
    LDA     #$18                    ; 24
    STA     $23                     ; WNDBTM = 24
    JMP     $FC22                   ; ROM VTAB
.jump_entry2:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}             ; -> secondary entry (disabled)
; --- ctrl-Z: full reset ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Z}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    BCS     .jump_entry3            ; shifted -> JMP \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    LDY     #$12                    ; 19 bytes (indices 0-18)
.clear_loop:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y       ; clear param block
    DEY
    BPL     .clear_loop
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}       ; reset window
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_STD_FONT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}       ; set standard font ($97A5)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_REPLACE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}        ; set replace video mode ($20)
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+1           ; patch entry2 low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+1           ; patch entry3 low
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+2           ; patch entry2 high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+2           ; patch entry3 high
    RTS
.jump_entry3:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}             ; -> secondary entry (disabled)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET{\_}WINDOW}}{HRCG:unRESET:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET{\_}WINDOW}}{HRCG:unRESET:unWINDOW}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{131}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{132}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg draw char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9621
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
; --- Main character rendering ---
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}         ; shift mode flags
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}                ; shifted -> RTS (ignore shifted printable)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}        ; check invert flag
    BPL     .normal_char            ; not set -> normal
    BVC     .check_lower            ; bit 6 clear -> check lowercase
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}        ; shift invert flag ($C0 -> $80)
    BCS     .normal_char            ; was $C0, now $80 -> treat as normal
.check_lower:
    CMP     #$41                    ; 'A' ?
    BCC     .normal_char            ; < 'A' -> normal
    CMP     #$5B                    ; '[' ?
    BCC     .calc_offset            ; < '[' -> lowercase (skip subtract)
.normal_char:
    SEC
    SBC     #$20                    ; convert to font index (char - $20)
.calc_offset:
    ASL                             ; \\ index * 8 = byte offset in font
    ROL     $EF                     ;  |
    ASL                             ;  |
    ROL     $EF                     ;  |
    ASL                             ;  |
    ROL     $EF                     ; /
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; + font pointer low
    STA     $EE                     ; font address low
    LDA     $EF
    AND     #$07                    ; mask to 3 bits
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; + font pointer high
    STA     $EF                     ; font address high
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}
    ADC     $24                     ; + cursor X
    STA     $2A                     ; screen address low
    STA     $EC                     ; save copy
    LDA     $2B                     ; screen address high
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; XOR with page mask (0 or $60)
    STA     $ED                     ; alt-page address high
    LDY     $24                     ; cursor X
    LDA     $FF                     ; original character
    STA     ($28),Y                 ; store char in text page
    LDX     #$00
    LDY     #$00
; --- Render loop: 8 scan lines ---
.render_loop:
    LDA     ($EE),Y                 ; load font byte
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}               ; apply mask (inverse)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; check draw mode
    BPL     .store                  ; $00 -> replace mode
    BVS     .xor_mode               ; $C0 -> XOR mode
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}               ; check mask for AND vs OR
    BVS     .and_mode               ; mask $7F + draw $80 -> AND
    ORA     ($EC,X)                 ; OR mode: combine with screen
    BVC     .store                  ; always -> store
.and_mode:
    AND     ($EC,X)                 ; AND mode: mask with screen
    BVS     .store                  ; always -> store
.xor_mode:
    EOR     ($EC,X)                 ; XOR mode: toggle screen bits
.store:
    STA     ($2A,X)                 ; write to screen
    INY                             ; next font byte
    CPY     #$08                    ; done 8 bytes?
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ADVANCE_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}     ; yes -> advance cursor
    LDA     $2B                     ; screen high byte
    ADC     #$04                    ; next scan line group (+$0400)
    STA     $2B
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; update alt-page address
    STA     $ED
    BCC     .render_loop            ; loop (always, carry clear)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{133}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{134}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg advance cursor~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $969E
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ADVANCE_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
; --- Advance cursor after character ---
    INC     $24                     ; CH++
    LDA     $24
    CMP     $21                     ; >= WNDWDTH?
    BCC     .done                   ; no -> done
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CR_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00                    ; (CR entry point: set CH=0)
    STA     $24
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1} ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    INC     $25                     ; CV++
    LDA     $25
    CMP     $23                     ; >= WNDBTM?
    BCC     .update_cursor          ; no -> just update cursor
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; check wrap flag
    BVS     .wrap                   ; wrap mode -> wrap to top
    DEC     $25                     ; CV-- (stay at bottom)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}
    JMP     $FC70                   ; ROM SCROLL
.wrap:
    LDA     $22                     ; WNDTOP
    STA     $25                     ; CV = WNDTOP (wrap)
.update_cursor:
    JSR     $FC24                   ; ROM VTAB
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{135}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{136}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg scroll up~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $96C7
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    LDA     $22                     ; WNDTOP (top row)
    PHA                             ; save for later
.next_row:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}     ; calc hi-res addr for row A
.copy_row:
    LDA     $2A                     ; dest address low
    STA     $EC
    LDA     $2B                     ; dest address high
    AND     #$E3                    ; mask off scan line bits
    STA     $ED
    PLA                             ; restore source row
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; source = dest + 1
    CMP     $23                     ; >= WNDBTM?
    BCS     .clear_last             ; yes -> done copying, clear last line
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}     ; calc hi-res addr for source row
    LDX     #$07                    ; 8 scan lines
.copy_scanline:
    LDY     $21                     ; WNDWDTH
    DEY                             ; index = WNDWDTH - 1
.copy_byte:
    LDA     ($2A),Y                 ; read source
    STA     ($EC),Y                 ; write dest
    DEY
    BPL     .copy_byte              ; next column
    DEX
    BMI     .copy_row               ; all 8 lines done -> next row
    CLC
    LDA     $2B                     ; advance source
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $2B
    LDA     $ED                     ; advance dest
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $ED
    BNE     .copy_scanline          ; always -> continue
.clear_last:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; save draw mode
    PHA
    LDA     $23                     ; WNDBTM
    SBC     #$01                    ; last row index
    LDY     #$00
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; draw mode = 0 (replace)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}          ; clear last row
    PLA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; restore draw mode
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{137}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{138}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg home clr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9716
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_HOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
; --- Set cursor to top-left and clear screen ---
    LDA     $22                     ; WNDTOP
    STA     $25                     ; CV = WNDTOP
    LDY     #$00
    STY     $24                     ; CH = 0
    BEQ     .clear_entry            ; always -> fall into clear loop
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: clear from current row to bottom ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    LDY     $24                     ; preserve CH for fill start column
    LDA     $25                     ; CV = starting row
.clear_entry:
    PHA                             ; save row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}          ; clear this row
    PLA
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; next row
    CMP     $23                     ; >= WNDBTM?
    LDY     #$00                    ; fill from column 0 for next rows
    BCC     .clear_entry            ; continue loop
    RTS
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: clear from cursor to end of line ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    LDY     $24                     ; start column = CH
    LDA     $25                     ; current row = CV
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: fill one row ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    STY     $EE                     ; save start column
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}     ; calc hi-res addr for row A
    LDX     #$07                    ; 8 scan lines
.fill_byte:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}               ; fill byte (mask value)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; check draw mode
    BPL     .write                  ; replace mode -> write directly
    LDA     $2A                     ; compute alt-page address
    STA     $EC
    LDA     $2B
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    STA     $ED
    LDA     ($EC),Y                 ; read existing screen byte
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}          ; check draw mode again
    BVC     .write                  ; OR mode -> skip XOR
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}               ; XOR with mask
.write:
    STA     ($2A),Y                 ; write to screen
    INY                             ; next column
    CPY     $21                     ; >= WNDWDTH?
    BCC     .fill_byte              ; no -> continue
    DEX                             ; next scan line
    BMI     .fill_done              ; all 8 done -> return
    LDY     $EE                     ; reset column to start
    LDA     $2B                     ; advance to next scan line
    CLC
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $2B
    BNE     .fill_byte              ; always -> continue
.fill_done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{139}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{140}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg calc addr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9771
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
; --- Compute hi-res screen address from CV ---
; Input: ZP $25 (CV)   Output: $2A/$2B
    LDA     $25                     ; CV (cursor Y)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
; --- Alternate entry: row in A ---
    LSR                             ; A = row / 2
    TAX                             ; X = row / 2 (table index)
    AND     #$03                    ; A = (row/2) % 4
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}         ; combine with page base ($20/$40)
    STA     $2B                     ; screen high byte
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ROW_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1},X        ; row base from table
    ROR                             ; rotate carry from LSR into bit 7
    ADC     $20                     ; + WNDLFT
    STA     $2A                     ; screen low byte
    RTS
; --- Row address table (12 entries) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ROW_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
    HEX     00 00 00 00 50 50 50 50 A0 A0 A0 A0
; --- Trailing data (20 bytes, purpose unknown) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_TRAILING_DATA}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
    HEX     B9 A2 A0 D2 E9 A0 F2 A0 A5 B9 C1 80 C4 CD A0 8C
    HEX     A0 AC A0 A0
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ROW{\_}TABLE}}{HRCG:unROW:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}TRAILING{\_}DATA}}{HRCG:unTRAILING:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ROW{\_}TABLE}}{HRCG:unROW:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}TRAILING{\_}DATA}}{HRCG:unTRAILING:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{141}\nwdocspar

\subsection{HRCG control routines}

Ali Baba provides several convenience routines which translate to HRCG control codes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{142}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}}}\moddef{control routines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7730
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_INVERSE_VIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$89        ; ctrl-I
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{143}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{144}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}}}\moddef{text window routines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $773A
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$8F        ; ctrl-O
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDA     #$97        ; ctrl-W
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}

\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_SCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$8F        ; ctrl-O
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDA     #$93        ; ctrl-S
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}

; \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1} (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}) follows at $774E, defined in its own chunk

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{145}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Printing routines}

The plain text screen (using the standard Apple text characters) is 40
columns by 24 rows. The {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}COL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} locations keep track
of the cursor position when ROM routines are used for printing text.

We can set the text window to start either from row 0 using {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}ALL\nwendquote},
or from row 21 using {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}LOW\nwendquote}. Using the bottom of the
screen allows us to use it as a status and input window while the map is displayed
above.

\subsection{init\_hrcg (\$791A)}

Initializes the Hi-Res Character Generator (HRCG) by patching two
locations in the HRCG code and then jumping to its entry point at
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}92A8\nwendquote}.  The patches modify the HRCG initialization to work within
the game's environment:

\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}94B6\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ \texttt{RTS} (\$60): causes HRCG init to
  return early, skipping the remainder of its setup.
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}92D5--{\textbackslash}{\$}92D7\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ three \texttt{NOP}s (\$EA): patches
  out a {\Tt{}JSR\ {\textbackslash}{\$}03EA\nwendquote} that would reconnect DOS, which the game does not
  want.
\end{itemize}

After patching, the routine tail-calls the HRCG init via {\Tt{}JMP\ {\textbackslash}{\$}92A8\nwendquote},
which returns to {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote} via the patched RTS.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{146}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           EQU     $C0EC   ; disk controller data register (active slot)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{147}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{148}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}}}\moddef{init hrcg~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $791A
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_HRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$60                    ; RTS opcode
    STA     $94B6                   ; patch HRCG init to return early
    LDA     #$EA                    ; NOP opcode
    STA     $92D5                   ; \\ patch out JSR $03EA
    STA     $92D6                   ;  | (skip DOS reconnect)
    STA     $92D7                   ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}               ; enter HRCG initialization
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{149}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_stub (\$7919)}

A single {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}---a no-op stub called from {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote}.  Likely a
hook point or a disabled feature from development.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{150}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}}}\moddef{init stub~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7919
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{151}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_game\_state (\$5B00)}

Called once from {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to set up the game display and run the
opening script.  Steps:

\begin{enumerate}
\item Calls {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5C6D\nwendquote} to initialize the game display (draws borders,
  sets text windows).
\item Sets {\Tt{}DISPATCH{\textbackslash}{\_}VEC\nwendquote} to point to the game action handler at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5B2A\nwendquote},
  used by the script engine's indirect dispatch at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7A49\nwendquote}.
\item Clears {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A00\nwendquote} (game state flag).
\item Patches {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}80A6\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B1\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}LDA\ (zp),Y\nwendquote} opcode), restoring
  the character renderer's indirect load.
\item Runs the opening script (index~6) via {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote}.
\item Patches {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7A49--{\textbackslash}{\$}7A4B\nwendquote} from {\Tt{}JMP\ (DISPATCH{\textbackslash}{\_}VEC)\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}JMP\ {\textbackslash}{\$}7A4F\nwendquote},
  disabling the indirect action handler now that init is complete.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{152}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}}}\moddef{init game state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5B00
INIT_GAME_STATE:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}       ; set up game display / UI
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}   ; \\ $F6/\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = game action handler
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}   ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $5A00                   ; clear game state flag
    LDX     #$B1                    ; LDA (zp),Y opcode
    STX     $80A6                   ; patch character renderer
    LDX     #$06                    ; script index 6 (opening)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}           ; run opening script
    LDA     #$4C                    ; \\ patch $7A49 to JMP $7A4F
    STA     $7A49                   ;  | (bypass indirect handler
    LDA     #$4F                    ;  |  after init script completes)
    STA     $7A4A                   ;  |
    LDA     #$7A                    ;  |
    STA     $7A4B                   ; /
    RTS

\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegincode{153}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}     EQU     $5B2A   ; game action dispatch target
\nwlinkedidentc{READ_KEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}                EQU     $A44C   ; resident: read keyboard input
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}}\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{154}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{155}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_game\_display (\$5C6D)}

Draws the complete game UI: renders the background text stream,
places 2$\times$2 border characters, draws border label text at
hardcoded positions, plots decorative corner icons, and finally
prints the copyright notice and ``press space bar'' prompt.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{156}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{UI_TEXT_STREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}          EQU     $5E55   ; text stream data for game UI background
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}       EQU     $5E7B   ; 6 col/row pairs for horizontal border labels
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}      EQU     $5E87   ; 10 col/row pairs for vertical border labels (left)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}      EQU     $5E9B   ; 10 col/row pairs for vertical border labels (right)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}       EQU     $5EAF   ; horizontal border pattern string
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}      EQU     $5EC1   ; vertical border pattern string (left)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}      EQU     $5EC4   ; vertical border pattern string (right)
\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}            EQU     $5EC7   ; "COPYRIGHT 1982 STUART SMITH"
\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}          EQU     $5EE3   ; "PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE"
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5EFF   ; decorative right-side row 1
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5F07   ; decorative right-side row 2
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5F10   ; decorative right-side row 3
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}        EQU     $5DC3   ; loop counter for border label drawing
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{157}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{158}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}}}\moddef{init game display~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5C6D
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$90                    ; HRCG control: clear hi-res screen
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{UI_TEXT_STREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} ; point text stream at UI data
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}           ; render game UI background

    ; Draw three 2x2 border characters across top (charset 2, row 3)
    LDA     #$01                    ; char 1
    LDX     #$10                    ; col 16
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}
    LDA     #$0E                    ; char 14
    LDX     #$12                    ; col 18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}
    LDA     #$04                    ; char 4
    LDX     #$14                    ; col 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_LABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}      ; draw border text labels
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_ICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}       ; draw corner decorations

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}           ; reset HRCG block mode

    ; Print copyright at row 21, col 0
    LDA     #$15
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    ; Print "PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE" at row 23, col 0
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    ; Switch to HRCG charset 5 for decorative chars
    LDA     #$81                    ; ctrl-A (select charset)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDA     #$B5                    ; '5' = charset 5
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}

    ; Print decorative strings at col 30, rows 21-23
    LDA     #$15
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{159}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_border\_char (\$5CEC)}

Helper for {\Tt{}INIT{\textbackslash}{\_}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote}.  Draws a 2$\times$2 font character
from charset~2 at column~{\Tt{}X\nwendquote}, row~3.  The character number is in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{160}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5CEC
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}:

    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    LDY     #$03
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    STA     FONT_CHARSET
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{161}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_border\_labels (\$5CFD)}

Draws text labels around the game border.  Three loops iterate over
tables of (column, row) pairs, printing a border pattern string at
each position.  Selects HRCG charset~2 before drawing.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{162}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border labels~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5CFD
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_LABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    ; Select HRCG charset 2
    LDA     #$81                    ; ctrl-A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDA     #$B2                    ; '2' = charset 2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}

    ; Loop 1: horizontal borders (6 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3})
    LDX     #$0A                    ; index 10 (5 pairs, counting down by 2)
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
.loop1:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    BPL     .loop1

    ; Loop 2: vertical borders left (10 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3})
    LDX     #$12                    ; index 18 (9 pairs, counting down by 2)
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
.loop2:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    BPL     .loop2

    ; Loop 3: vertical borders right (10 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3})
    LDX     #$12
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
.loop3:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    BPL     .loop3
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{163}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_border\_icons (\$5D7A)}

Plots six decorative 2$\times$2 font characters at fixed positions
around the game border using {\Tt{}PLOT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{164}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border icons~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5D7A
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_ICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}:

    LDA     #$02                    ; char 2 at col 4, row 11
    LDX     #$04
    LDY     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$01                    ; char 1 at col 4, row 16
    LDX     #$04
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$03                    ; char 3 at col 34, row 16
    LDX     #$22
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$04                    ; char 4 at col 34, row 11
    LDX     #$22
    LDY     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$1C                    ; char 28 at col 16, row 16
    LDX     #$10
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$1C                    ; char 28 at col 22, row 11
    LDX     #$16
    LDY     #$0B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{165}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{166}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                EQU     $24     ; Cursor position
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                EQU     $25
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{167}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{168}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}}}\moddef{set text window upper left~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $792D
SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_ALL:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #0
    JMP     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT

SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_LOW:
    LDA     #21

    ; fall through

SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT:

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$96        ; ctrl-V (set text window upper left)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{169}\nwdocspar

Since text on the lower part always starts at row 21, and the column number only
needs 6 bits, we can specify a compressed 8-bit version of the cursor, where the
row number can be specified by upper two bits (so 20 through 23).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{170}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}}}\moddef{set cursor compressed~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $776E
SET_CURSOR_COMPRESSED:
    SUBROUTINE

    PHA
    AND     #$3F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    PLA
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    CLC
    ADC     #20
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    RTS
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{171}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} routine prints a Pascal-style string (length first),
from an address stored in {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}, at the current cursor
position.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{172}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup

\nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}              EQU     $E1     ; sound frequency / script modified action
\nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}          EQU     $E2     ; sound duration / script parameter byte

\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}               EQU     $E4     ; script instruction pointer (2 bytes, $E4/$E5)
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 EQU     $F4     ; mob data pointer (2 bytes, $F4/$F5)
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}            EQU     $F6     ; script action dispatch vector (2 bytes, $F6/$F7)

\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}              EQU     $F6     ; selected character/player index
