\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{174}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\moddef{print string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7758
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1

    ; falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2} / \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FROM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1} at $775C
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{175}\nwdocspar

{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} is the same entry point as {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}775C\nwendquote}:
both print a length-prefixed string from {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote}.
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7758\nwendquote} stores {\Tt{}X/Y\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote}
first, then falls through.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{176}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}}}\moddef{print string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $775C
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}             ; same entry as \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FROM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{177}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL\nwendquote} centers text, but moves it right by the
current cursor's column. If the column is zero, the routine would center the text on the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{178}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}}}\moddef{print centered plus col~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7710
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CENTERED_PLUS_COL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #40
    SEC
    LDY     #$00
    SBC     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CLC
    LSR                             ; accumulator
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{179}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote} centers text on row 23, which is the bottom of
the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{180}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}}}\moddef{print bottom centered~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7705
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CENTERED_PLUS_COL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{181}\nwdocspar

\subsection{HRCG font character routines}

Since each HRCG font character is effectively two by two "normal" characters,
there is a routine to convert from font coordinate to text cursor coordinate
so that the HRCG can locate the font character at the text coordinate (at
the upper left of the font character).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{182}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}    EQU     $5A06   ; wait delay for AI moves (0 or $0A)
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}    EQU     $5A08   ; viewport max column (from location field 4)
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}    EQU     $5A09   ; viewport max row
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}    EQU     $5A0A   ; viewport min column (from location field 3)
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}    EQU     $5A0B   ; viewport min row
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}        EQU     $5A0C
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}        EQU     $5A0D
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_ID}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}     EQU     $5A17   ; current location/position index

\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{183}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{184}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}}}\moddef{font pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7723
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    ASL
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    ASL
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{185}\nwdocspar

Two basic routines print the font character stored in {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}.
One routine simply does the font position to text position conversion before
calling the second. There is a stored string which has spots for the character
set and the four character blocks that this routine sets.

When printing using the 2x2 font characters, we can set up the HRCG's
"block display mode". This takes four characters and plots them in a 2x2
array with the upper left at the text cursor position.

Because our font table consists of 4 "normal" characters, we need to be able
to map a font character onto its character set and character. The font table
contains 120 font characters, or 480 "normal" characters. Since each
character set is 96 characters, the entire font table spans five character
sets, with character set 1 starting off the table.

Not only that, but the first character in the character set is ASCII 32
(space), so we have to take that into account also.

This is what the {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote}, and
{\Tt{}PLOT{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} routines do.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{186}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwenddeflinemarkup
FONT_CHARNUM        EQU     $5A0E
FONT_CHARSET        EQU     $5A0F
s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR   EQU     $80A4   ; 10 bytes
CHAR_CHARSET        EQU     $80A6
CHAR_UPPER_LEFT     EQU     $80A8
CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT    EQU     $80A9
CHAR_LOWER_LEFT     EQU     $80AB
CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT    EQU     $80AC
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{187}\nwdocspar

The blink cursor is a saved font position used to flash a character on the
hi-res screen.  Three bytes at {\Tt{}{\$}5AA2\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}5AA4\nwendquote} mirror {\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}: they record which character to blink and
where.  The rendering path (\$74E0) copies them into the {\Tt{}FONT{\_}\nwendquote} variables
before calling {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote}.

A {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote} value of {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}14\nwendquote} (20) acts as a sentinel meaning ``no active
blink position,'' since valid font--column values are 0--19.  Both
{\Tt{}game{\textbackslash}{\_}init\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}scene{\textbackslash}{\_}loop\nwendquote} store {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}14\nwendquote} here to disable the blink
cursor at startup and at each new scene.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{188}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}       EQU     $5AA2   ; font column  (0-19; $14 = disabled)
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}       EQU     $5AA3   ; font row
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}      EQU     $5AA4   ; font character number
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{189}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_blink\_alt (\$74CB)}

Draws the ``alternate'' blink character (the blink-off frame).
Temporarily replaces {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} with the alternate character from
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7AC3\nwendquote}, calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to render it, then restores
the original {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.  Called by {\Tt{}TICK{\textbackslash}{\_}ANIM{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} when
the animation frame counter reaches zero.

\subsection{render\_font\_char (\$7489)}

Renders a custom font character at the current font position.  Converts
{\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote} into four block-character indices
(upper-left, upper-right, lower-left, lower-right) for a $2\times2$
character cell, patches the {\Tt{}s{\textbackslash}{\_}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} control string, and
calls {\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}STRING\nwendquote} to output it.

Each charset holds 24~characters (\$18).  Characters beyond~\$18 bump the
charset index.  The four glyph indices are consecutive starting at
{\Tt{}charnum\ *\ 4\ +\ {\textbackslash}{\$}20\nwendquote}.

\subsection{setup\_scene\_display (\$0901)}

Called when entering a new scene.  Initialises the AI wait delay:
if {\Tt{}CHAR{\textbackslash}{\_}AI{\textbackslash}{\_}MODE\nwendquote} is non-zero (AI-controlled character), sets
{\Tt{}AI{\textbackslash}{\_}WAIT{\textbackslash}{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} to~\$0A and calls {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} with index~\$10;
otherwise clears the flag.  Then draws the character, sets
{\Tt{}WAIT{\textbackslash}{\_}LOOP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} to twice the wait flag (via ROL), and jumps to
{\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}SPRITE\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{190}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}}}\moddef{setup scene display~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0901
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_SCENE_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .not_ai
    LDA     #$0A
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDX     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
.not_ai:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    ROL
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{191}\nwdocspar

\subsection{check\_at\_boundary (\$0BFA)}

Checks whether the current location position lies on the viewport
boundary.  Converts {\Tt{}LOCATION{\textbackslash}{\_}ID\nwendquote} to column/row via
{\Tt{}POS{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}, then compares against all four viewport edges
({\Tt{}VIEW{\textbackslash}{\_}MIN{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\textbackslash}{\_}MAX{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\textbackslash}{\_}MIN{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}VIEW{\textbackslash}{\_}MAX{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}).  If any match, sets {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote}=1 and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote}=0
(``at edge''); otherwise sets both to~0 (``interior'').

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{192}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}}}\moddef{check at boundary~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0BFA
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AT_BOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_ID}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BEQ     .at_edge
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BEQ     .at_edge
    TYA
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BEQ     .at_edge
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BEQ     .at_edge
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.at_edge:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{193}\nwdocspar

\subsection{enter\_location (\$72A7)}

Called from {\Tt{}SCENE{\textbackslash}{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} to set up the viewport when the player
enters a new location.  Compares {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA\nwendquote} with {\Tt{}LOCATION{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote}; if
unchanged, returns immediately.  Otherwise stores the new position,
calls {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}SET{\textbackslash}{\_}TEXT{\textbackslash}{\_}WINDOW\nwendquote} / {\Tt{}CLEAR{\textbackslash}{\_}MAP\nwendquote},
computes the event position via {\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\textbackslash}{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote}, and
extracts the location style from record field~5.  If the style
changed, reloads the map tile set.

The routine then reads fields~3 and~4 of the location record (via
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA\nwendquote} indirect) to obtain the viewport bounds (min/max column and
row).  It iterates a nested loop: for each row, for each column,
it calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote} to render that cell.  Finally, if bit~7
of field~5 is clear, it calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTITIES\nwendquote} to overlay
entity icons on the map.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{194}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}}}\moddef{enter location~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $72A7
\nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_LOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BNE     .changed
    RTS
.changed:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_MAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}
    LDA     #$15
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$5A
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$7F
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BEQ     .same_style
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_MAP_TILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}
.same_style:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
.row_loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
.col_loop:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_COL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BPL     .col_loop
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BPL     .row_loop
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    BMI     .skip_entities
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}
.skip_entities:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES}}{DRAW:unMAP:unENTITIES}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES}}{DRAW:unMAP:unENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{195}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_map\_col (\$7323)}

Draws a single map cell at the current {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}.
Computes the linear position inline (col + row$\times$20) rather than
calling {\Tt{}COLROW{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote}, then calls {\Tt{}FIND{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}RENDER{\textbackslash}{\_}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to draw the tile.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{196}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map col~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7323
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_COL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CLC
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
.mult_loop:
    DEY
    BMI     .mult_done
    ADC     #$14                    ; +20 per row
    BCC     .mult_loop
.mult_done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{197}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_map\_entities (\$733B)}

Draws entity icons on the map.  Three modes:

\begin{enumerate}
\item If {\Tt{}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}REDRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} is set, skip straight to drawing mobs.
\item If {\Tt{}LOCATION{\textbackslash}{\_}STYLE\nwendquote} bits 5--6 are set, scroll the map and
      set the redraw flag.
\item Otherwise, scan the full grid cell by cell: for each cell that
      contains a non-\$FE entity in the drawable range, draw its icon
      via {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}ICON{\textbackslash}{\_}B\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}

After the grid scan (or redraw), iterates the mob group via
{\Tt{}FIRST{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}NEXT{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}, drawing each mob's
icon using {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} (or {\Tt{}RENDER{\textbackslash}{\_}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} if the
mob has no blink animation).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{198}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map entities~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $733B
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ORA     #$80
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mark entities drawn (set bit 7)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    BEQ     .no_redraw
    JMP     .draw_mobs
.no_redraw:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    AND     #$60                    ; check style bits 5-6
    BEQ     .scan_grid
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$0F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$FF
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    BNE     .draw_mobs              ; always taken
.scan_grid:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    PHA                             ; save record byte 2
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; clear it during scan
.cell_check:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BEQ     .next_col               ; no entity here
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     #$FE
    BEQ     .next_col               ; $FE = skip
    CMP     #$80
    BCC     .draw_it                ; $00-$7F = draw
    CMP     #$C0
    BCC     .next_col               ; $80-\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = skip
.draw_it:                           ; $C0-$FF = draw
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
.next_col:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BPL     .cell_check             ; inner: next column
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    BPL     .cell_check             ; outer: next row
    LDY     #$02
    PLA
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; restore record byte 2
    BNE     .draw_mobs
    RTS
.draw_mobs:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.mob_loop:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET            ; custom font
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    CPY     #$00
    BEQ     .mob_blink
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$0F
    BEQ     .mob_anim
.mob_blink:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
    JMP     .mob_done
.mob_anim:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
.mob_done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .mob_loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES}}{DRAW:unMAP:unENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES}}{DRAW:unMAP:unENTITIES}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nw
