W}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{199}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_map\_icon\_b (\$740B)}

After drawing a map entity, this routine copies the current font
position ({\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}) into the
blink cursor variables ({\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}),
then calls {\Tt{}TIMED{\textbackslash}{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} with the delay from {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}DELAY\nwendquote}.
Finishes by resetting {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote} to~\$14 (disabled).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{200}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map icon b~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $740B
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}               ; disable blink cursor
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{201}\nwdocspar

\subsection{fill\_map (\$743B)}

Fills the entire 20$\times$10 map grid with a single character.  The fill
character is read from {\Tt{}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}FILL{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7AC1\nwendquote}, default {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}25\nwendquote}).
The routine renders the glyph once via {\Tt{}RENDER{\textbackslash}{\_}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to build the
HRCG control string, then loops over all 200 grid positions (from
bottom-right to top-left), re-printing the same string at each position
via {\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}STRING\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{202}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}           EQU     $7AC1   ; character used to fill the map grid
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{203}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{204}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}}}\moddef{fill map~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $743B
\nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$13                    ; \\ start at column 19, row 9
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ;  | (bottom-right corner)
    LDA     #$09                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}           ; fill character (default $25)
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    LDA     #$01                    ; charset 1 (custom font)
    STA     FONT_CHARSET
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}        ; render glyph once (builds control string)
.loop:
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; next column left
    BPL     .draw                   ; still >= 0 → draw
    LDA     #$13                    ; \\ wrap to column 19
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; /
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; next row up
    BPL     .draw                   ; still >= 0 → draw
    RTS                             ; all 200 positions filled
.draw:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}    ; set text cursor to font position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}            ; re-print the same glyph string
    JMP     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{205}\nwdocspar

\subsection{load\_map\_tiles (\$746C)}

Selects the tile set for the current location style.  Bits 6--5 of
{\Tt{}LOCATION{\textbackslash}{\_}STYLE\nwendquote} index into three 4-entry tables to set
{\Tt{}DEFAULT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}MAP{\textbackslash}{\_}FILL{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}ALT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{206}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_DEFAULT_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}        EQU     $7AD0   ; 4-byte table: default char per style
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_FILL_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}           EQU     $7AD4   ; 4-byte table: fill char per style
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_BLINK_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}          EQU     $7AD8   ; 4-byte table: blink alt char per style
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{207}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{208}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}}}\moddef{load map tiles~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $746C
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_MAP_TILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; location style byte
    ROL                             ; \\ rotate bits 7-6 down to bits 1-0
    ROL                             ;  | (4 ROLs through carry)
    ROL                             ;  |
    ROL                             ; /
    AND     #$03                    ; mask to 2-bit style index
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_BLINK_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_FILL_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_DEFAULT_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{209}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{210}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}}}\moddef{render font char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7489
\nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}:
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}    ; set \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}/\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1} from font pos
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}:
    LDX     #$B1                    ; base charset page
    LDA     FONT_CHARSET
    CMP     #$02
    BNE     .charset_ok
    INX                             ; charset 2 → page $B3
    INX
.charset_ok:
    STX     CHAR_CHARSET            ; patch charset in control string
    LDA     FONT_CHARNUM
.check_range:
    CMP     #$18                    ; fits in current charset page?
    BCC     .compute_glyphs         ; yes → compute glyph indices
    INX                             ; no → next charset page
    STX     CHAR_CHARSET
    SEC
    SBC     #$18                    ; charnum -= 24
    JMP     .check_range
.compute_glyphs:
    ASL                             ; charnum * 4
    ASL
    CLC
    ADC     #$20                    ; + $20 = base glyph code
    TAY
    STY     CHAR_UPPER_LEFT
    INY
    STY     CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT
    INY
    STY     CHAR_LOWER_LEFT
    INY
    STY     CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT
    LDA     #<s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}       ;  | $BC/$BD → control string
    LDA     #>s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1     ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}            ; output the 2×2 character
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{211}\nwdocspar

\subsection{get\_entity\_fontchar (\$0C7E)}

Determines the font character number for an entity whose record pointer
is in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}.  Sets {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote} to~1 (custom font) and
stores the result in {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}.

Three cases based on the pointer value:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}REC\ =\ {\textbackslash}{\$}0000\nwendquote}: empty cell --- uses {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}ALT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}
\item Bit~7 of {\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} set: mob --- reads byte~4 (appearance) from the
      mob record and calls {\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote}
\item Otherwise: character record --- decodes the top~2 bits of byte~1
      to select from characters {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}18--{\textbackslash}{\$}1D\nwendquote}, with further subdivision
      based on the full byte~1 value
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{212}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}            EQU     $7AC2   ; default entity character ($2C)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{213}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{214}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}}}\moddef{get entity fontchar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C7E
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET            ; custom font
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; high byte of pointer
    BNE     .has_entity             ; non-zero → entity exists
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; low byte
    BNE     .low_only               ; low ≠ 0 → partial pointer
.empty:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}          ; \\
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM            ;  | empty cell → blink char
    RTS                             ; /
.low_only:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}            ; \\
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM            ;  | $BE≠0, \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1=0 → default char
    RTS                             ; /
.has_entity:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    CMP     #$80                    ; bit 7 set?
    BPL     .mob                    ; yes → mob record
    ; --- character record ---
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 1 of character record
    AND     #$C0                    ; top 2 bits
    CMP     #$C0                    ; both set?
    BEQ     .both_bits              ; → detailed check
    CMP     #$40
    BEQ     .bit6                   ; bit 6 only → char $1C
    BPL     .empty                  ; bit 7 only → blink alt char
    LDA     #$1B                    ; neither bit → char $1B
    BNE     .store
.bit6:
    LDA     #$1C
.store:
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    RTS
.both_bits:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; reload byte 1
    CMP     #$FE
    BEQ     .check_byte2            ; $FE → check byte 2
    CMP     #$D5
    BMI     .lt_d5
    LDA     #$1D                    ; >= $D5 → char $1D
    JMP     .store
.lt_d5:
    CMP     #$D2
    BMI     .lt_d2
    LDA     #$18                    ; $D2-$D4 → char $18
    JMP     .store
.lt_d2:
    LDA     #$1A                    ; < $D2 → char $1A
    JMP     .store
.check_byte2:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 2
    AND     #$1F                    ; low 5 bits
    BEQ     .empty                  ; zero → blink alt char
    JMP     .store                  ; non-zero → use as charnum
.mob:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} with bit 7 cleared
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    AND     #$7F                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 4 = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    JMP     .store
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{215}\nwdocspar

\subsection{find\_entity\_at\_pos (\$0B62)}

Searches for the entity (mob or player character) that occupies a given
map position.  Input: A~=~position (0--199), {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA/{\textbackslash}{\$}FB\nwendquote}~=~base address
of the character table.  Output: {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~=~pointer to entity record
(bit~7 of {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} set if mob, clear if character).

The routine first walks the mob linked list.  For each record, byte~2
is the mob index; if nonzero, {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} retrieves the mob's data
and byte~3 (position) is compared.  If no mob matches, the player
character table is searched: bytes~6--7 of the base record give the
start of a 3-byte-entry table whose first byte is a position.

Uses heavy self-modifying code to patch absolute address operands for
the indexed loads and table walks.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{216}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}}}\moddef{find entity at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0B62
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}            ; save target position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; \\ patch base address into
    STA     .load3+2                ;  | player search (high byte)
    STA     .load2+2                ;  | mob search (high byte)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    STA     .load3+1                ;  | player search (low byte)
    STA     .load2+1                ; / mob search (low byte)
    JMP     .mob_search

    ; --- Player character search ---
.player_search:
    LDX     #$06                    ; copy bytes 6-7 of record
.load3:
    LDA     $0B7B,X                 ; (self-modified base address)
    STA     .load4-5,X              ; patch .load4 operand (+6→low, +7→high)
    INX
    CPX     #$08
    BNE     .load3
.load4:
    LDY     $0B86                   ; (self-modified: read position from table)
    CPY     #$FF
    BNE     .check_player
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AT_BOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}      ; $FF = end of table
.check_player:
    CPY     \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}            ; matches target?
    BEQ     .found_player
    INC     .load4+1                ; \\
    BNE     .no_carry1              ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                ;  | advance address by 3
.no_carry1:                         ;  | (3-byte table entries)
    INC     .load4+1                ;  |
    BNE     .no_carry2              ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                ;  |
.no_carry2:                         ;  |
    INC     .load4+1                ;  |
    BNE     .load4                  ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                ; /
    JMP     .load4
.found_player:
    LDA     .load4+1                ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = table entry address
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     .load4+2                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    RTS

    ; --- Mob linked-list search ---
.mob_search:
    LDX     #$02                    ; byte 2 = mob index
.load2:
    LDA     $0BBD,X                 ; (self-modified base address)
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .player_search          ; zero → no more mobs, try players
    JSR     .get_mob                ; get mob data → patch .load1
    LDX     #$03                    ; byte 3 = position
.load1:
    LDY     $0BC9,X                 ; (self-modified: read from mob record)
    CPY     \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    BEQ     .found_mob              ; position matches!
    LDA     .load1+1                ; \\ copy mob link address
    STA     .load2+1                ;  | back to .load2 for next iteration
    LDA     .load1+2                ;  |
    STA     .load2+2                ; /
    JMP     .mob_search
.found_mob:
    LDA     #$80                    ; \\ set bit 7 = mob flag
    ORA     .load1+2                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    LDA     .load1+1                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; / \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob pointer | $80
    RTS

    ; --- Helper: get mob data and patch .load1 ---
.get_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; A = mob index → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = data ptr
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     .load1+1                ;  | patch .load1 operand
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     .load1+2                ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}}\\{{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{217}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{218}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}          EQU     $7AC3   ; alternate blink character
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{219}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{220}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}}}\moddef{draw blink alt~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $74CB
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}              ; save current blink char
    PHA
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}          ; load alternate char
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}              ; swap it in
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}         ; draw at blink position
    PLA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}              ; restore original char
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{221}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_blink\_normal (\$74DD) / draw\_blink\_char (\$74E0)}

{\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}NORMAL\nwendquote} sets normal video mode (via {\Tt{}SET{\textbackslash}{\_}NORMAL{\textbackslash}{\_}VIDEO\nwendquote})
then falls through into {\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.  Called by
{\Tt{}ANIM{\textbackslash}{\_}TICK{\textbackslash}{\_}AND{\textbackslash}{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} when the animation frame expires.

{\Tt{}DRAW{\textbackslash}{\_}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} copies the blink state ({\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}) into {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}, sets {\Tt{}FONT{\textbackslash}{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote}~=~1, and calls
{\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} to render the character.  If {\Tt{}BLINK{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}~$\ge$~20
(the disabled sentinel), it returns immediately.  Saves and restores
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote} since {\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} uses that pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{222}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}}}\moddef{draw blink char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $74DD
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}            ; Ctrl-N → normal video

\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}               ; load blink column
    CMP     #$14                    ; >= 20? (disabled sentinel)
    BCC     .draw
    RTS                             ; disabled — do nothing

.draw:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; copy blink state to font vars
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET            ; charset 1
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}       ; save \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} (used by \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1})
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}          ; render the character
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}       ; restore \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{223}\nwdocspar

\subsection{print\_ctrl\_N (\$7735)}

Outputs Ctrl-N (normal video mode) to the Apple~II character output
routine via {\Tt{}COUT1\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}8E\nwendquote} is {\Tt{}Ctrl-N\nwendquote} with the high bit set.
This is distinct from {\Tt{}SET{\textbackslash}{\_}NORMAL{\textbackslash}{\_}VIDEO\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}75F9\nwendquote} which uses
{\Tt{}COUT\nwendquote} instead.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{224}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}}}\moddef{print ctrl n~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7735
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$8E                    ; Ctrl-N with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}                ; output via COUT1
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{225}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{226}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}            EQU     $FDED   ; Apple II ROM COUT1 (character output)
\nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}        EQU     $5A17   ; saved position for room search
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         EQU     $5A18   ; PRNG output (state >> 1), used for random tests
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}          EQU     $5A19   ; PRNG full state: val = 69*val + $53 (mod 256)
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}           EQU     $5A1A   ; PRNG temporary for multiplication
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}           EQU     $5A1B   ; current digit accumulator (ASCII $B0-$B9)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         EQU     $5A1C   ; 16-bit divisor for decimal conversion (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         EQU     $5A1E   ; leading-zero suppress flag (0=suppress, 1=print)
\nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}   EQU     $5A2C   ; +1 or -1 delta for group count adjustment
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}}\\{{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{227}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{228}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}}}\moddef{print font char data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $80A4
    HEX     09      ; num chars in this string
    HEX     81      ; ctrl-A (set character set)
    HEX     B1      ; CHAR_CHARSET (self-modified)
    HEX     82      ; ctrl-B (block display mode)
    HEX     A0      ; CHAR_UPPER_LEFT (self-modified)
    HEX     A0      ; CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT (self-modified)
    HEX     83      ; ctrl-C (move to lower left of block)
    HEX     A0      ; CHAR_LOWER_LEFT (self-modified)
    HEX     A0      ; CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT (self-modified)
    HEX     84      ; ctrl-D (complete block data)

\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{229}Duplicate code chunk removed — RENDER_FONT_CHAR at $7489 already defines this.

The {\Tt{}PLOT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} routine prints the character number in {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}, at the text
coordinate in {\Tt{}X\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{230}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}}}\moddef{plot char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5DB0
\nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{231}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Sound}

The {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\nwendquote} is initially set to 1 to apply a little bit of
randomness to the song notes. However, this can be set to {\Tt{}00\nwendquote} via opcode {\Tt{}NORAND\nwendquote}
to play exact notes, or set to {\Tt{}0F\nwendquote} via opcode {\Tt{}HIRAND\nwendquote} to provide high
randomness.

\begin{table}[]
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\multicolumn{1}{c}{Byte} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Opcode} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Argument} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Operation} \\
{\Tt{}1F\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}MARK2\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}LOOP{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\ <-\ IP+1\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}20\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}MARK1\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}GOSUB{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\ <-\ IP+1\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}21\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}GOTO1\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}IP\ <-\ SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}GOSUB{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}22\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}LOW\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}ROUTINE{\_}ADDR\ <-\ tone\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}23\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}HIGH\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}ROUTINE{\_}ADDR\ <-\ high{\_}tone\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}24\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} & none & Ends the song routine \\
{\Tt{}25\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}HIRAND\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\ <-\ 0F\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}26\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}NORAND\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\ <-\ 00\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}27-FF\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}NOTE\nwendquote} & duration & Plays note \\
\end{tabular}
\caption{Song program opcodes}
\label{table:song}
\end{table}

Playing a tone involves accessing the speaker address twice per audio cycle.
The {\Tt{}tone\nwendquote} routine delays {\Tt{}10X+31\nwendquote} cycles between speaker accesses, and
based on an average Apple II cycle time of {\Tt{}0.98\nwendquote} microseconds, this means
that the frequency of the note played will be equal to {\Tt{}510204\ /\ (10X+31)\nwendquote} Hz.
See \href{https://6502disassembly.com/a2-rom/}{The Oft Misunderstood WAIT} for a derivation of average cycle time.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{232}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}}}\moddef{tone~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY      #$0A           ; 2 cycles

.outer_loop:
    LDA      SPKR           ; 4 cycles

.inner_loop:
    ROL      DAT_00e3       ; 5 cycles
    DEX                     ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .inner_loop    ; 3 cycles

    LDX      note_freq      ; 3 cycles
    ROL      DAT_00e3       ; 5 cycles
    ROR      DAT_00e3       ; 5 cycles
    NOP                     ; 3 cycles
    NOP                     ; 3 cycles
    NOP                     ; 3 cycles
    DEY                     ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .outer_loop    ; 3 cycles

    DEC      note_duration  ; 5 cycles
    BNE      \nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}           ; 3 cycles
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}}}\nwnotused{tone}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{233}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}high{\_}tone\nwendquote} routine does the same thing, but with shorter delays.
The frequency of the note played by {\Tt{}high{\_}tone\nwendquote} will be equal to
{\Tt{}510204\ /\ (5X+12)\nwendquote} Hz.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{234}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}}}\moddef{high tone~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{high_tone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY      #$0A           ; 2 cycles

.outer_loop:
    LDA      SPKR           ; 4 cycles

.inner_loop:
    DEX                     ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .inner_loop    ; 3 cycles

    LDX      note_freq      ; 3 cycles
    DEY                     ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .outer_loop    ; 3 cycles

    DEC      note_duration  ; 5 cycles
    BNE      \nwlinkedidentc{high_tone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}      ; 3 cycles
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{high{\_}tone}}{high:untone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{high{\_}tone}}{high:untone}}}\nwnotused{high tone}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{235}\nwdocspar

Based on cycle times, these are the closest values for various notes. At the higher
frequencies, the values get so low that they differ only by one, which means the
notes aren't very accurate.

\caption{Notes and tone values}
\label{table:tones}
\end{table}

We run into an issue when we look at the song table for the splash screen. The
very first note played is low {\Tt{}3F\nwendquote}. This is closest to {\Tt{}G5\nwendquote}, although it
results in a frequency of {\Tt{}771.9\nwendquote} Hz, which is less accurate than the {\Tt{}783.7\nwendquote} Hz
that would be given by {\Tt{}3F\nwendquote}. In fact, all the low tones are off by a bit,
unless we assume that the programmer erred, thinking that the low tones were
just one octave below the high tones. In that case, we should just use the high
tone table and subtract one octave for the low tones.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{236}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}}}\moddef{song table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
SPLASH_SONG:
    LOW
    TONE 3F, 65     ; G5  @ 655ms
    HIGH
    TONE 3F, 49     ; G6  @ 469ms
    TONE 3F, 8A     ; G6  @ 887ms
    TONE 3F, 8A     ; G6  @ 887ms
    TONE 3F, 8A     ; G6  @ 887ms
    TONE 3F, 5C     ; G6  @ 591ms
    LOW
    TONE C1, 0C     ; C4  @ 231ms
    TONE 80, 04     ; G4  @  51ms
    TONE 50, 06     ; Eb5 @  49ms
    TONE 3F, 08     ; G5  @  52ms
    HIGH
    TONE 60, 0A     ; C6  @  97ms (\nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1} inaccurate)
    TONE 50, 0C     ; Eb5 @  97ms
    TONE 3F, 2E     ; G6  @ 296ms
    TONE 47, 1B     ; F5  @ 195ms
    TONE 3F, 1F     ; G6  @ 199ms
    TONE 47, 1B     ; F5  @ 195ms
    TONE 50, 18     ; Eb5 @ 194ms
    TONE 47, 1B     ; F5  @ 195ms
    TONE 50, 18     ; Eb5 @ 194ms
    TONE 55, 17     ; D6  @ 197ms (\nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1} inaccurate)
\nwnotused{song table}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{237}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} routine goes through a sound table, executing each
instruction until it encounters a {\Tt{}TONE\nwendquote} instruction. It then
plays that tone, and then jumps to a routine given by {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote}. This
routine should do something, and then return to the song-playing loop by
jumping to {\Tt{}next{\_}table{\_}entry\nwendquote}. This allows the game to play a sound while doing
something else, for example, animating the splash screen at the beginning of the
game, and also interrupts the sound on keypress or joystick button press.

If {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} encounters an {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} instruction, it returns, and that ends
the song.

{\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} also checks for a keypress or a joystick button press, and this
is the same as an {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} instruction.

\chapter{The Attract Screen}
\label{ch:attract}

When the main program starts at {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote}, it calls {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to set up
hardware and graphics, then checks {\Tt{}TOTAL{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}. If zero (first run), it enters
the \emph{attract screen}---the title sequence that cycles through story scenes
until the player presses a key.

\section{Top-level flow}

\subsection{Main entry (\$0800)}

The first thing the main program does:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{238}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}}}\moddef{main entry~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0800
\nwlinkedidentc{MAIN_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}
.restart:
    LDA     #$09                    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | $FA/$FB = $4009 (character record base)
    LDA     #$40                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; zero on first run (no mobs yet)
    BNE     .has_mobs               ; nonzero = game in progress
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_SCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}
.has_mobs:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; start with player 1
.char_loop:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; char record byte 8 (status/group)
    BEQ     .next_char              ; zero = inactive, skip
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_LOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}          ; draw map if location changed
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CMP     #$01                    ; player 1?
    BEQ     .run_scene
    CMP     #$03                    ; player 3?
    BNE     .process_mobs
.run_scene:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_SCENE_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}      ; scene event dispatch (players 1 & 3)
.process_mobs:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_MOB_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}      ; walk mob list, run turns
.next_char:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CLC
    LDA     #$09                    ; advance to next 9-byte record
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.no_carry:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 1 of next record
    CMP     #$FF                    ; $FF = end-of-table sentinel
    BNE     .char_loop              ; more characters → loop
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}           ; between-round random event dispatch
    JMP     .restart                ; restart the game loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{239}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{240}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{process mob groups~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0884
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_MOB_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Walk the mob linked list for the current character.
    ; For each group: inactive (type < 3) → display message + auto-heal;
    ; active (type >= 3) → set up scene and enter \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}.
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; char record byte 2 = first group link
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; save as current link
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_MAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    AND     #$17                    ; 1-in-24 chance (bits 0-2,4)
    BNE     .walk_list
    JSR     $A508                   ; periodic disk checkpoint (resident)
.walk_list:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; current link in chain
    BNE     .has_mob
    RTS                             ; zero = end of list
.has_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; resolve link → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data byte 2 = next link
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; save for next iteration
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data byte 6
    AND     #$3F                    ; bits 5-0 = mob type
    CMP     #$03                    ; type >= 3?
    BPL     .active_mob
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_IDLE_STATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}        ; inactive: print name + message
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}               ; heal party members
    JMP     .walk_list
.active_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{START_MOB_TURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}          ; active: set up sprite, enter turn loop
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}               ; reset blink column to 20
    JMP     .walk_list
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{241}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{242}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}}}\moddef{show idle status~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $08D1
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_IDLE_STATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Display a status message for an inactive mob group.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$20                    ; message $20: idle status text
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{243}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{244}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}}}\moddef{start mob turn~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $08DF
\nwlinkedidentc{START_MOB_TURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Set up the character sprite and enter the game turn loop
    ; for an active mob group (type >= 3).
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data byte 4 = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; save font character
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}            ; Y = font group → AI behavior mode
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_MOB_NEEDS_TURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}    ; carry set = needs a turn
    BCS     .enter_turn
    RTS                             ; carry clear = skip this mob
.enter_turn:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_SCENE_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     $5AA6                   ; save AI mode (unused in main.bin)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{245}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{246}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}}}\moddef{check mob needs turn~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0958
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_MOB_NEEDS_TURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Check whether a mob group needs a game turn.
    ; Returns: carry set = needs turn, carry clear = skip.
    ; Skips if: AI mode is player (0), or record byte 12 low nibble
    ; is nonzero, or no encounter and no adjacent threats.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .needs_turn             ; player-controlled always gets a turn
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data byte 12
    AND     #$0F                    ; low nibble
    BNE     .needs_turn             ; nonzero = pending action → turn
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data byte 3 = position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}         ; check for encounter at this position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    BNE     .needs_turn             ; encounter found → turn
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; position again
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BNE     .needs_turn             ; threats nearby → turn
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}        ; no action needed → clear restricted flag
    CLC                             ; carry clear = skip
    RTS
.needs_turn:
    SEC                             ; carry set = needs turn
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{247}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{248}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}}}\moddef{random events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $65A9
\nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Between-round random event dispatcher.  Each step rolls PRNG and
    ; compares against the event threshold at $4239 (~7% chance).
    ; Cascading: the deeper it goes, the more events fire at once.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}
    BPL     .ev2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_MOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}                ; event type 1
.ev2:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}
    BPL     .ev3
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}                ; event type 2
.ev3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
