\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{252}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}}}\moddef{event pick mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $660D
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_MOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Random event: pick a random mob, then process its char events.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{253}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{254}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}}}\moddef{event pick char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6613
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Random event: pick a random character, then process its char events.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{255}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{256}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}}}\moddef{event faction scene~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6619
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Random event: pick a random mob, check for matching faction
    ; in the mob list; if found, run \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1} for that mob.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE_CONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}:               ; alternate entry from \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1} burst
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    CMP     #$09                        ; $FA still at base ($4009)?
    BNE     .has_char
    RTS                                 ; no character selected → skip
.has_char:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; char record byte 5
    AND     #$60                        ; bits 6-5 = faction mask
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; save for \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                        ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | reset $FA/$FB to $4000 (record base)
    LDA     #$40                        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}         ; search mob list for matching faction
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .found
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}             ; not found → try spawning instead
.found:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                 ; clear source char
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                 ; set active char to found index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{257}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{258}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}}}\moddef{event spawn mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $664E
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Random event: pick a random character; if its byte 8 is nonzero
    ; (active), try again once.  If inactive, use its faction to find
    ; a matching mob and reorder it into the group.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; char record byte 8
    BEQ     .inactive                   ; zero = slot available
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}            ; try once more
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    BEQ     .inactive
    RTS                                 ; both active → give up
.inactive:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; char record byte 5
    AND     #$60                        ; faction mask
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .found
    RTS                                 ; no matching mob → skip
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{259}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{260}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6689
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Pick a random mob group by weighted selection.
    ; Uses \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} as the range, then iterates char records
    ; subtracting group counts (byte 8) until the target is reached.
    ; Result: $FA/$FB points to the selected char record.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BEQ     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}            ; no mobs → fall through to pick char
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}             ; random 0..\nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}-1
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}             ; zero = retry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; remaining count
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; player index counter
.next_char:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; remaining
    SEC
    SBC     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; subtract group count (byte 8)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BEQ     .found                      ; exact match
    BMI     .found                      ; overshot → this is the one
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BNE     .next_char                  ; always branches
.found:
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_BE_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | $FA/$FB = \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 (selected record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{261}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{262}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $66BA
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Pick a random character from players 2..\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}-1.
    ; Result: $FA/$FB points to the selected char record, \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = index.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    SEC
    SBC     #$03                        ; range = \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} - 3
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}             ; random 0..range-1
    CLC
    ADC     #$02                        ; offset to player 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; save selected index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}             ; load record for player A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_BE_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}               ; copy \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 → $FA/$FB
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{263}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{264}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}}}\moddef{process char events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $66CE
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Walk the 3-byte event list pointed to by char record bytes 6-7.
    ; For entries with byte 1 in range $40-$7F, subtract $40 from the
    ; value and trigger the event via \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}.
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; char record byte 6 = event list low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; byte 7 = event list high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.scan:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; event byte 0
    CMP     #$FF                        ; $FF = end of list
    BNE     .check
    RTS
.check:
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; event byte 1
    BMI     .advance                    ; bit 7 set → skip
    CMP     #$40                        ; < $40?
    BMI     .advance                    ; yes → skip
    SEC
    SBC     #$40                        ; normalize to 0-based
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; write back
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                 ; save triggering player index
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}
.advance:
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    ADC     #$03                        ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.no_carry:
    JMP     .scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{265}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{266}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}}}\moddef{find mob by faction~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6706
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Walk the mob linked list from ($FA) byte 2, looking for a mob
    ; whose byte $0F has bit 7 set and bits 6-4 match \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} (faction).
    ; Returns A=1 if found (with \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 pointing to it), A=0 if not.
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; char record byte 2 = first link
.check_link:
    BNE     .resolve
    RTS                                 ; zero link → return A=0
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}                ; resolve link → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; mob data byte $0F
    BPL     .next                       ; bit 7 clear → skip
    AND     #$70                        ; bits 6-4
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; match faction?
    BNE     .next
    LDA     #$01                        ; found → return 1
    RTS
.next:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; next link
    JMP     .check_link
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{267}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{268}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}}}\moddef{check scene events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6DFA
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_SCENE_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Scene event dispatcher for players 1 & 3.  Checks encounter
    ; state and dispatches to \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1} with mode 4-8 based on
    ; game state flags.  Called from \nwlinkedidentc{MAIN_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}'s character loop.
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      ; already processed hostiles?
    BNE     .done                   ; yes → skip
    LDA     #$40
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}         ; start scanning from group $40
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}                ; scan for hostile encounter
    LDA     #$01
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}        ; found a matching group?
    BNE     .done                   ; no → skip
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; is this player 1?
    BNE     .other_player
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      ; hostile encounter found?
    BNE     .hostile
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           ; player 1 already processed?
    BEQ     .done                   ; yes → skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           ; mark as done
    LDA     #$04
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; mode 4: player 1 non-hostile scene
.done:
    RTS
.other_player:
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           ; player 3 already processed?
    BEQ     .done                   ; yes → skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           ; mark as done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$05
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; mode 5: other player scene
.hostile:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      ; mark hostile as processed
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; mode 6: hostile encounter intro
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_SCENE_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}                ; process mob groups
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BNE     .done                   ; nonzero = event handled, stop
    LDA     #$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; mode 7: post-encounter
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_COMBAT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BEQ     .done                   ; no combat → done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$08
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; mode 8: combat resolution
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{269}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{270}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}        EQU     $5A89   ; scan result: 1 = matching group found
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      EQU     $5A8A   ; scan result: nonzero = hostile encountered
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}         EQU     $5A8B   ; current group index for scanning
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_COMBAT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}       EQU     $423A   ; nonzero = combat pending
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           EQU     $423B   ; nonzero = player 3 scene processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           EQU     $423C   ; nonzero = player 1 scene processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      EQU     $423D   ; nonzero = hostile encounter processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      EQU     $423E   ; nonzero = event fully handled
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{271}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{272}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}}}\moddef{check location match~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $672E
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Load char record for \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} ($5A29), check if \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} matches
    ; \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}.  If so, clear \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} to force a redraw.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BEQ     .match
    RTS
.match:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                ; clear to trigger redraw
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{273}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{274}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}}}\moddef{scan for hostile~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6E5A
\nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Scan mob groups starting from \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13} for hostile encounters.
    ; Sets \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}=1 if the group matches, \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    ; nonzero if a hostile is found.
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}                ; resolve group → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | save $FA/$FB into \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
.walk:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; mob data byte 2 = next link
    BNE     .has_link
    RTS                                 ; end of chain
.has_link:
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}             ; matches the target group?
    BNE     .check_hostile
    LDX     #$01
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}            ; mark as found
.check_hostile:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}                ; resolve link → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = resolved mob data
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}               ; check if hostile
    BEQ     .walk                       ; not hostile → continue
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}          ; hostile found
    BNE     .walk                       ; always branches, continue scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{275}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{276}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}}}\moddef{load char to fa~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6EC9
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Wrapper: \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1} then copy \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} → $FA/$FB.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{277}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{278}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}}}\moddef{scan and reorder~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6ED5
\nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Call \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1} for current \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}.
    ; If a match is found, copy \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 → \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 and reorder.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BNE     .found
    RTS                                 ; nothing found
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{279}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{280}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}}}\moddef{process scene groups~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6E9E
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_SCENE_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Process mob groups $3F, $41, $42 with \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1},
    ; bookended by \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1} for save/restore.
    LDA     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}             ; save player 3's record to $FA/$FB
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     #$3F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}            ; group $3F
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}             ; $40 (skip — that's the player's group)
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}             ; $41
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}            ; group $41
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}             ; $42
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}            ; group $42
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}             ; restore current player's record
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{281}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{282}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          EQU     $5A00   ; 0 = keyboard, 1 = joystick
\nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}     EQU     $5A01   ; total mobs across all groups (excl. group 0)
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}      EQU     $5A02   ; current player index (1-based)
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5A03   ; current room/location being processed
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         EQU     $5A04   ; character's font char number for display
\nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}       EQU     $5A10   ; damage to apply / new HP after subtraction
\nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         EQU     $5A29   ; character index being processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         EQU     $5A28   ; source character for reorder
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5A2A   ; temp: saved next-link during reorder
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}    EQU     $5A2B   ; temp: byte 11 of node for sorted insert
BOUNDS_MIN_COL      EQU     $5A51   ; scene setup: left column boundary
BOUNDS_MAX_COL      EQU     $5A52   ; scene setup: right column boundary
BOUNDS_MIN_ROW      EQU     $5A53   ; scene setup: top row boundary
BOUNDS_MAX_ROW      EQU     $5A54   ; scene setup: bottom row boundary
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5A55   ; current location position (triggers redraw when changed)
\nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5A14   ; find nearest event: current minimum distance
\nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}       EQU     $5A16   ; auto heal: nonzero = already printed heal message
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}      EQU     $5A56   ; current map style (from record field 5, bits 0-6)
\nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           EQU     $5A58   ; treasure trap: random trap type (0-3)
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_PREV_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         EQU     $5A5D   ; NPC AI: previous move direction (bias avoidance)
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}      EQU     $5A5F   ; event handler: destination position
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           EQU     $5A5E   ; event position (from \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1})
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}      EQU     $5A80   ; shop: bitmask for current item ($80 rotating right)
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          EQU     $5A81   ; shop: accumulated price low byte
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}       EQU     $5A82   ; shop: accumulated price high byte
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5A99   ; current scene number
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}   EQU     $5AA9   ; turn reset: guards one-shot script execution
SCENE_TEXT_DATA     EQU     $5C00   ; base address of scene text data (loaded by \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1})
SCENE_TRANSITION    EQU     $5CFF   ; scene transition flag (nonzero = new scene number)
\nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        EQU     $5AA7   ; 1 = attract/demo mode, 0 = normal
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\n
