\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{283}\nwdocspar

\subsection{select\_input\_mode (\$084E)}

Prompts the player to choose keyboard or joystick input.  Displays
message~\$38 (the prompt), then polls the keyboard and paddle button~1
in a tight loop.  If the player presses the space bar, {\Tt{}INPUT{\textbackslash}{\_}MODE\nwendquote}
is set to~0 (keyboard).  If the paddle button state changes (pressed or
released), {\Tt{}INPUT{\textbackslash}{\_}MODE\nwendquote} is set to~1 (joystick), the cursor is
repositioned, and message~\$2F (joystick confirmation) is displayed.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{284}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}}}\moddef{select input mode~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $084E
\nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$38                    ; message $38: input mode prompt
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     $C061                   ; read paddle button 1
    AND     #$80                    ; isolate bit 7 (pressed state)
    STA     $BA                     ; save initial button state
.clear:
    STA     $C010                   ; clear keyboard strobe
.poll:
    LDX     $C000                   ; read keyboard
    BMI     .key                    ; key pressed → check it
    LDA     $C061                   ; re-read paddle button
    EOR     $BA                     ; compare with initial state
    BMI     .joystick               ; button state changed → joystick
    BPL     .poll                   ; keep polling
.key:
    CPX     #$A0                    ; space bar?
    BEQ     .keyboard               ; yes → keyboard mode
    BNE     .clear                  ; other key → ignore, clear strobe
.keyboard:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}              ; 0 = keyboard
    RTS
.joystick:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}              ; 1 = joystick
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$2F                    ; message $2F: joystick confirmation
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{285}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_world (\$62E5)}

Thin wrapper that passes a pointer to the world initialization data
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}62B9\nwendquote} to the game setup routine at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5F19\nwendquote}.  Called once
from {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to initialize locations and scene state.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{286}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}}}\moddef{init world~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $62E5
INIT_WORLD:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDX     #>\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}       ; \\ X/Y = pointer to init data
    LDY     #<\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}       ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}              ; initialize world from data table

\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegincode{287}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}         EQU     $62B9   ; world initialization data table
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{288}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{289}\nwdocspar

\subsection{game\_init (\$78C7)}

Sets up the Apple II for the game---reset vector, graphics mode, and
various subsystem initialization.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{290}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}}}\moddef{game init~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $78C7
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDX     #$6F                    ; \\
    LDY     #$A5                    ;  | reset vector = $A56F
    STX     $03F2                   ;  |
    STY     $03F3                   ; /
    JSR     $FB6F                   ; ROM: set reset vector checksum
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}               ; disable blink cursor
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RELOCATE_HIRES_STAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}  ; copy $2000+ to $9600+/$B300+
    LDA     $C050                   ; GR mode
    LDA     $C052                   ; full screen (no text split)
    LDA     $C054                   ; page 1
    LDA     $C057                   ; hi-res
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_DISK_IOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_HRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}
    JSR     INIT_GAME_STATE
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           ;  | clear state variables
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}
    JSR     INIT_WORLD
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}}\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{291}\nwdocspar

The soft-switch reads at {\Tt{}{\$}C050\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}C057\nwendquote} configure the Apple II display:
{\Tt{}GR\nwendquote}, full-screen (no split text), page 1, hi-res. This puts the display
into HGR mode showing the framebuffer at {\Tt{}{\$}2000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}3FFF\nwendquote}.

\subsection{attract\_screen (\$09F4)}
\label{sec:attract_screen}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{292}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}}}\moddef{attract screen~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $09F4
\nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_SCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; scene/character index = 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}      ; mark event as handled
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMPUTE_SCENE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}       ; scene 1 pointer → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 (save pointer)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           ; clear location-change flag
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$26                    ; scene number $26 (38 decimal)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; tail-call
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{COMPUTE{\_}SCENE{\_}PTR}}{COMPUTE:unSCENE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMPUTE{\_}SCENE{\_}PTR}}{COMPUTE:unSCENE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{293}\nwdocspar

The attract screen starts with scene index 1 (the first story character
setup) and begins playing scene \$26.

\subsection{decr/incr\_group\_count (\$102F/\$1033)}

Characters are organized into groups via linked lists threaded through
byte~2 of each 16-byte mob data record (accessed via {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote}).
Byte~8 of the \emph{group head}'s mob data record is a packed field:
\begin{itemize}
\item bits 3--0: \textbf{group member count} --- how many characters
      are in this group's chain (0--4 in initial data)
\item bits 6--4: \textbf{pending XP} --- experience points accumulated
      but not yet applied to the character's level (0--7).
      The XP award routine at~\$7248 writes new values here; the
      flush routine at~\$6EE9 adds pending XP to byte~11's level
      field and clears it.
\item bit~7: \textbf{status flag} --- always zero in initial data;
      set during gameplay (controls message selection at~\$18AB).
      Preserved across XP flush.
\end{itemize}

These two entry points adjust the group member count (low nibble of
byte~8) on the head record pointed to by~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}102F\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}DECR{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}): decrements by~1 (source group lost a member)
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1033\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}INCR{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}): increments by~1 (destination group gained a member)
\end{itemize}
Guards: bails out if {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote} is zero (null pointer) or if byte~4 of the
record at~{\Tt{}TARGET{\textbackslash}{\_}REC\nwendquote} is~$\ge$~\$15 (inactive/dead character).
Called exclusively from {\Tt{}REORDER{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} (\$0F84).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{294}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}}}\moddef{adjust char byte8~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $102F
\nwlinkedidentc{DECR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$FF                    ; delta = -1
    BNE     .apply                  ; always taken
\nwlinkedidentc{INCR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}:
    LDA     #$01                    ; delta = +1
.apply:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}       ; save delta for later
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    CMP     #$00                    ;  | bail if \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 is null
    BNE     .not_null               ;  |
    RTS                             ; /
.not_null:
    LDY     #$04                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | bail if byte 4 of (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}) >= $15
    CMP     #$15                    ;  |   ($15+ = inactive/dead)
    BCC     .ok                     ;  |
    RTS                             ; /
.ok:
    LDY     #$08                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | group count (low nibble) += delta
    CLC                             ;  |
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}       ;  |
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{295}\nwdocspar

\subsection{reorder\_char (\$0F84)}

Performs one step of an insertion-sort on a linked list of characters,
ordered by byte~11 (level, masked to 5~bits).  It unlinks the character
at index~{\Tt{}SOURCE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} from the list and re-inserts it in sorted order
relative to index~{\Tt{}ACTIVE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

The linked-list ``next'' pointer is byte~2 of each character record.
{\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} (\$0C32) resolves a byte-2 value into a record pointer
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR/{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote}.

Phase~1 (removal): walks the chain from {\Tt{}SOURCE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}'s record, following
byte-2 links via {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} until {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR/{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote} equals
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} (found the predecessor).  Then patches the predecessor's
byte~2 to skip the removed node.  Decrements the source group's
member count via {\Tt{}DECR{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.

Phase~2 (insertion): walks the chain from {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}'s record, comparing
byte~11 (level) values.  Inserts the removed character before the first
node with a lower level, or at the end if none found.  Increments the
destination group's member count via {\Tt{}INCR{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.  Adjusts the
{\Tt{}TOTAL{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} to track list membership changes.

When {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is zero, a random decision (via {\Tt{}STEP{\textbackslash}{\_}PRNG\nwendquote}) determines
the insertion point instead of the level comparison.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{296}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}}}\moddef{reorder char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0F84
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

; --- Phase 1: unlink character \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} from its current chain ---
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; source character index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}         ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = record pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DECR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}        ; source group lost a member
.walk1:
    LDY     #$02                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} = byte 2 of current record
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; /  (the "next" link we're removing)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = resolve link; \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | compare \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 with \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .advance1               ;  | if different, keep walking
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    BNE     .advance1
    ; Found predecessor: \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 points to the node being removed
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; \\  if removed node's link == \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14},
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                   ;  |   update \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} to new link
    BNE     .patch1                 ; /
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                   ; /  \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} = (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[2] (successor's link)
.patch1:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; \\  predecessor.byte2 = removed.byte2
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; /  (skip over removed node)
    JMP     .phase2
.advance1:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\  \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | (advance to next record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JMP     .walk1

; --- Phase 2: re-insert at correct sorted position in \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}'s chain ---
.phase2:
    LDY     #$0B                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} = byte 11 of removed node
    AND     #$1F                    ;  |   (level, 5-bit)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; destination character index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}         ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = dest record pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INCR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}        ; dest group gained a member
.walk2:
    LDY     #$02                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | check byte 2 of current record
    CMP     #$00                    ;  | if zero (end of chain) -> insert here
    BEQ     .insert                 ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; resolve link
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; \\
    BEQ     .random                 ; /  if dest index = 0, use random decision
    LDY     #$0B                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | compare candidate's level
    AND     #$1F                    ;  | with removed node's level
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}        ;  |
    BPL     .advance2               ; /  if >= , keep walking (insert later)
.insert:
    LDY     #$02                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[2] = (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[2]  (link successor)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ;  | (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[2] = saved link (insert node)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; /
    LDY     #$04                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | if byte 4 of ($BC) >= $15, done
    CMP     #$15                    ;  |
    BCC     .adjust                 ;  |
    RTS                             ; /
.adjust:
    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ;  | if inserted into index 0's slot,
    BNE     .chk28                  ;  |   decrement \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; /
.chk28:
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; \\  if removed from index 0's slot,
    BNE     .done                   ;  |   increment \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; /
.done:
    RTS
.advance2:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\  \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | (advance to next record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JMP     .walk2
.random:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}               ; \\  random decision
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  | if PRNG < 1 (i.e., == 0) -> insert
    CMP     #$01                    ;  |
    BMI     .insert                 ;  | else keep walking
    BPL     .advance2               ; /
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{297}\nwdocspar

\subsection{get\_char\_record (\$1053)}

Computes a pointer to a character record from a 1-based index in~A.
Each character record is 9~bytes, stored sequentially starting at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4000\nwendquote}.
Returns {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\ =\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4000\ +\ A\ {\$}{\textbackslash}times{\$}\ 9\nwendquote}.  If A~=~0, returns
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\ =\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4000\nwendquote} immediately (index 0 is the base/header record).

Note: Ghidra groups this with a separate routine at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}106F\nwendquote} (entered via
JMP from other functions) that handles character elimination/death logic.
That code is not part of this entry point's normal return path.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{298}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}}}\moddef{get char record~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1053
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    TAX                             ; X = index (loop counter)
    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = $4000 (base)
    LDA     #$40                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
.loop:
    DEX
    BPL     .advance                ; more records to skip
    RTS                             ; done: \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 points to record
.advance:
    CLC                             ; \\
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 += 9
    ADC     #$09                    ;  | (9 bytes per record)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    ADC     #$00                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    BNE     .loop                   ; always taken ($BF >= $40)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{299}\nwdocspar

\subsection{scene\_setup (\$0A17)}

Initializes a scene for display.  Loads the character record for index
{\Tt{}ACTIVE{\textbackslash}{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, reads the character's bounding box from bytes~3--4 of the
record at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote}, converts to column/row ranges, picks a random
position within those bounds, sets the font cursor there, and performs
additional character-record bookkeeping.

The bounding box bytes are packed map positions decoded by
{\Tt{}POS{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}.  The routine increments the minimums (so the range
is exclusive of the border), then calls {\Tt{}RANDOM{\textbackslash}{\_}IN{\textbackslash}{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} twice to
pick a random column and row within the bounds.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{300}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}}}\moddef{scene setup~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0A17
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; character/scene index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}         ; index → \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} = char record
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 3: min position (packed)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}           ; → A=min_col, Y=min_row
    STA     BOUNDS_MIN_COL          ; min_col
    STY     BOUNDS_MIN_ROW          ; min_row
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 4: max position (packed)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}           ; → A=max_col, Y=max_row
    STA     BOUNDS_MAX_COL          ; max_col
    STY     BOUNDS_MAX_ROW          ; max_row
    INC     BOUNDS_MIN_COL          ; min_col++ (exclusive border)
    INC     BOUNDS_MIN_ROW          ; min_row++
    CLC
    LDA     BOUNDS_MAX_COL          ; \\
    SBC     BOUNDS_MIN_COL          ;  | col_range = max_col - min_col
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}         ;  | random column offset
    CLC                             ;  |
    ADC     BOUNDS_MIN_COL          ;  | col = min_col + offset
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; / set font column
    CLC
    LDA     BOUNDS_MAX_ROW          ; \\
    SBC     BOUNDS_MIN_ROW          ;  | row_range = max_row - min_row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}         ;  | random row offset
    CLC                             ;  |
    ADC     BOUNDS_MIN_ROW          ; / row = min_row + offset
    TAY                             ; Y = row
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; A = col
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}           ; → A = linear position
    LDY     #$03
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; store position in record byte 3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; clear source char index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}            ; reorder character in linked list
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | clear bytes 13-14 of record
    INY                             ;  |
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}        ; ensure byte 6 >= byte 5 minimum
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}                   ; current player index
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}             ; compare with scene index
    BNE     .done                   ; not current player → skip
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; load position from record
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}        ; draw character at position
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{301}\nwdocspar

\subsection{scene\_loop (\$6C37)}
\subsection{init\_disk\_iob (\$6C2E)}

Sets the zero-page pointer {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}08/{\textbackslash}{\$}09\nwendquote} to the RWTS Input/Output Block
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B7E8\nwendquote}.  Called once during {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote}.  The game's disk I/O
routines (relocated to \$B300--\$BFFF during {\Tt{}game{\textbackslash}{\_}init\nwendquote}) use this
pointer to access the IOB fields via indirect-indexed addressing:
e.g.\ {\Tt{}STA\ ({\textbackslash}{\$}08),Y\nwendquote} with {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote} selecting the field (track, sector,
command code, buffer address, etc.).  The RWTS entry point is at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B7B5\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{302}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}            EQU     $08     ; ZP pointer to RWTS IOB ($B7E8)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{303}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{304}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}                EQU     $B7E8   ; RWTS Input/Output Block (14 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{305}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_stub2 (\$6B94)}

A single {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}---another no-op stub called from {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, like
{\Tt{}INIT{\textbackslash}{\_}STUB\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7919\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{306}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}}}\moddef{init stub2~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6B94
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{307}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{308}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}}}\moddef{init disk iob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C2E
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_DISK_IOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}              ; \\ set RWTS IOB pointer
    LDY     #<\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}              ;  | $08/$09 = $B7E8
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}+1          ;  |
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}            ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}}\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{309}\nwdocspar

\label{sec:scene_loop}

This is the main scene display loop.  It is called with the scene number
in~A.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{310}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}}}\moddef{scene loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C37
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; store scene number
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}               ; disable blink cursor

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; PRNG output
    AND     #$0A                    ; test bits 1 and 3
    BNE     .display                ; if any set, skip disk load
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}

.display:
    JSR     $A478                   ; keyboard/timing check (EALDR resident)
    BCS     .exit                   ; carry set = user pressed key

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    SCENE_TEXT_DATA,\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} ; scene text data → $06/$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}

    LDX     #$06                    ; script index 6
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}           ; run script #3 ($A300)
    LDA     SCENE_TRANSITION        ; scene transition flag
    BEQ     .done                   ; zero = no transition
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; set new scene number
    JMP     .display                ; continue

.exit:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$1B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}         ; display message (mode off)
                                    ; fall through to .done

.done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           ;  | clear location flags
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_LOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}          ; redraw map if location changed
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESTORE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}     ; restore and return
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{311}\nwdocspar

The scene loop calls {\Tt{}{\$}A478\nwendquote} (a resident routine from EALDR, still in
memory at {\Tt{}{\$}A000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}) each iteration to check for user input.
If carry is set (key pressed), the loop exits.  Otherwise, it displays
the status bar, renders the scene text from {\Tt{}{\$}5C00\nwendquote}, runs script \#3
(the attract animation at {\Tt{}{\$}A300\nwendquote}), and checks {\Tt{}{\$}5CFF\nwendquote} for a scene
transition.

The {\Tt{}{\$}5C00\nwendquote} region is populated dynamically by {\Tt{}LOAD{\textbackslash}{\_}SCENE{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote}
from disk.  Its contents change with each scene.

\section{Utility routines}

\subsection{save\_zp\_pointers / restore\_zp\_pointers}

These routines save and restore four zero-page pointer pairs to/from
fixed addresses in the {\Tt{}{\$}5A00\nwendquote} page.  The pointers are used throughout
the game for character records, text buffers, and cursor state.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{312}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}            EQU     $5A9A   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}            EQU     $5A9C   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}            EQU     $5A9E   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}            EQU     $5AA0   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{313}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{314}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}}}\moddef{save zp pointers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6D53
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{315}\nwdocspar

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{318}\nwdocspar

\subsection{relocate\_hires\_staging (\$6DA5)}

During startup, tracks {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}10\nwendquote} are loaded into the hi-res
page area {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} as a staging area.  This routine, called from
{\Tt{}game{\textbackslash}{\_}init\nwendquote}, copies the staged data to its runtime addresses and clears
the hi-res page:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{ccl}
\toprule
\thead{Source} & \thead{Destination} & \thead{Size} \\
\midrule
\$2000--\$32FF & \$9600--\$A8FF & 19 pages (HRCG code + standard font) \\
\$3300--\$3FFF & \$B300--\$BFFF & 13 pages (disk I/O routines) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

The copy loop at {\Tt{}.copy\nwendquote} also clears each source byte, leaving the
hi-res page zeroed for use as a graphics buffer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{319}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}}}\moddef{relocate hires staging~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6DA5
\nwlinkedidentc{RELOCATE_HIRES_STAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\  dest = $9600
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                         ; \\  src  = $2000
    LDA     #$20                        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /  src hi
    LDA     #$96                        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; /  dest hi
    LDY     #$00
    LDX     #$13                        ; 19 pages: $2000-$32FF -> $9600-$A8FF
    JSR     .copy
    LDX     #$0D                        ; 13 pages: $3300-$3FFF -> $B300-$BFFF
    LDA     #$B3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; dest hi = $B3
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; src hi = $33 (was $32 after first pass)

.copy:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; load from source
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; store to dest
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                     ; clear source byte
    DEY
    BNE     .copy                       ; inner loop (256 bytes)
    DEX
    BNE     .next_page                  ; more pages?
    RTS

.next_page:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; next source page
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                         ; next dest page
    JMP     .copy
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{320}\nwdocspar

\subsection{step\_prng (\$78A8)}

The pseudo-random number generator computes:
$$\texttt{val}_{n+1} = 69 \cdot \texttt{val}_n + \$53 \pmod{256}$$
and stores both the full result and a shifted copy.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{321}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}}}\moddef{step prng~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $78A8
\nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}              ; val
    ASL                       ; val*2
    ASL                       ; val*4
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}               ; temp = val*4
    ASL                       ; val*8
    ASL                       ; val*16
    ASL                       ; val*32
    ASL                       ; val*64
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}               ; val*64 + val*4 = val*68
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}              ; val*68 + val = val*69
    CLC
    ADC     #$53                    ; + $53
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}              ; store full result
    LSR                             ; val >> 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; shifted copy (used for random tests)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{322}\nwdocspar

Two shifts produce {\Tt{}val*4\nwendquote}, saved to {\Tt{}PRNG{\textbackslash}{\_}TEMP\nwendquote}.  Four more shifts give
{\Tt{}val*64\nwendquote}.  Adding {\Tt{}val*4\nwendquote} gives {\Tt{}val*68\nwendquote}, then adding {\Tt{}val\nwendquote} gives
{\Tt{}val*69\nwendquote}.  Adding {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}53\nwendquote} completes the LCG step.  This is a linear
congruential generator with multiplier 69, increment \$53, and modulus 256.

\subsection{random\_in\_range (\$1317)}

Returns a uniform random integer in {\Tt{}0..A{\$}-{\$}1\nwendquote} using rejection sampling.
The routine finds the smallest bitmask that covers the range, then repeatedly
calls {\Tt{}STEP{\textbackslash}{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} and masks {\Tt{}PRNG{\textbackslash}{\_}OUTPUT\nwendquote} until the result is less than
or equal to the shifted limit.  This avoids modulo bias.

Input: A~=~range limit (1--127).  If A~=~0, returns~0 immediately.
Output: A~=~random value in {\Tt{}0..limit{\$}-{\$}1\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{323}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}           EQU     $5A11   ; random\\_in\\_range temporary (limit/shift count)
\nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}            EQU     $5A12   ; random\\_in\\_range bit mask
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{324}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{325}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}}}\moddef{random in range~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1317
\nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; save range limit
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .nonzero
    RTS                             ; range=0 → return 0

.nonzero:
    CMP     #$02                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge2                    ;  |
    LDY     #$06                    ;  | range 1: mask=$40, shift=6
    LDA     #$40                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge2:
    CMP     #$04                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge4                    ;  |
    LDY     #$05                    ;  | range 2-3: mask=$60, shift=5
    LDA     #$60                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge4:
    CMP     #$08                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge8                    ;  |
    LDY     #$04                    ;  | range 4-7: mask=$70, shift=4
    LDA     #$70                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge8:
    CMP     #$10                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge16                   ;  |
    LDY     #$03                    ;  | range 8-15: mask=$78, shift=3
    LDA     #$78                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge16:
    CMP     #$20                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge32                   ;  |
    LDY     #$02                    ;  | range 16-31: mask=$7C, shift=2
    LDA     #$7C                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge32:
    CMP     #$40                    ; \\
    BPL     .ge64                   ;  |
    LDY     #$01                    ;  | range 32-63: mask=$7E, shift=1
    LDA     #$7E                    ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask              ; /
.ge64:
    LDY     #$00                    ; range 64-127: mask=$7F, shift=0
    LDA     #$7F

.have_mask:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}                ; save bit mask
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; reload range limit
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; save shift count in \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}
.shift_loop:
    DEY                             ; \\
    BMI     .shifted                ;  | shift limit left by (shift count)
    CLC                             ;  | positions so it aligns with the
    ROL                       ;  | mask bits
    BNE     .shift_loop             ; /
.shifted:
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; Y = shift count
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; save shifted limit

.sample:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}               ; get next random byte
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    AND     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}                ; mask to relevant bits
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}               ; compare with shifted limit
    BEQ     .accept                 ; equal → accept
    BPL     .sample                 ; greater → reject, retry

.accept:
    DEY                             ; \\
    BPL     .shift_right            ;  | shift result right by (shift count)
    RTS                             ;  | to recover the final value
.shift_right:
    CLC                             ;  |
    ROR                       ;  |
    BCC     .accept                 ; / (always taken: masked bit is 0)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\eatline
