\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{326}\nwdocspar

\subsection{first/next\_group\_member (\$12FA/\$1300)}

Group iteration uses two zero-page pointer pairs: {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA/{\textbackslash}{\$}FB\nwendquote} points
to the group head (or the member currently being processed), and
{\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is the iteration cursor that advances through the chain.
Both routines follow the ``next'' link in byte~2 of a mob data record,
resolve it via {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote}, and store the result in~{\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.
If the link is zero (end of chain), {\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is set to null.

\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}12FA\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}FIRST{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}): begins iteration by following
      byte~2 of the group head at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA/{\textbackslash}{\$}FB\nwendquote}.  If that link is zero,
      falls through to check {\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} as a fallback.
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1300\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}NEXT{\textbackslash}{\_}GROUP{\textbackslash}{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}): continues iteration by following
      byte~2 of the current cursor at~{\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{327}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}}}\moddef{advance group link~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $12FA
\nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$02                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | check byte 2 of group head ($FA)
    BNE     .resolve                ; /  if nonzero, follow it
\nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}:
    LDY     #$02                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | check byte 2 of cursor ($F4)
    BNE     .resolve                ; /  if nonzero, follow it
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\  end of chain:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /  null out \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; resolve link -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  | (advance cursor to next record)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{328}\nwdocspar

\subsection{clamp\_char\_field (\$0A93)}

Ensures that byte~6 of the character record at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} has its lower 6~bits
at least as large as byte~5's lower 5~bits.  If byte~6 is smaller, its low
bits are replaced with byte~5's value (preserving byte~6's top 2~bits).
This clamps a stat floor---likely ensuring current HP does not fall below
a minimum derived from another field.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{329}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}}}\moddef{clamp char field~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0A93
\nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 5 of record
    AND     #$1F                    ; low 5 bits = minimum
    STA     $BA
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 6 of record
    AND     #$3F                    ; low 6 bits = current value
    CMP     $BA
    BCC     .clamp                  ; current < minimum → clamp
    RTS                             ; current >= minimum → done
.clamp:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; reload byte 6
    AND     #$C0                    ; preserve top 2 bits
    ORA     $BA                     ; set low bits to minimum
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{330}\nwdocspar

\subsection{draw\_char\_at\_pos (\$1156)}

Given a map position in~A, sets the font cursor to the corresponding
column and row, looks up what character or mob occupies that position,
determines its font character, and draws it.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{331}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}}}\moddef{draw char at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1156
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}           ; A=pos → A=col, Y=row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; set font column
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; set font row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}           ; re-linearize (A = col + row*20)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}      ; look up entity at position → \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}     ; determine font char from entity data
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}        ; render the font character
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{332}\nwdocspar

\subsection{display\_status\_bar (\$6D1F)}

Draws the ``PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE'' (or ``PRESS THE BUTTON TO
CONTINUE'') message in the text window at the bottom of the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{333}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}}}\moddef{display status bar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6D1F
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$90                    ; ctrl-P with high bit (toggle inverse)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{STATUS_BORDER_DATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} ; status bar border data → $06/$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}           ; draw border box
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}           ; Ctrl-A, '0'
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                ; WNDBTM = 23

    LDA     $5A00                   ; joystick/keyboard flag
    BNE     .joystick

    ; Keyboard path:
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
.store_hi_and_print:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.set_margin:
    LDA     #$04
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                ; WNDLFT = 4
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FROM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}         ; print string, return

.joystick:
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    JMP     .store_hi_and_print     ; reuse STA \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 from keyboard path
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{334}\nwdocspar

The border box data at {\Tt{}STATUS{\textbackslash}{\_}BORDER{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} is drawn via the hi-res
text renderer.  The prompt text is printed via {\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}FROM{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.

\subsection{print\_from\_ptr (\$775C)}

Prints a length-prefixed string from {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote} via COUT:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{335}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}}}\moddef{print from ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $775C
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FROM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; first byte = length
    TAX
.loop:
    DEX
    BPL     .next
    RTS                             ; done

.next:
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; read next char
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    JMP     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FROM{\_}PTR}}{PRINT:unFROM:unPTR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-XAPVU72S6LIKQGYUGORXPGRLK4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{336}\nwdocspar

\subsection{display\_message (\$761E)}

Displays a message from the game's message table.  Takes the message
index in~A.  The message table base address is stored at
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4005/{\textbackslash}{\$}4006\nwendquote}; each entry is a length-prefixed string.  The routine
walks the table to find the Xth entry, then displays up to three lines
in the status window.

For the first line ({\Tt{}MSG{\textbackslash}{\_}LINE{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}~=~0), it calls
{\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}BOTTOM{\textbackslash}{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote} then scrolls.  For the second line
({\Tt{}MSG{\textbackslash}{\_}LINE{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}~=~1), it scrolls first, then prints.  For the
third and subsequent lines, it scrolls, prints, then calls {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0D10\nwendquote}
(delay) and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}774E\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}CTRL{\textbackslash}{\_}AB\nwendquote}) before looping back.

An entry with a zero length byte terminates the message.  If exactly
two lines were printed, a final scroll is performed on exit.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{337}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}           EQU     $4005   ; message table base (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}          EQU     $5A57   ; lines printed so far
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{338}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{339}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}}}\moddef{display message~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $761E
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    TAX                             ; X = message index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}           ; load table base into \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}          ; reset line counter

    JMP     .check_index            ; skip to index check

.skip_entry:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y   ; get string length
    TAY
    SEC                             ; +1 for length byte itself
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}       ; advance pointer past this entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    ADC     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    CPY     #$00                    ; was length zero? (end of table)
    BNE     .skip_entry             ; no — keep skipping within group
.next_index:
    DEX
.check_index:
    CPX     #$00
    BNE     .skip_entry             ; more entries to skip

\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}:
.print_loop:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y   ; get length of current string
    BNE     .has_text               ; nonzero — print it

    ; length is zero — message is done
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    CMP     #$02                    ; printed exactly 2 lines?
    BEQ     .final_scroll
    RTS                             ; otherwise just return
.final_scroll:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}                   ; scroll once more and return

.has_text:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .first_line             ; line_count < 1: first line
    BEQ     .second_line            ; line_count == 1: second line

    ; third+ line: scroll, then print
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}                   ; scroll status window
.second_line:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}   ; print centered on row 23
    JMP     .advance

.first_line:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}   ; print centered on row 23
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}                   ; scroll status window

.advance:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    SEC
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y   ; add length + 1 (SEC sets carry)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    ADC     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$01
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}          ; printed <= 1 lines?
    BCC     .pause                  ; no — need to pause
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y   ; peek at next entry
    BNE     .print_loop             ; more text — keep printing

.pause:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}    ; delay
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}           ; reset character set
    JMP     .print_loop             ; continue with next line
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{340}\nwdocspar

\subsection{print\_ctrl\_AB (\$774E)}

Sends Ctrl-A and {\Tt{}'0'\nwendquote} to COUT (selects character set~0 in the HRCG):

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{341}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}}}\moddef{print ctrl ab~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $774E
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$81                    ; Ctrl-A with high bit
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDA     #$B0                    ; '0' with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{342}\nwdocspar

\subsection{set\_cursor\_row21 / set\_text\_window\_bottom}
\label{sec:set_text_window}

These two routines share the same code; they differ only in the
window-bottom value loaded in~A.  The BNE at {\Tt{}{\$}76C0\nwendquote} forms a
``stretchy branch'' that skips the {\Tt{}LDA\ {\textbackslash}{\#}{\textbackslash}{\$}14\nwendquote}, so both entry points
share all code from {\Tt{}{\$}76C4\nwendquote} onward.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{343}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}}}\moddef{set text window bottom~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76BE
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$15                    ; WNDBTM = 21
    BNE     .shared                 ; always taken (stretchy branch)

\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}:
    LDA     #$14                    ; WNDBTM = 20

.shared:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                ; WNDLFT = 0
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDA     #$86                    ; Ctrl-F with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{344}\nwdocspar

\subsection{pos\_to\_colrow (\$0C25)}

Converts a packed map position (0--199) into separate column and row
values by dividing by~20.  The map is 20~columns wide, so
{\Tt{}column\ =\ pos\ mod\ 20\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}row\ =\ pos\ /\ 20\nwendquote}.

The loop repeatedly subtracts~20 (via {\Tt{}ADC\ {\textbackslash}{\#}{\textbackslash}{\$}EC\nwendquote} with carry clear,
since {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}EC\ =\ 256\ {\$}-{\$}\ 20\nwendquote}), counting iterations in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}.  When the
subtraction underflows (carry clear on exit), it adds~20 back to recover
the remainder.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{345}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}}}\moddef{pos to colrow~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C25
\nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY      #$00              ; row = 0
.loop:
    CLC
    ADC      #$EC              ; A -= 20 (unsigned)
    BCC      .done             ; underflow → remainder is negative
    INY                        ; row++
    BCS      .loop             ; always taken (carry set)
.done:
    ADC      #$14              ; add 20 back → A = column (remainder)
    RTS                        ; A = column (0-19), Y = row (0-9)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{346}\nwdocspar

\subsection{print\_mob\_name (\$0D8A)}

Loads the name pointer from bytes~0--1 of the mob record at~{\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
into~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote}, then tail-calls the text centering routine
at~\$7705, which centers and prints the name on screen row~23.
Used by 13~callers throughout the combat and interaction code.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{347}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}}}\moddef{print mob name~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D8A
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$00                    ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = bytes 0-1 of ($F8)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | (name string pointer)
    INY                             ;  |
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}   ; center and print on row 23
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{348}\nwdocspar

\subsection{colrow\_to\_pos (\$0D98)}

The inverse of {\Tt{}POS{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}: converts a column in~A and row in~Y
to a linear map position {\Tt{}A\ =\ col\ +\ row\ *\ 20\nwendquote}.  The carry is cleared
once on entry; thereafter the loop adds~20 per row and exits early if
carry occurs (overflow past 255).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{349}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}}}\moddef{colrow to pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D98
\nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    CLC
.loop:
    DEY                         ; row--
    BPL     .add                ; still >= 0 → add another 20
    RTS                         ; Y exhausted, A = result
.add:
    ADC     #$14                ; A += 20
    BCC     .loop               ; no overflow → continue
                                ; carry set → return (overflow)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{350}\nwdocspar

\subsection{num\_to\_decimal (\$0DA1)}

Converts a 16-bit unsigned value in~{\Tt{}NUM{\textbackslash}{\_}VALUE\nwendquote} to up to 5~ASCII
decimal digits, stored sequentially at {\Tt{}{\$}(DECIMAL{\textbackslash}{\_}OUT{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR),Y{\$}\nwendquote} (with Y incrementing).
Leading zeros are suppressed unless the value is exactly zero (prints
``0'').  The output uses Apple~II high-ASCII ($\$B0$--$\$B9$).

The driver at~\$0DA1 calls the digit-extraction helper at~\$0DE1 five
times with divisors 10000, 1000, 100, 10, and~1.  The helper performs
repeated subtraction of {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A1C/{\textbackslash}{\$}5A1D\nwendquote} from {\Tt{}NUM{\textbackslash}{\_}VALUE\nwendquote}, counting
iterations as the digit value.

A second entry point at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0DA4\nwendquote} (1~caller) skips the initialization
of~Y and the leading-zero flag, allowing the caller to control the
starting output position and suppression behavior.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{351}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}}}\moddef{num to decimal~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0DA1
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$00                    ; output index = 0
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; leading-zero flag = 0 (suppress)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL_CONT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}:
    LDA     #$10                    ; \\  divisor = $2710 = 10000
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |
    LDA     #$27                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1           ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit          ; ten-thousands digit
    LDA     #$E8                    ; \\  divisor = $03E8 = 1000
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |
    LDA     #$03                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1           ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit          ; thousands digit
    LDA     #$64                    ; \\  divisor = $0064 = 100
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |
    LDA     #$00                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1           ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit          ; hundreds digit
    LDA     #$0A                    ; \\  divisor = $000A = 10
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; /  (high byte already 0)
    JSR     .extract_digit          ; tens digit
    LDA     #$01                    ; \\  divisor = $0001 = 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; /  force output (no suppress)
    JSR     .extract_digit          ; ones digit
    RTS

; --- Digit extraction helper ($0DE1) ---
; Divides \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 by $5A1C/$5A1D via repeated subtraction.
; Stores ASCII digit at (\nwlinkedidentc{DECIMAL_OUT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y. Suppresses leading zeros.
.extract_digit:
    LDA     #$B0                    ; digit = '0' (high ASCII)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
.cmp_loop:
    LDX     #$01                    ; start comparing high byte
.cmp_x:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2},X                   ; \\
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11},X           ;  | compare \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 with divisor
    BCC     .output                 ;  | if less, done (digit found)
    BNE     .subtract               ; /  if greater, subtract
    DEX                             ; \\  high bytes equal: check low
    BNE     .subtract               ; /  (if X was 1, now 0 -> recompare)
    JMP     .cmp_x                  ;    compare low byte (X=0)
.subtract:
    SEC                             ; \\
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 -= divisor
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1           ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}               ; digit++
    JMP     .cmp_loop               ; try again (reset X=1)
.output:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}               ; \\
    CMP     #$B0                    ;  | if digit is '0'
    BNE     .store                  ;  |   and leading-zero suppress active
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ;  |   skip output
    CMP     #$01                    ;  |
    BNE     .skip                   ; /
    LDA     #$B0                    ; (reload '0' for final digit)
.store:
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DECIMAL_OUT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; store digit at output buffer
    LDA     #$01                    ; \\  clear leading-zero suppress
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; /  (first nonzero digit seen)
.skip:
    INY                             ; advance output index
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL{\_}CONT}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL:unCONT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL{\_}CONT}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL:unCONT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{352}\nwdocspar

\subsection{check\_encounter (\$0E25)}

Checks whether a given character (by char index in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}) is co-located
with a mob from an opposing faction.  Calls {\Tt{}FIND{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote} to
resolve the character to a mob pointer, then walks the group chain via
{\Tt{}FIND{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}SAME{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote} looking for another mob at the same map
position.  Candidate mobs must have byte~6 bits~5--0~$\ge3$ (active mob
type) and be from a different faction (checked via {\Tt{}CHECK{\textbackslash}{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote}).

Result stored in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A1F\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item 0 --- no mob found at same position (or character is not a mob)
\item 1 --- found co-located mob but same faction (wrapped search)
\item 2 --- found co-located mob from opposing faction (enemy encounter)
\end{itemize}

Callers use the result to set or clear bit~2 of byte~\$0F of the
character's record, which appears to be a ``combat engaged'' flag.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{353}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}        EQU     $5A1F   ; 0/1/2 from \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{354}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{355}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}}}\moddef{check encounter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0E25
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}      ; look up char → \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .none                   ; null pointer → return 0
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .none                   ; not a mob (bit 7 clear) → return 0
    AND     #$7F                    ; clear mob flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; /
.search:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = current mob pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}    ; find next mob at same position
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .none                   ; 0 = no co-located mob → return 0
    BEQ     .friendly               ; 1 = found (wrapped) → return 1
    LDY     #$06                    ; result >= 2: found ahead
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 6 of found mob
    AND     #$3F                    ; bits 5-0
    CMP     #$03                    ; active mob type?
    BCC     .search                 ; no → skip, keep searching
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}           ; compare factions
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .search                 ; same faction → skip
    LDA     #$02                    ; enemy found → return 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    RTS
.none:
    LDA     #$00
    BEQ     .store
.friendly:
    LDA     #$01
.store:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{356}\nwdocspar

\subsection{find\_mob\_at\_same\_pos (\$0E6C)}

Walks the group chain starting from the current mob ({\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}),
looking for another mob at the same map position (byte~3 of mob data).
If the current mob is the last in the chain (byte~2 = 0), the search
wraps around to the first mob via the group head ({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA/{\textbackslash}{\$}FB\nwendquote}).

Returns in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item 0 --- no other mob at same position (full circle)
\item 1 --- found co-located mob (search wrapped past end of chain)
\item 2 --- found co-located mob ahead in the chain
\end{itemize}

On success, {\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is updated to point to the found mob.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{357}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            EQU     $5A21   ; saved position for co-location search
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}           EQU     $5A20   ; saved next-link (stop condition)
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}        EQU     $5A22   ; 1 if wrapped, 2 if ahead
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{358}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{359}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}}}\moddef{find mob at same pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0E6C
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 3 = position of current mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 2 = next link of current mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}        ; $5A22 = 2 (found ahead)
.check_link:
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .resolve                ; has next → follow it
    LDY     #$01
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}        ; wrapped to start
    INY                             ; Y = 2
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 2 of group head = first mob
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}            ; A = mob index → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 2 of resolved mob
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}           ; same next-link as original?
    BNE     .not_self
    LDA     #$00                    ; full circle → not found
    RTS
.not_self:
    INY                             ; Y = 3
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 3 = position
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; same position as original?
    BEQ     .found
    DEY                             ; Y = 2
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; follow next link
    JMP     .check_link
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\ update \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 to found mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}        ; return 1 (wrapped) or 2 (ahead)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{360}\nwdocspar

\subsection{check\_hostile (\$0EB1)}

Determines whether two mobs are hostile to each other by comparing their
faction classifications.  Reads byte~4 (appearance index) from the mob
at {\Tt{}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} and the mob at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}, converts each via
{\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} to get the font group (quotient of dividing
by~21), then classifies via {\Tt{}GET{\textbackslash}{\_}HOSTILITY\nwendquote}: groups 0--2 and~7 are
``friendly'' (Y=0), groups 3--6 are ``hostile'' (Y=1).

Returns {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=1 if the two mobs are on different sides, {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=0 if same.
When both are hostile (Y=1), they are still hostile to each other if
their font-char remainders differ (different hostile sub-factions).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{361}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}             EQU     $5A23   ; saved appearance for hostility check
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}               EQU     $5A24   ; saved A from first \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}               EQU     $5A25   ; saved Y from first \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{362}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{363}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}}}\moddef{check hostile~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EB1
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 4 of found mob (appearance)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 4 of original mob (appearance)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}  ; → A=remainder, Y=group
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}           ; → Y=0 (friendly) or 1 (hostile)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}             ; appearance of found mob
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
    CPY     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}               ; compare hostilities
    BNE     .different              ; different sides → hostile
    CPY     #$00
    BEQ     .same                   ; both friendly → same side
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}               ; both hostile: compare sub-factions
    BNE     .different              ; different → hostile to each other
.same:
    LDA     #$00
    RTS
.different:
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{364}\nwdocspar

\subsection{get\_hostility (\$0EE3)}

Classifies a font group number (in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}, from {\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote})
as friendly or hostile.  Groups 0--2 and~7 are friendly (Y$\leftarrow$0),
groups 3--6 are hostile (Y$\leftarrow$1).  The value in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote} is preserved.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{365}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}}}\moddef{get hostility~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EE3
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    CPY     #$03                    ; factions 0-2 = friendly
    BCC     .friendly
    CPY     #$07                    ; faction 7 = friendly
    BEQ     .friendly
    LDY     #$01                    ; factions 3-6 = hostile
    RTS
.friendly:
    LDY     #$00
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{366}\nwdocspar

\subsection{check\_adjacent\_threats (\$0EF1)}

Checks the four cardinal neighbors of a map position for hostile mobs
and accumulates their combined threat level.  Input: {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}~= position
(0--199), {\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote}~= character record pointer,
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~= character's mob data pointer.

For each adjacent position (left, right, up, down), calls
{\Tt{}SUM{\textbackslash}{\_}HOSTILE{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote} to find hostile mobs not already in combat and
sum their strength (byte~5 bits~4--0) into {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A26\nwendquote}.  After checking
all neighbors, compares the accumulated threat against the character's
defense value (byte~5 bits~4--1 of the {\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote} record).

Returns {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=1 if defense~$\ge$~threat (safe), {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=0 if overwhelmed.
The threat total remains in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A26\nwendquote} for callers that check it directly.

Boundary checks prevent wrapping: position~0 has no left neighbor,
position~199 no right, positions~0--19 no up, positions~180--199 no down.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{367}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}         EQU     $5A26   ; accumulated adjacent threat level
\nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}            EQU     $5A27   ; saved position for adjacency check
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{368}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{369}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}}}\moddef{check adjacent threats~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EF1
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}            ; save target position
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}         ; clear threat accumulator
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = character record pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}            ; reload position
    BEQ     .skip_left              ; position 0 → no left neighbor
    SEC
    SBC     #$01                    ; position - 1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}      ; check left
.skip_left:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    CMP     #$C7                    ; position 199?
    BEQ     .skip_right             ; → no right neighbor
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; position + 1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}      ; check right
.skip_right:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BMI     .do_up                  ; >= 128 → always has up neighbor
    CMP     #$14                    ; < 20?
    BMI     .skip_up                ; → no up neighbor
.do_up:
    SEC
    SBC     #$14                    ; position - 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}      ; check up
.skip_up:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BPL     .do_down                ; < 128 → always has down neighbor
    CMP     #$B4                    ; >= 180?
    BPL     .skip_down              ; → no down neighbor
.do_down:
    CLC
    ADC     #$14                    ; position + 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}      ; check down
.skip_down:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 5 of character record
    ROR                             ; \\ bits 4-1 → defense value
    AND     #$0F                    ; /
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}         ; compare with threat total
    BPL     .safe                   ; defense >= threat → safe
    LDA     #$00
    RTS                             ; return 0 = overwhelmed
.safe:
    LDA     #$01
    RTS                             ; return 1 = safe
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{370}\nwdocspar

\subsection{sum\_hostile\_at\_pos (\$0F49)}

Finds all hostile mobs at a given map position and adds their strength
to the threat accumulator {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A26\nwendquote}.  Input: {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}~= position,
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~= reference mob for faction comparison.

For each mob found at the position, checks hostility via
{\Tt{}CHECK{\textbackslash}{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} and skips mobs that are already combat-engaged
(bit~2 of byte~\$0F set).  Hostile mobs contribute their strength
(byte~5 bits~4--0) to the running total, clamped at~127.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{371}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}}}\moddef{sum hostile at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0F49
\nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}      ; A = position → \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BEQ     .done                   ; null → nothing here
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .done                   ; not a mob → skip
    AND     #$7F                    ; clear mob flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; /
.check_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}           ; is this mob hostile to (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})?
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .next                   ; not hostile → skip
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte $0F of mob
    AND     #$04                    ; bit 2 = combat engaged flag
    BNE     .next                   ; already in combat → skip
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 5 of mob
    AND     #$1F                    ; bits 4-0 = strength
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}         ; accumulate threat
    BPL     .store
    LDA     #$7F                    ; clamp to 127
.store:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
.next:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}    ; find next mob at same position
    CMP     #$02
    BEQ     .check_mob              ; more mobs → check them too
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{372}\nwdocspar

\subsection{compute\_scene\_ptr (\$0C32)}

Computes a pointer into the game data from a 1-based scene index in~A.
Each scene record is 16 bytes.  The result
{\Tt{}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR/MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\ =\ ({\$}4000)\ +\ (index\ -\ 1)\ {\textbackslash}times\ 16{\$}\nwendquote} is stored in {\Tt{}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote},
where {\Tt{}{\$}4000/{\$}4001\nwendquote} holds the base address of the scene table.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{373}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{compute scene ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C32
\nwlinkedidentc{COMPUTE_SCENE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}:
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    CLC
    ADC     #$FF                    ; A = index - 1
    ROL                       ; \\
    ROL                       ;  | rotate left 4 times
    ROL                       ;  | = multiply by 16 (with carry)
    ROL                       ; /
    TAY                             ; save intermediate
    ROL                       ; one more rotate
    AND     #$0F                    ; high nybble → page offset
    CLC
    ADC     $4001                   ; add base page
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1             ; high byte
    TYA
    AND     #$F0                    ; low nybble → byte offset
    CLC
    ADC     $4000                   ; add base offset
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}               ; low byte
    BCC     .done
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1             ; carry
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMPUTE{\_}SCENE{\_}PTR}}{COMPUTE:unSCENE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COMPUTE{\_}SCENE{\_}PTR}}{COMPUTE:unSCENE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AW5VLYKLITE6VBTFNOR2WD6FNQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{374}\nwdocspar

\subsection{appearance\_to\_fontchar (\$0CF7)}
