Converts a mob appearance index (byte~4 of mob data) into a font
character number.  The custom font has 120 characters in groups of~32,
but only 21~mob glyphs occupy each group (characters 1--21 and 33--36).
Characters 5--21 repeat cyclically for higher appearance values.

The routine divides the appearance value by~21 (via repeated subtraction
of~21), producing a quotient in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote} and a 1-based remainder in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}.
If the remainder is~$\ge5$, it is returned directly.  If~$<5$ and the
quotient is nonzero, 32 is added to index into the next font group.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{375}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{appearance to fontchar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0CF7
\nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY      #$00              ; Y = quotient (font group)
.loop:
    CLC
    ADC      #$EB              ; A -= 21 (unsigned: $EB = 256-21)
    BCC      .done             ; underflow → done dividing
    INY                        ; group++
    BCS      .loop             ; always taken
.done:
    ADC      #$16              ; restore remainder+1 (carry clear, so +22)
    CMP      #$05              ; remainder >= 5?
    BCC      .low              ; no → check group
    RTS                        ; yes → return as-is (chars 5-21)
.low:
    CPY      #$00              ; first group?
    BEQ      .ret              ; yes → return as-is (chars 1-4)
    CLC
    ADC      #$20              ; add 32 → next font group (chars 33-36)
.ret:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{376}\nwdocspar

\subsection{delay\_with\_animation (\$0D10)}

Delays for a configurable duration while keeping the status window
animation running.  Loads an iteration count from {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7ABF\nwendquote} and calls
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0D30\nwendquote} (the per-tick animation/wait handler) that many times.
Each call to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0D30\nwendquote} ticks an animation counter, runs a timed wait
via the ROM {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote} routine, and advances the animation frame when
the counter expires.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{377}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}             EQU     $7ABF   ; number of delay iterations
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{378}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{379}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}}}\moddef{delay with animation~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D10
\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}             ; load iteration count
.loop:
    PHA                             ; save counter
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}      ; tick animation + timed wait
    PLA                             ; restore counter
    TAY
    DEY                             ; decrement
    TYA
    BNE     .loop                   ; loop until zero
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{380}\nwdocspar

\subsection{tick\_anim\_counter (\$0D1E)}

Decrements the animation frame counter at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7AAF\nwendquote}.  When it reaches
zero, calls {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}74CB\nwendquote} to advance the animation frame.  Then reloads
the wait loop count from the timing table at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7AB0\nwendquote} (indexed by
the current animation index at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7ABD\nwendquote}) into {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A8C\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{381}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}          EQU     $7AAF   ; animation frame countdown
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}              EQU     $7ABD   ; current animation table index
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_WAIT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         EQU     $7AB0   ; per-frame wait counts (indexed)
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}        EQU     $7AB6   ; per-frame frame counts (indexed)
\nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         EQU     $5A8C   ; inner wait loop counter
\nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}           EQU     $7AAD   ; ROM WAIT duration parameter
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}             EQU     $7AAC   ; delay value loaded into \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25} by \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         EQU     $7AC4   ; non-zero = full map redraw needed
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{382}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{383}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}}}\moddef{tick anim counter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D1E
\nwlinkedidentc{TICK_ANIM_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}          ; tick frame counter
    BNE     .reload                 ; not zero → just reload wait count
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}          ; counter hit zero → draw alt char
.reload:
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}              ; current animation index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_WAIT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25},X       ; look up wait count for this frame
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         ; store for timed_wait to use
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{384}\nwdocspar

\subsection{anim\_tick\_and\_wait (\$0D30)}

Combined animation tick and wait.  Calls {\Tt{}TICK{\textbackslash}{\_}ANIM{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} to
decrement the frame counter and set up the wait count, then calls
{\Tt{}TIMED{\textbackslash}{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} to burn time.  If the frame counter has reached zero
(meaning the animation frame expired), calls {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}74DD\nwendquote} to update the
display and reloads the frame counter from the frame table at
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7AB6\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{385}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}}}\moddef{anim tick and wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D30
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TICK_ANIM_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}       ; tick counter, reload wait count
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}              ; burn time
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}          ; did frame counter expire?
    BEQ     .advance                ; yes → advance animation
    RTS                             ; no → return

.advance:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}       ; redraw blink char in normal video
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}              ; reload animation index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25},X      ; look up frame duration
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}          ; reset frame counter
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{386}\nwdocspar

\subsection{timed\_wait (\$0D49)}

Calls the ROM {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote} wrapper {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0D58\nwendquote} repeatedly, decrementing
{\Tt{}WAIT{\textbackslash}{\_}LOOP{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} until it reaches zero.  If the count is already
zero on entry, returns immediately.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{387}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}}}\moddef{timed wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D49
\nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         ; anything to wait for?
    BNE     .wait                   ; yes → enter wait loop
    RTS                             ; no → return immediately

.wait:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALL_ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}           ; delay one unit
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}         ; decrement counter
    BNE     .wait                   ; loop until zero
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{388}\nwdocspar

\subsection{call\_rom\_wait (\$0D58)}

Loads the wait duration from {\Tt{}WAIT{\textbackslash}{\_}DURATION\nwendquote} and jumps to the
Apple~II ROM {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote} routine at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FCA8\nwendquote}, which delays for
approximately $A \times 2.5 + 13.5$ microseconds.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{389}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}                EQU     $FCA8   ; Apple II ROM WAIT routine
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{390}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{391}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{call rom wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D58
\nwlinkedidentc{CALL_ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}           ; load duration parameter
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}                ; tail-call ROM WAIT
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{392}\nwdocspar

\section{Text renderer}
\label{sec:text_renderer}

Reads a byte stream from the pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}06/{\$}07\nwendquote} and renders
characters on the hi-res screen.  It maintains column/row state and
supports several control codes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{393}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}        EQU     $5A96   ; right margin column for text wrap
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}         EQU     $5A97   ; left margin column for text wrap
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}          EQU     $5A98   ; saved Y index into byte stream
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{394}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{395}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}}}\moddef{text renderer~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C8E
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDY     #$00
.init:
    LDA     #$02
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}         ; left margin = 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; current column = 2
    LDA     #$12
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}       ; right margin = $12 (18)
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; current row = 1

    ; --- Main byte-reading loop ---
.fetch:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y     ; read byte from stream
    BMI     .set_pos                ; bit 7 set → position command
    CMP     #$7F
    BNE     .not_end
    RTS                             ; $7F = end of stream

.not_end:
    CMP     #$7E
    BEQ     .pause                  ; $7E = pause
    CMP     #$7D
    BEQ     .reset                  ; $7D = reset to full-screen mode

    ; --- Character output ---
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}                   ; save stream index
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM            ; character code
    LDA     #$02
    STA     FONT_CHARSET            ; character width = 2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}          ; draw at current position
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; advance column
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}       ; past right margin?
    BCC     .next                   ; no → continue
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; yes → next row
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}        ;   reset column to left margin
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
.next:
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}                   ; restore stream index
    INY                             ; advance to next byte
    BNE     .fetch                  ; loop (max 256 per page)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}               ; overflow handler

    ; --- Position command ($80-$FE) ---
.set_pos:
    AND     #$7F                    ; row = byte & $7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y     ; next byte = column
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    INY
    JMP     .fetch

    ; --- Pause ($7E): run script engine, show status bar ---
.pause:
    TYA                             ; \\
    PHA                             ;  | save stream index
    NOP
    LDX     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}           ; run attract script
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}         ; save stream pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}      ; (clobbers \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}         ; restore stream pointer
    PLA                             ; restore stream index
    TAY
    NOP
    INY                             ; advance past $7E
    JMP     .init                   ; reinit margins/position

    ; --- Reset ($7D): full-screen text mode ---
.reset:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}         ; left margin = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; column = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}                ; row = 0
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}       ; right margin = $14 (20)
    INY                             ; advance past $7D
    JMP     .fetch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{396}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{397}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Control code summary}

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{cl}
\toprule
\thead{Byte} & \thead{Meaning} \\
\midrule
\$7D & Reset to full-screen mode (col=0, row=0, width=20) \\
\$7E & Pause: run script engine and status bar, then resume \\
\$7F & End of stream \\
\$80--\$FE & Set row (byte \& \$7F), next byte = column \\
Other & Character code for HRCG font \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\subsection{Border data at \$7E2F}

The text renderer data at {\Tt{}STATUS{\textbackslash}{\_}BORDER{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} draws a decorative
border for the status bar.  Characters \$33--\$41 are box-drawing glyphs
in the HRCG font.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{398}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}}}\moddef{status border data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7E2F
\nwlinkedidentc{STATUS_BORDER_DATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}:
    HEX     7D                      ; $7D: reset to full-screen
    HEX     80 00                   ; row 0, col 0
    HEX     33 3C                   ; top-left corner, left tee
    HEX     34 34 34 34 34 34 34 34 ; horizontal bar (x16)
    HEX     34 34 34 34 34 34 34 34
    HEX     3D 35                   ; right tee, top-right corner
    HEX     3A 3F                   ; decorative
    HEX     81 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 1, col 18, right edge
    HEX     82 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 2
    HEX     83 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 3
    HEX     84 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 4
    HEX     85 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 5
    HEX     86 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 6
    HEX     87 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 7
    HEX     88 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 8
    HEX     89 12 3E 36 3A 3F      ; row 9
    HEX     8A 12 3E 36            ; row 10
    HEX     39 40                   ; bottom-left corner, left tee
    HEX     38 38 38 38 38 38 38 38 ; horizontal bar (x16)
    HEX     38 38 38 38 38 38 38 38
    HEX     41 37                   ; right tee, bottom-right corner
    HEX     7F                      ; end of stream
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{399}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Status bar text strings}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{400}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}}}\moddef{status bar strings~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7E97
\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}:
    APSTR   "  PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE   "

\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}:
    APSTR   "  PRESS THE BUTTON TO CONTINUE  "
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{401}\nwdocspar

\section{Resident bytecode interpreter (\$0500--\$07FF)}
\label{sec:resident_interp}

EALDR copies 768 bytes from {\Tt{}{\$}A300\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A5FF\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}0500\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}07FF\nwendquote}
before entering the main program.  This region contains a second bytecode
interpreter, separate from the EALDR VM, that runs during gameplay and
the attract screen.  It uses the same XOR encryption scheme as the EALDR
VM (low byte XOR {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}03\nwendquote}, high byte XOR {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}D9\nwendquote}).

\subsection{stub\_entry (\$0500)}

The reset vector points here.  Simply jumps to {\Tt{}ATTRACT{\textbackslash}{\_}LOOP\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{402}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}}}\moddef{stub entry~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0500
\nwlinkedidentc{STUB_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STUB{\_}ENTRY}}{STUB:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STUB{\_}ENTRY}}{STUB:unENTRY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}LOOP}}{ATTRACT:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}LOOP}}{ATTRACT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-W2PWE4EL5SM76XCHIGY3YJKIPY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{403}\nwdocspar

\subsection{attract\_loop (\$0569)}

The entry point for the resident interpreter.  Each iteration swaps
context (zero-page state) and dispatches one bytecode instruction.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{404}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}}}\moddef{attract loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0569
\nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CONTEXT_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}LOOP}}{ATTRACT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}LOOP}}{ATTRACT:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}}\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-Y3PF34ZZHWG7GMSG7XZGBPWN5A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{405}\nwdocspar

\subsection{context\_swap (\$06E0)}

Swaps 16 bytes between zero page {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}50\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}07E5\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}07F4\nwendquote}.
This gives the resident interpreter its own private set of zero-page
temporaries that don't interfere with the main program.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{406}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}}}\moddef{context swap~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $06E0
\nwlinkedidentc{CONTEXT_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDX     #$0F
.loop:
    LDA     $50,X                   ; load ZP byte
    PHA                             ; save on stack
    LDA     $7E5,X                  ; load shadow byte
    STA     $50,X                   ; → ZP
    PLA                             ; recover old ZP byte
    STA     $7E5,X                  ; → shadow
    DEX
    BPL     .loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{407}\nwdocspar

The 14 bytes between {\Tt{}CONTEXT{\textbackslash}{\_}SWAP\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}RESIDENT{\textbackslash}{\_}DECODE{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}06F2--{\textbackslash}{\$}06FF\nwendquote}) are unreferenced and decode as the high-bit ASCII
fragment ``\texttt{DON'T BREAK TH}''\,---likely a truncated development
message.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{408}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-LVNCRQLPWM7GNKGQEJBTLBYX5E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-LVNCRQLPWM7GNKGQEJBTLBYX5E000000-1}}}\moddef{context swap padding~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-LVNCRQLPWM7GNKGQEJBTLBYX5E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $06F2
; Residual string: "DON'T BREAK TH" (high-bit ASCII, truncated)
    HEX     c4cfcea7d4a0c2d2c5c1cba0d4c8
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{409}\nwdocspar

\subsection{resident\_dispatch (\$06B3)}

Dispatches one bytecode instruction using a stack trick.  X and Y hold
the bytecode pointer from the previous iteration.  They are pushed onto
the stack at entry, then {\Tt{}PULL{\textbackslash}{\_}TWO{\textbackslash}{\_}RET{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDRS\nwendquote} rearranges the stack
so the saved X/Y values end up in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}52/{\$}53\nwendquote} as the new bytecode pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{410}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}}}\moddef{resident dispatch~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $06B3
\nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    TXA                             ; \\
    PHA                             ;  | save X, Y on stack
    TYA                             ;  | (these ARE the bytecode pointer)
    PHA                             ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PULL_TWO_RET_ADDRS}{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}      ; rearrange stack, jump to .resume

    ; Control returns here via JMP ($54):
.resume:
    PLA                             ; \\  recover saved Y
    STA     $52                     ;  | $52/$53 = bytecode pointer
    PLA                             ;  | recover saved X
    STA     $53                     ; /

    LDY     #$04                    ; skip 4 bytes
RESIDENT_DISPATCH_FETCH:
.fetch:
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read opcode
    INY
    BNE     .no_carry
    INC     $53
.no_carry:
    TAX                             ; opcode → X (also saves position)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DISPATCH_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1},X
    STA     resident_jmp+1          ; self-modify: JMP low byte
resident_jmp:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DECODE_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1} ; self-modified → $07xx
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PULL{\_}TWO{\_}RET{\_}ADDRS}}{PULL:unTWO:unRET:unADDRS}}\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULL{\_}TWO{\_}RET{\_}ADDRS}}{PULL:unTWO:unRET:unADDRS}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-2FARJ2CLNXYFYA6O756BE3RHTA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{411}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{412}\nwdocspar

{\Tt{}PULL{\textbackslash}{\_}TWO{\textbackslash}{\_}RET{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDRS\nwendquote} pulls both return addresses from the stack
(its own and the caller's), increments each by 1 (since RTS pushes
addr\textminus{}1), and jumps through {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}54/{\$}55\nwendquote} back to the code
after the {\Tt{}JSR\nwendquote} in {\Tt{}RESIDENT{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{413}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}}}\moddef{pull two ret addrs~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0738
\nwlinkedidentc{PULL_TWO_RET_ADDRS}{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    PLA                             ; own return addr (low)
    STA     $54
    PLA                             ; own return addr (high)
    STA     $55
    PLA                             ; caller's return addr (low)
    STA     $52
    PLA                             ; caller's return addr (high)
    STA     $53
    INC     $52                     ; +1 (RTS pushed addr-1)
    INC     $54                     ; +1
    BNE     .done
    INC     $55                     ; carry
.done:
    JMP     ($54)                   ; jump back to .resume
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PULL{\_}TWO{\_}RET{\_}ADDRS}}{PULL:unTWO:unRET:unADDRS}{PYNWmai0-ZQ3HACWSYBTTFFJTEM5GLS64PU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PULL{\_}TWO{\_}RET{\_}ADDRS}}{PULL:unTWO:unRET:unADDRS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{414}\nwdocspar

\subsection{decode\_dispatch\_relay (\$07DF)}

A 3-byte relay in the handler page.  Jumps to
{\Tt{}RESIDENT{\textbackslash}{\_}DECODE{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0700\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{415}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}}}\moddef{decode dispatch relay~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $07DF
\nwlinkedidentc{DECODE_DISPATCH_RELAY}{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DECODE_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}DISPATCH{\_}RELAY}}{DECODE:unDISPATCH:unRELAY}{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}DISPATCH{\_}RELAY}}{DECODE:unDISPATCH:unRELAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-E65AIYYMBOBXUD37K6QZUOOI4I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{416}\nwdocspar

The remaining 30 bytes of the handler page ({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}07E2--{\textbackslash}{\$}07FF\nwendquote}) are
unreferenced residual data left over from the EALDR copy
({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}A300--{\textbackslash}{\$}A5FF\nwendquote}~$\to$~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0500--{\textbackslash}{\$}07FF\nwendquote}).  Decoded as Apple~II
text the tail reads ``\texttt{SSSSSSSSSS}'' (ten high-bit~S) followed by
the low-ASCII fragment ``\texttt{e checker}''.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{417}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-26YTRDQ4FU3QYCRGXMAVMAHTXA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-26YTRDQ4FU3QYCRGXMAVMAHTXA000000-1}}}\moddef{resident page tail~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-26YTRDQ4FU3QYCRGXMAVMAHTXA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $07E2
; Unused residual data at end of resident handler page
    HEX     0000000e968c41964120
    HEX     d3d3d3d3d3d3d3d3d3d3
    HEX     006520636865636b6572  ; "e checker" (low ASCII)
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{418}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Dispatch table (\$06D3)}

The 18-byte table maps opcode indices to handler addresses in page {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}07\nwendquote}:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{419}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}}}\moddef{resident dispatch table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $06D3
\nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DISPATCH_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}:
    HEX     00 27 55 5F 6D 8A AD B9
    HEX     4F A2 CE 26 79
; last 5 bytes overlap with \nwlinkedidentc{CONTEXT_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-A5IY6LARV2ZVHGEJNTTVGGK3PU000000-1} code at $06E0
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{RESIDENT:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONTEXT{\_}SWAP}}{CONTEXT:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-LZD7UO27WADGX7M4TS77RNCD74000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{420}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{421}\nwdocspar

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{ccl}
\toprule
\thead{Opcode} & \thead{Table byte} & \thead{Handler address} \\
\midrule
\$00 & \$00 & \$0700 (RESIDENT\_DECODE\_DISPATCH) \\
\$01 & \$27 & \$0727 \\

Opcodes \$09 and \$0D share the same handler (\$07A2).

\subsection{decode\_encrypted\_addr (\$0710)}

Decodes a 2-byte encrypted address from the bytecode stream.
Uses the same XOR scheme as the EALDR VM.  The decoded address is
left in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}54/{\$}55\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{422}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}}}\moddef{decode encrypted addr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0710
\nwlinkedidentc{DECODE_ENCRYPTED_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read low byte
    EOR     #$03                    ; decrypt
    INY
    BNE     .no_carry1
    INC     $53
.no_carry1:
    STA     $54                     ; decoded low
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read high byte
    INY
    BNE     .no_carry2
    INC     $53
.no_carry2:
    EOR     #$D9                    ; decrypt
    STA     $55                     ; decoded high
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}ENCRYPTED{\_}ADDR}}{DECODE:unENCRYPTED:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}ENCRYPTED{\_}ADDR}}{DECODE:unENCRYPTED:unADDR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{423}\nwdocspar

\subsection{resident\_decode\_dispatch (\$0700)}

Opcode \$00 handler---the resident interpreter's GOTO instruction.
Decodes an address and redirects execution there.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{424}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}}}\moddef{resident decode dispatch~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0700
\nwlinkedidentc{RESIDENT_DECODE_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DECODE_ENCRYPTED_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-QPGMZCBHONP3ALTVEWGVE7O2I4000000-1}   ; → $54/$55
    LDA     $54                     ; \\
    STA     $52                     ;  | $52/$53 = decoded address
    LDA     $55                     ;  |
    STA     $53                     ; /
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     RESIDENT_DISPATCH_FETCH ; fetch from new location
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESIDENT{\_}DECODE{\_}DISPATCH}}{RESIDENT:unDECODE:unDISPATCH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}ENCRYPTED{\_}ADDR}}{DECODE:unENCRYPTED:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DECODE{\_}ENCRYPTED{\_}ADDR}}{DECODE:unENCRYPTED:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-BGQWA2JRONNKYOAYDUITG47DXM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{425}\nwdocspar

\section{Script/event engine (\$795B)}
\label{sec:script_engine}

The script engine runs short bytecode programs that control animations,
sound, and game events.  It is called with a script index in X.

\subsection{Entry and setup}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{426}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $795B
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}:
    SUBROUTINE

    STA     $C010                   ; clear keyboard strobe
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; attract_flag = 0
    CPX     #$06                    ; script index 6 = attract
    BNE     .not_attract
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; attract_flag = 1
.not_attract:

    CPX     #$02                    ; special setup for index 2
    BEQ     .setup_2
    CPX     #$04                    ; special setup for index 4
    BEQ     .setup_4
    JMP     .load_ptr

.setup_2:
    DEY
    STY     $80D5                   ; patch byte in script 1 data
    JMP     .load_ptr
.setup_4:
    DEY
    STY     $80E3                   ; patch byte in script 2 data
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{427}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Script pointer table}

The script base address is loaded from the table at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}80AE\nwendquote}:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{428}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.load_ptr:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1},X          ; low byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}+1,X        ; high byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = script start address
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{429}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{430}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}}}\moddef{script pointer table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $80AE
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}:
    DC.W    $80C6                   ; script 0
    DC.W    $80C7                   ; script 1
    DC.W    $80D7                   ; script 2
    DC.W    $A300                   ; script 3 (attract -- EALDR resident)
    DC.W    $A3C3                   ; script 4
    DC.W    $A3CE                   ; script 5
    DC.W    $A3DE                   ; script 6
    DC.W    $A409                   ; script 7
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{431}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{432}\nwdocspar

Scripts 3--7 are in the {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}A300\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}A5FF\nwendquote} resident region (which was
also copied to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0500\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}07FF\nwendquote} by EALDR, but the script table
points to the original addresses).

\subsection{Script interpreter}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{433}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}     EQU     $5A8D   ; script loop iteration counter
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}    EQU     $5A8E   ; script loop address (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}   EQU     $5A90   ; script gosub return address (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}    EQU     $5A92   ; PRNG mask for action randomization
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}   EQU     $5A93   ; action handler vector (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{434}\nwdocspar

After setup, the interpreter initializes its loop counter and PRNG mask:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{435}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}         ; loop counter = 0
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}        ; PRNG mask = 1
SCRIPT_ENGINE_FETCH:
.fetch:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; read script byte
    CMP     #$27
    BCC     .control                ; < $27 → control command
    JMP     .action                 ; ≥ $27 → action dispatch
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{436}\nwdocspar

\subsubsection{Control commands (< \$27)}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{437}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.control:
    CMP     #$25
    BEQ     .cmd_25                 ; set PRNG mask = $0F
    BCS     .cmd_26                 ; $26: PRNG mask = $00

    CMP     #$23
    BEQ     .cmd_23                 ; set action vector → \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    BCS     .cmd_24                 ; set action vector → \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}

    CMP     #$21
    BEQ     .cmd_21                 ; gosub
    BCS     .cmd_22                 ; nop (return)

    CMP     #$1F
    BEQ     .cmd_1F                 ; set loop address
    BCS     .cmd_20                 ; set gosub address

    ; --- Loop/end-loop (byte < $1F) ---
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}         ; compare with loop counter
    BEQ     .end_loop
    BCC     .end_loop

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}         ; counter++
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}        ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = loop address
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}+1      ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JMP     .fetch

.end_loop:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}         ; reset loop counter
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{438}\nwdocspar

When the byte value equals or exceeds the loop counter, the loop
terminates and the counter resets.  Otherwise, the counter increments
and execution jumps back to the saved loop address.

\subsubsection{Command implementations}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{439}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.cmd_25:                            ; PRNG mask = $0F
    LDA     #$0F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_26:                            ; PRNG mask = $00
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_23:                            ; action vector → \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_24:                            ; action vector → \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_22:                            ; nop (return from script)
    RTS

.cmd_21:                            ; gosub: jump to saved address
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     .fetch

.cmd_1F:                            ; set loop address = current+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}+1
    JMP     .fetch

.cmd_20:                            ; set gosub address = current+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}+1
    JMP     .fetch
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{440}\nwdocspar

\subsubsection{Action dispatch ($\geq$ \$27)}

When the script byte is {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}27\nwendquote} or higher, the PRNG output is masked and
XORed with the action byte, introducing randomness.  The action vector
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DISPATCH{\_}VEC\nwendquote} is set by the handlers at {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}ACTION{\textbackslash}{\_}VEC\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{441}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.action:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; save action byte
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}             ; PRNG output
    AND     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}        ; apply mask
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; XOR with action byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; modified action
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}           ; advance script pointer
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; read parameter byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_INDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}  ; → JMP (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28})
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})                   ; dispatch via action vector
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{442}\nwdocspar

\subsection{advance (\$7A4F)}

The ``advance'' routine is the target of all {\Tt{}JMP\ SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}ADVANCE\nwendquote} in
the control commands.  It increments the script pointer, checks for user
input (during attract mode), and loops back to {\Tt{}.fetch\nwendquote}.

During the attract screen ({\Tt{}ATTRACT{\textbackslash}{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} = 1), this routine checks for
keyboard or joystick input.  If detected, it returns immediately via RTS,
which exits the entire {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\textbackslash}{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} call.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{443}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}}}\moddef{script advance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A4F
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}           ; advance script pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            ; attract_flag
    BEQ     .continue               ; not attract mode → skip input check

    ; Attract mode: check keyboard
    LDA     $C000                   ; keyboard register
    BPL     .check_joy              ; no key → check joystick
    RTS                             ; key pressed → exit

.check_joy:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}              ; joystick flag
    BEQ     .continue               ; no joystick → continue script
    LDX     #$00
    LDA     $C061,X                 ; button 0
    BPL     .btn1                   ; not pressed
    RTS                             ; pressed → exit
.btn1:
    INX
    LDA     $C061,X                 ; button 1
    BPL     .continue               ; not pressed → continue
    RTS                             ; pressed → exit

.continue:
    LSR     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}                   ; shift timing flag
    JMP     SCRIPT_ENGINE_FETCH     ; loop back to interpreter
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{444}\nwdocspar

\subsection{script helpers}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{445}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}}}\moddef{script action indirect~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup

\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_INDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}:
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28})
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}\eatline

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{447}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}}}\moddef{script helpers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup

\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BEQ     .carry
    RTS
.carry:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}\eatline
