\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}TABLE}}{MOB:unDATA:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{466}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Combat}

\section{Manual}

According to the original manual:

Strike probability

Whenever any character tries to strike another character, the game will
compute his chance of success. Any character's base chance of striking
his victim is 3.125% times their dexterity. Thus, a player with a dexterity of
11 has a 34.375% chance of striking his victim. However, the base chance is
adjusted by several factors:

If the victim is:

particularly difficult to hit

(halflings and elves have this ability to dodge) . . .. .. . ... subtract 12.5%
particularly easy to hit. . . . . . ....... . .. . .. .. .. .. . .. . . . .. . add 12.5%
extremely easy to hit ....... . . ... . . .. . . .. .. .. . .. . . . .. ... . add 25%
down (unconscious, in hand to hand combat, or resting) .. . . add 18.75%
currently resting (this is in
addition to the adjustment for being down) . . . .. .. . . . . . .. . add 9.375 %
defending . .. .. ..... .. .. . ... . . . ... . ........ . ..... subtract 9.375%
attacking ..... . ... . ... . ..... . ... ... ..... .... . . ... . no adjustment
running . . .... . .. . ..... .. .... . ... . .. .. .. . ..... . .. subtract 3.125 %
on the same space with attacker, the stronger character is
is given an advantage .. . .. . add 1.5625% times attackers strength and
subtract 1.5625% times victim's strength

The chance of striking the victim is then adjusted, if necessary, so that it
is never less than 3.125% nor greater than 96.875%.

The probabilities are in increments of 1/32. In the code, 1/32 is represented by
a single count in 6 bits, so the maximum count is 31 (96.875%).

DATA[0,1] = name
DATA[4] = creature type:
  0x00: Human
  0x01: Elf
  0x02: Dwarf
  0x03: Halfling
  0x15: Human
  0x23: Human (Morgiana, Princess Buddir)
  0x3C: Owl
  0x3F: Statue, Sultan, Right guard, Left guard, small zombie, big zombie
  0x41: Dwarf
  0x43: Thief
  0x44: Bear
  0x45: Rat
  0x46: Wolf
  0x47: Dragon
  0x48: Greasy
  0x4A: Sword
  0x4B: Ram
  0x4C: Scorpion
  0x4D: Succubus
  0x4E: Tiger, Leo, Jackal
  0x4F: Crab
  0x50: Bull
  0x54: Zombie (Witless)
  0x58: Thief
  0x59: Brown Bear
  0x5E: Wanderer
  0x5F: Mechanical Sword
  0x61: Scorpion (Giant)
  0x65: Sonny Boy Minotaur
  0x93: Statue (Gemini I, Gemini II)
  0x93: Aladdin
  0x94: Elf
  0x9B: White Dragon
  0x9E: Bane of Thieves
  0xA6: Unicorn

DATA[5] = STR
DATA[6] = CON/HP 0-3F
DATA[7] = MEL-1
DATA[9] = HTH-1
DATA[B] =
  7: Extremely easy to hit
  6: Particularly difficult to hit
  5: ? Incredibly easy to hit?
  4: DEX-1
  3: DEX-1
  2: DEX-1
  1: DEX-1
  0: DEX-1

DATA[C] = SPD
DATA[F] =
  7:
  6:
  5:
  4:
  3:
  2: Unconscious/Down
  1: State
  0: State

State:
  0:
  1:
  2:
  3: Defending

\section{Turn processing}

\subsection{game\_turn\_loop (\$19AD)}
\label{sec:game-turn-loop}

Handles one character's complete turn---movement, input, encounters,
and event dispatch.  Called once per character per game tick.

\paragraph{Setup.}
The character's current position (field~3 of the record at {\Tt{}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}PTR\nwendquote})
is split into column and row.  Movement flags are cleared, and the
number of movement points is read from field~12 (low nibble).
If the character's constitution (field~6, bits~0--5) is below~3,
or if {\Tt{}CHECK{\textbackslash}{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} returns~2 (hostile territory), a
``restricted'' flag is set (bit~2 of field~15).

\paragraph{Input.}
For the player ({\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A05\nwendquote}~=~0), keyboard input is read via the
resident dispatch at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}A44C\nwendquote}.  For NPCs, {\Tt{}AI{\textbackslash}{\_}CHOOSE{\textbackslash}{\_}TARGET\nwendquote}
selects a destination and {\Tt{}FUN{\textbackslash}{\_}6742\nwendquote} computes a direction.
The direction value encodes both movement and commands:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{cl}
\textbf{Value} & \textbf{Action} \\
\hline
1 & North (row$-$) \\
2 & South (row$+$) \\
3 & West (col$-$) \\
4 & East (col$+$) \\
5 & Pass (skip turn) \\
6 & Action 6 $\to$ \$14CD \\
7 & Action 7 $\to$ \$14B7 \\
8 & Action 8 $\to$ set state~1 \\
9 & Fight/attack $\to$ \$143F
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\paragraph{Movement.}
After applying the direction, the new position is converted via
{\Tt{}COLROW{\textbackslash}{\_}TO{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote} and checked with {\Tt{}FIND{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote}.
If the cell is empty, the move is committed (position updated, sprite
redrawn) and adjacent threats are re-checked.  Finding no threats
ends the turn early.

\paragraph{Encounter dispatch.}
If something occupies the destination cell, the result from
{\Tt{}FIND{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTITY{\textbackslash}{\_}AT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote} determines the handler:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}BF\nwendquote} $\geq$ \$80 --- mob encounter $\to$ \$1E5A
\item Event byte~1 bits~7--6 $\neq$ \$C0 --- {\Tt{}HANDLE{\textbackslash}{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}
\item \$C0--\$D1 --- {\Tt{}PICKUP{\textbackslash}{\_}TREASURE\nwendquote}
\item \$D2--\$D4 --- {\Tt{}TRIGGER{\textbackslash}{\_}SCENE{\textbackslash}{\_}EVENT\nwendquote}
\item \$D5--\$DA --- map/area event $\to$ \$70DF
\item \$FE --- empty-slot interaction $\to$ \$1D4D
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{467}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}    EQU     $5A05   ; 0 = player, 2-5 = AI behavior modes
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}  EQU     $5A61   ; column at start of turn
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}  EQU     $5A62   ; row at start of turn
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A63   ; current column during turn
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A64   ; current row during turn
\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A65   ; movement points remaining
\nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A66   ; steps taken this turn
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}       EQU     $5A67   ; direction/command from input (1-9)
\nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU  $5A76   ; accumulated willingness-to-fight score
\nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU     $5A78   ; result of \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}   EQU     $5A86   ; selected combat target pointer (low byte)
\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}   EQU     $5A87   ; selected combat target pointer (high byte)
\nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A88   ; best threat level during target selection
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU     $5A59   ; saved byte 2 of event slot (type+value)
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU     $5A5A   ; lower 5 bits of event slot byte 2
\nwlinkedidentc{DIR_SCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}      EQU     $5A6A   ; array of 5 direction scores (indexed 0-4)
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}    EQU     $5A6F   ; current direction being evaluated / random range
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A70   ; position being tested for direction evaluation
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}   EQU     $5A71   ; AI target position (set by \nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1})
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}   EQU     $5A72   ; AI target column / min distance temp
\nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU     $5A7F   ; level bits during stat modification
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A79   ; mob defense value (low 4 bits of mob byte 8)
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU    $5A85   ; offset into shop item table (5 per item)
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_OPTION_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU  $5AAA   ; number of input options to draw
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} EQU   $5AAB   ; current menu selection index
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}    EQU     $5AAC   ; 120-byte input text display buffer
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}   EQU     $5F5E   ; indirect jump vector for input callbacks
\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5B25   ; 1 if char level < steps taken
\nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}    EQU     $5B26   ; 1 if no adjacent threats or encounters
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5B27   ; 1 while turn is in progress
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}}\\{{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}}\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{468}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{469}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}}}\moddef{game turn loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $19AD
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    ; --- setup: save position, clear flags ---
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 3 = packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}            ; clear restricted flag (bit 2 of field 15)

    ; --- check constitution and encounters ---
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 6 (constitution/HP)
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BPL     .con_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}            ; set restricted (too weak)
.con_ok:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BNE     .enc_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}            ; set restricted (hostile territory)
.enc_ok:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .get_speed
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}    ; NPC: pick a destination

    ; --- determine movement points ---
.get_speed:
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 12
    AND     #$0F                ; low nibble = speed
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}

    ; --- adjust points based on threats ---
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BEQ     .chk_limit          ; hostile → check if enough to limit
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}            ; check adjacent threats
    CMP     #$01
    BEQ     .move_loop          ; exactly 1 threat → keep full
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$02
    BCC     .move_loop          ; < 2 points → keep as is
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(move_points)
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .do_limit           ; random == 0 → force limit
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; reduce randomly
    BNE     .move_loop
.chk_limit:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$02
    BCC     .move_loop          ; < 2 → use as is
.do_limit:
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(1) → 0 or 1
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; 1 or 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .move_loop          ; always

    ; === MOVEMENT LOOP ===
\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}:                     ; $1A31 - external entry point
.move_loop:
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .has_points
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .end_turn           ; out of points, took steps → done
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .has_points         ; player with 0 points, 0 steps → still prompt
.end_turn:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}            ; end turn

.has_points:
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .player_input
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NPC_MOVE_AI}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}            ; NPC movement AI
    JMP     .dispatch_cmd

    ; --- player input ---
.player_input:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}            ; set up input UI
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4  ; check if movement enabled
    BNE     .have_input
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}            ; no input → exit
.have_input:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_INPUT_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}
    JSR     $A44C               ; resident: read keyboard
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .do_move            ; player goes straight to movement
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}            ; cancelled

    ; --- NPC command dispatch (player skips this) ---
.dispatch_cmd:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$05
    BCC     .do_move            ; 1-4: movement direction
    BNE     .not_pass
    JMP     .move_loop          ; 5: pass
.not_pass:
    CMP     #$09
    BNE     .not_fight
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}            ; 9: fight → set restricted
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}
.not_fight:
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}            ; re-check encounter
    PLA
    CMP     #$07
    BNE     .not_cmd7
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}            ; 7: action
.not_cmd7:
    BCS     .cmd8
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}            ; 6: action
.cmd8:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_STATE_FIGHT}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}            ; 8: set state 1

    ; --- apply movement direction ---
.do_move:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BMI     .move_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_CAN_LEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}            ; can we leave hostile zone?
    CMP     #$01
    BEQ     .move_ok
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}            ; blocked → end turn
.move_ok:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .not_north
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; 1: north
    JMP     .check_dest
.not_north:
    BNE     .not_south
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; 2: south
    JMP     .check_dest
.not_south:
    CMP     #$03
    BNE     .go_east
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; 3: west
    JMP     .check_dest
.go_east:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; 4: east

    ; --- check what's at the destination ---
.check_dest:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}  ; → \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .something          ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 != 0 → occupied
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BEQ     .empty              ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} == 0 → empty cell
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; display blocked message?
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}

.empty:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit move (update pos, draw sprite)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}            ; check adjacent threats
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .keep_moving        ; threats remain → continue
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; no threats → stop
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.keep_moving:
    JMP     .move_loop

    ; --- destination occupied: dispatch by type ---
.something:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .event              ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 < $80 → event entry
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}            ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 >= $80 → mob encounter

.event:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1
    TAX
    AND     #$C0
    CMP     #$C0
    BEQ     .activated
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}    ; non-activated → encounter

.activated:
    TXA
    CMP     #$D2
    BPL     .not_treasure
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PICKUP_TREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}     ; $C0-$D1: treasure

.not_treasure:
    CMP     #$D5
    BPL     .not_scene
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TRIGGER_SCENE_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1} ; $D2-$D4: scene event

.not_scene:
    CMP     #$DB
    BPL     .not_map_event
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 ; $D5-$DA: save \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit move first
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 ; restore \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_SHOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}

.not_map_event:
    CMP     #$FE
    BEQ     .empty_slot
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}            ; $DB-$FD: unknown

.empty_slot:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_EVENT_SLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}            ; $FE: empty slot interaction
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}}\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT}}{HANDLE:unEVENT:unSLOT}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI}}{NPC:unMOVE:unAI}}\\{{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT}}{HANDLE:unEVENT:unSLOT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI}}{NPC:unMOVE:unAI}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{470}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{471}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}}}\moddef{handle encounter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1C01
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    ; --- random encounter path (event type $00-$3F) ---
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}            ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$40
    BPL     .specific           ; type >= $40 → specific encounter
    LDA     #$14
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(20)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 5
    AND     #$1F                ; low 5 bits = avoidance stat
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    BMI     .roll_type          ; stat < random → encounter happens
    JMP     .avoided            ; stat >= random → avoid encounter
.roll_type:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     #$74
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    BPL     .normal             ; $74 >= random → normal encounter
    JMP     .special            ; rare: special encounter
.normal:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "encounter" message
    LDX     #$14
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; run encounter script

    ; --- specific encounter path (type >= $40) ---
.specific:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 0 = position
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}            ; set state 1
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$3F                ; low 6 bits = encounter ID
    BNE     .have_id
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}           ; ID 0 → derive from PRNG
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$1C
    ORA     #$01
.have_id:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; store encounter ID
    ROR
    BCC     .no_clear
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 4
    BMI     .no_clear
    CMP     #$2A
    BMI     .no_clear
    CMP     #$3F
    BPL     .no_clear
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; clear ID if char in range $2A-$3E
.no_clear:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 2 = destination pos
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit move
    LDA     $7ABE
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CURRENT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; update char packed position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; compare encounter ID with current scene
    BEQ     .same_scene
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; different → reset position
.same_scene:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit to new position

    ; --- encounter avoided ---
.avoided:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ORA     #$40                ; mark event as activated
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; reset to turn start
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDX     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; run "avoided" script
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "avoided encounter" message

    ; --- special encounter (rare) ---
.special:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$09
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; trigger scene 9
    LDA     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{472}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{473}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}}}\moddef{trigger scene event~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1D04
\nwlinkedidentc{TRIGGER_SCENE_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}            ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     $5A5B               ; save event pointer low
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     $5A5C               ; save event pointer high
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit move
    LDA     $5A5B
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 ; restore event pointer
    LDA     $5A5C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 2 = scene index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; trigger scene
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$D3
    BPL     .d3_or_above
    RTS                         ; $D2: trigger scene only
.d3_or_above:
    BNE     .d4
    LDA     #$FE                ; $D3: mark event as empty
    DEY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
.d4:
    LDA     #$FE                ; $D4: mark event as empty
    DEY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDA     #$0F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; trigger bonus scene $0F
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(3)
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; 1-3
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}            ; apply effect to char
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{474}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{475}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pickup treasure~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $646B
\nwlinkedidentc{PICKUP_TREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}            ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 ; copy event ptr → \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}            ; commit move
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1 = treasure type
    CMP     #$C9
    BPL     .trapped            ; >= $C9 → trapped chest or special
    SEC
    SBC     #$C0                ; $C0-$C8: treasure index 0-8
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.rejoin:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 2 = quantity
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDY     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CURRENT_STATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}            ; look up treasure data
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 4
    CMP     #$15
    BCS     .mark_used          ; inventory full → skip pickup
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_STATUS_SLOTS}{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}            ; add item to inventory
    LDA     #$AB
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     $BB
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}      ; format quantity
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 13 (gold low)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 14 (gold high)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$CC
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     $BB
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}      ; format gold amount
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$84
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_AND_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}            ; display pickup message
.mark_used:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE                ; mark event slot as empty
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS

    ; --- trapped chest (type >= $C9) ---
.trapped:
    CMP     #$D1
    BNE     .not_d1
    JMP     .handle_d1          ; $D1: special chest
.not_d1:
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(6)
    AND     #$03                ; trap type 0-3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 4
    BMI     .apply_trap
    CMP     #$15
    BPL     .apply_trap
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$36
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; scene $36 + trap type
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; show trap scene
.apply_trap:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .trap0              ; trap 0: lose 1-5 HP
    BEQ     .trap1              ; trap 1: lose 2-9 HP
    CMP     #$02
    BEQ     .trap2              ; trap 2: decrement counter
    BNE     .trap3              ; trap 3: zero gold
.trap0:
    LDA     #$05
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; 1-5 damage
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap1:
    LDA     #$08
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CLC
    ADC     #$02                ; 2-9 damage
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap2:
    LDY     #$0B
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 11
    AND     #$1F
    BEQ     .after_trap         ; already zero
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    SEC
    SBC     #$01                ; decrement
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap3:
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; zero gold low
    INY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; zero gold high
.after_trap:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 2 = room
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; current room?
    BEQ     .same_room
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1
    SEC
    SBC     #$09                ; step back 9 in treasure table
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
.same_room:
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1
    SEC
    SBC     #$C9                ; convert to treasure index
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     .rejoin             ; loop: process next treasure

    ; --- special chest $D1 ---
.handle_d1:
    LDA     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; show scene $0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD5_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(3)
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .lucky
    RTS                         ; 2/3 chance: nothing
.lucky:
    LDA     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}          ; show bonus scene $0C
    JMP     .mark_used          ; mark event used
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{476}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{477}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}}}\moddef{ai choose target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $68AB
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    ; --- dispatch by AI mode ---
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_PREV_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .mode_ge2

    ; --- mode 0/1: check if NPC should join party ---
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .simple_target      ; no match → simple target
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$24
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "joins party" message
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
    LDA     #$25
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}        ; switch to player control
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    SEC
    SBC     #$15                ; adjust char field 4
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; source field 15 high bits
    AND     #$C0
    STA     $BA
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; target field 15 low bits
    AND     #$3F
    ORA     $BA                 ; merge high bits from source
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; group field 8
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; increment party size
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    INC     $5A01               ; increment global party count
    RTS

    ; --- mode 2: compare stats for target ---
.mode_ge2:
    BNE     .mode_ge3
.simple_target:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 5
    AND     #$1F
    STA     $BA
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char field 6
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     $BA
    BPL     .use_encounter
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}               ; no target
    JMP     .done
.use_encounter:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_NEAREST_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}            ; find encounter position
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 3: find nearest hostile ---
.mode_ge3:
    CMP     #$04
    BPL     .mode_ge4
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     #$3C                ; initial min distance
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .skip3
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; mob packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}            ; compute distance
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BCS     .skip3              ; not closer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}               ; new minimum
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}               ; target = this mob's position
.skip3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}            ; next group member
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .loop3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$3C
    BNE     .found3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; no hostile found → use default
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.found3:
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 4: no target ---
.mode_ge4:
    BNE     .mode_gt4
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 5+: find strongest hostile ---
.mode_gt4:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}         ; max strength seen
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop5:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .skip5
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; mob field 5
    AND     #$1F                ; strength stat
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BMI     .skip5              ; not stronger
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}         ; new max
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}         ; target position
.skip5:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}            ; next group member
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .loop5
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BEQ     .no_target5
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}               ; strongest mob's position
    JMP     .done
.no_target5:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; no hostile → use default
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- convert target position to col/row ---
.done:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}               ; target column
    STY     $5A73               ; target row
    RTS
