\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{479}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random member~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $12D0
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Pick a random eligible group member (field 4 in $00-$14 range)
    ; Uses ($FA)[8] as group size, calls \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1} to pick Nth
.loop:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; group size
    BEQ     .zero               ; empty group
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(size)
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .loop               ; 0 → retry
    TAX                         ; X = count down to Nth member
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.check:
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; member field 4
    BMI     .next               ; negative → skip
    CMP     #$15
    BPL     .next               ; >= $15 → skip
    DEX
    BNE     .next               ; not Nth yet
    RTS                         ; found: \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 points to member
.next:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    JMP     .check
.zero:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                 ; clear pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{480}\nwdocspar


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{481}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}}}\moddef{find nearest event~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $138D
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_NEAREST_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Find nearest non-activated event (byte 1 < $C0) by Manhattan distance
    ; Returns position in A ($5A13)
    LDA     #$7F                ; initial min distance
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event list pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event list pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     .check_end
.eval:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$C0
    BCS     .advance            ; >= $C0 → activated, skip
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event byte 0 = position
    STA     $5A15
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}            ; Manhattan distance
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BPL     .advance            ; not closer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; new minimum
    LDA     $5A15
    STA     $5A13               ; record position
.advance:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    CLC
    ADC     #$03                ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BCC     .check_end
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.check_end:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     #$FE                ; $FE = empty slot, skip
    BEQ     .advance
    CMP     #$FF                ; $FF = end of list
    BNE     .eval
    LDA     $5A13               ; return nearest position
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{482}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{483}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}}}\moddef{manhattan distance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $13DB
\nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Manhattan distance: |col(A) - col(char)| + |row(A) - row(char)|
    ; Input: A = packed position to measure from
    ; Uses char's position from (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[3]
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}       ; A → col in A, row in Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}            ; save target col
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}            ; save target row
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; char packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}            ; char col - target col
    BCS     .pos1
    EOR     #$FF                ; negate (absolute value)
    ADC     #$01
.pos1:
    STA     $BA                 ; |delta col|
    TYA
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}            ; char row - target row
    BCS     .pos2
    EOR     #$FF
    ADC     #$01
.pos2:
    CLC
    ADC     $BA                 ; |delta col| + |delta row|
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{484}\nwdocspar

\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Copy (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[0..1] → \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1, then JMP $7705
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}

\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CURRENT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Copy \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 → \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1, store \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14} → \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}, JMP $0F84
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{491}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}}}\moddef{commit move~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1B52
\nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Commit move: store \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}/ROW, convert to packed pos,
    ; update char field 3, set font char, draw sprite
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; update char packed position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}       ; draw sprite
    LDX     #$16
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    ; falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}:
    ; Reset to turn start: convert start col/row to packed pos,
    ; call $1156, update current→start, conditionally run script
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CPX     #$16
    BEQ     .run_script
    RTS
.run_script:
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PY \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Set char field 15 low 2 bits to A
    STA     $5A60
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$FC                ; clear low 2 bits
    ORA     $5A60               ; set to new value
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}\eatline

    ORG     $769B
\nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}:
\nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Text display: init HRCG, set window bottom, output char $83, reset
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_SCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
    JSR     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_LOW
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}             ; cursor to row 23
    LDA     #$83
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    JSR     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_ALL
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{504}\nwdocspar

\subsection{clear\_map (\$76B0)}

Loads the first two bytes of the record at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FA/{\textbackslash}{\$}FB\nwendquote} (CHAR\_PTR)
into {\Tt{}PRINT{\textbackslash}{\_}STRING{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} and tail-calls {\Tt{}SETUP{\textbackslash}{\_}TEXT{\textbackslash}{\_}POS\nwendquote}.
Used before map redraw to set the text window from the current
character's record.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{505}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}}}\moddef{clear map~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76B0
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_MAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}:

    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y            ; record byte 0 → \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y            ; record byte 1 → \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{506}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{507}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}}}\moddef{apply damage~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $106F
\nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Apply damage A to char at (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}).
    ; Subtracts from field 6 (HP). Displays damage message,
    ; runs script. If HP drops to 0: death handling.
    AND     #$1F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; damage amount
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDX     #$03
.ror_loop:
    INX
    CLC
    ROR
    BNE     .ror_loop           ; count leading zeros → message index
    TXA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; show damage message
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDX     #$04
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; run damage script
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; field 6 (HP + flags)
    TAX
    AND     #$3F                ; HP only
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; HP - damage
    BCC     .dead               ; underflow → dead
    BEQ     .dead               ; zero → dead
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}               ; new HP
    TXA
    AND     #$C0                ; preserve high bits
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; store updated field 6
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    CMP     #$03
    BPL     .check8
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; field 15
    AND     #$F8
    ORA     #$04                ; set restricted flag
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$09
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "badly hurt" message
    RTS
.check8:
    CMP     #$08
    BPL     .ge8
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$0A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "wounded" message
.ge8:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$0B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "scratched" message

    ; --- character dies ---
.dead:
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; field 4
    LDX     #$08                ; default script
    CMP     #$15
    BCC     .skip_flag
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ORA     #$10                ; set death flag
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDX     #$0A                ; NPC death script
.skip_flag:
    TXA
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(3)
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .rand0
    LDA     #$0E
    BNE     .show_death
.rand0:
    LDA     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}     ; random(2)
    CLC
    ADC     #$27                ; message $27 or $28
.show_death:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; death message
    PLA
    TAX
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; death script
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}        ; cleanup
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; gold low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; gold high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDY     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}   ; subtract gold (Y=0 → subtract)
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{UPDATE_EVENT_LIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}            ; handle death at position
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}    ; redraw position
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{508}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{509}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}}}\moddef{print entity name~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1142
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Print entity name: cursor to row 21, load name ptr from (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})[0..1],
    ; print centered at bottom, then reset text window.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; name pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; name pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{510}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{511}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}}}\moddef{update event list~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1260
\nwlinkedidentc{UPDATE_EVENT_LIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Update event list for position A with value \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1.
    ; If \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = 0, return immediately.
    ; Scans 3-byte event entries at ($FA)[6..7]:
    ;   $FF = end of list → display message $2A
    ;   $FE = empty slot → insert new entry
    ;   matching pos + type $C0-$D0 → add to existing entry
    ;   else → advance to next entry
    STA     $BA                 ; save position
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BNE     .has_value
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .has_value
    RTS
.has_value:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event list pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; event list pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.scan:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; entry byte 0 = position
    CMP     #$FF
    BNE     .not_end
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$2A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "event list full" message
.not_end:
    CMP     #$FE
    BNE     .check_match
    ; Empty slot: insert new entry
    LDA     $BA
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; byte 0 = position
    INY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    AND     #$07
    ORA     #$C0                ; byte 1 = type + high bits
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    INY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; byte 2 = value low
    RTS
.check_match:
    CMP     $BA                 ; same position?
    BNE     .next
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; byte 1 = type
    BPL     .next               ; not activated
    CMP     #$C0
    BMI     .next               ; below $C0
    CMP     #$D1
    BPL     .next               ; above $D0
    ; Add to existing entry
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; byte 2 += value low
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    DEY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    AND     #$07
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; byte 1 += value high (with carry)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
.next:
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    ADC     #$03                ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
.no_carry:
    JMP     .scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{512}\nwdocspar

\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    STA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     FONT_CHARSET
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{517}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}}}\moddef{check can leave~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1231
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_CAN_LEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Check hostility threshold: if \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11} >= $40, show message $1C
    ; and return 1; else show message $1D and return 0.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    CMP     #$40
    BPL     .pass
    JMP     .fail
.pass:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$1C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
.fail:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$1D
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{518}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{519}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}}}\moddef{auto heal~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $143F
\nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Auto-heal: if HP < $28, randomly attempt healing via $1482.
    ; Loops while \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11} >= $50 (still injured). Shows message $21
    ; if player heals for the first time.
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$28
    BMI     .do_heal
    RTS
.do_heal:
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .start_heal
    RTS
.start_heal:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
.heal_loop:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INCREMENT_HP}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    CMP     #$50
    BPL     .heal_loop
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     #$15
    BCC     .player
.done:
    RTS
.player:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    BNE     .done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$21
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}}\\{{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{520}\nwdocspar

    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CLC
    ADC     #$01
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BEQ     .notify

    BEQ     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{525}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}}}\moddef{enter combat state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $14B7
\nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Check encounter, clear restricted flag, conditionally set it,
    ; then set char state to 2.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    BNE     .skip
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
.skip:
    LDA     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{526}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{527}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}}}\moddef{start combat~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $14CD
\nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Set char state to 3, call $199D, jump to combat logic at $15AB.
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_TARGET_PTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESOLVE_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{528}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{529}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}}}\moddef{resolve attack~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $15AB
\nwlinkedidentc{RESOLVE_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Combat willingness calculation and attack resolution.
    ; Computes willingness score in \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} based on char/target stats,
    ; then rolls random to determine if attack occurs.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    CMP     #$01
    BNE     .not_player
    LDA     #$1C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .clamp_done
.not_player:
    LDY     #$0B
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$1F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    TXA
    AND     #$20
    BEQ     .no_bit5
    TXA
    AND     #$EF
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDA     #$18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit5:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TAY
    AND     #$40
    BEQ     .no_bit6
    LDA     #$FC
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit6:
    TYA
    AND     #$80
    BEQ     .no_bit7
    LDA     #$08
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit7:
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$04
    BEQ     .no_restrict
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_restrict:
    TXA
    AND     #$03
    CMP     #$01
    BPL     .ge1
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
    JMP     .state_done
.ge1:
    BNE     .ne1
    LDA     #$FF
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
    JMP     .state_done
.ne1:
    CMP     #$03
    BNE     .state_done
    LDA     #$FD
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.state_done:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BCS     .hp_ok
    LDA     #$18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.hp_ok:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    BNE     .diff_pos
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    STA     $5A77
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    SEC
    SBC     $5A77
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.diff_pos:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BPL     .not_neg
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .clamp_done
.not_neg:
    CMP     #$1F
    BMI     .clamp_done
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.clamp_done:
    LDA     #$1F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BMI     .attack
    BEQ     .attack
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$D2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BEQ     .is_player
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
.is_player:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
    RTS
.attack:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BEQ     .mob_attack
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PLAYER_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}
.mob_attack:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\eatline

    ORG     $1BA7
\nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; End turn: clear \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}, check encounter, compare level vs \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .check_level
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}
.check_level:
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$07
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BMI     .too_low
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}
.too_low:
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{536}\nwdocspar

\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Check encounter at char position, clear restricted flag,
    ; set it if encounter type is 2.
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BNE     .done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\eatline

    ORG     $1D4D
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_EVENT_SLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Handle empty slot interaction: treasure pickup, traps,
    ; and event activation.
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    AND     #$C0
    CMP     #$C0
    BNE     .not_active
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    TAX
    CMP     #$1D
    BPL     .no_remove
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TXA
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .no_remove
    LDA     #$0A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
.no_remove:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .has_threat
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.has_threat:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}
.not_active:
    PHA
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    PLA
    CMP     #$00
    BNE     .has_type
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1B
    BMI     .small_val
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}
.small_val:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$0D
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
.has_type:
    CMP     #$40
    BEQ     .type40
    LDA     #$19
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    BPL     .type40
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    AND     #$3F
    ORA     #$40
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PRNG_CHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}:              ; $1DDC - external entry point
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    CMP     #$14
    BMI     .trap_damage
    RTS
.trap_damage:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$11

\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Mob encounter on movement: check flee chance, commit move,
    ; check encounter type, walk group for combat.

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}

    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BEQ     .no_flee
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CLC

    BMI     .clamp_low
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .in_range
    LDA     #$1C

.clamp_low:

.in_range:

    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}

    LDY     #$03

    ORG     $60D2
\nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Configure input handler: patch game input table enable flags
    ; from \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}/\nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}/\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_COMBAT_ELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+54  ; rec6 byte 0 (rest option)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+34  ; rec4 byte 0 (flee option)
    EOR     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+14  ; rec2 byte 0 (combat option)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+24  ; rec3 byte 0 (combat option)
    EOR     #$01
    CLC
    ADC     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+1   ; max movement range
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4   ; rec1 byte 0 (movement)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .clear
    RTS
.clear:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4   ; rec1 byte 0 (movement)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\eatline
