    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BEQ     .done
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     .done
.under_level:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{590}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{591}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}}}\moddef{modify char stats~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $704D
\nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    ; Add or subtract gold from char record at (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}).
    ; Y=0: subtract \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 from field 13/14
    ; Y≠0: add \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 to field 13/14
    ; Then recompute field 12 (level/XP encoding).
    CPY     #$00
    BEQ     .subtract
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JMP     .aftermath
.subtract:
    LDY     #$0D
    SEC
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
.aftermath:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ROL
    ROL
    ROL
    AND     #$F8
    STA     $5A7E
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    PHA
    AND     #$0F
    TAX
    PLA
    ROR
    ROR
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    TAY
.decy:
    DEY
    BMI     .done_cnt
    INX
    BPL     .decy
.done_cnt:
    INY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STY     $BA
    STY     $BB
.outer_loop:
    LDY     #$0E
    CPX     #$00
    BEQ     .store_final
    CLC
    LDA     $BA
    ADC     $5A7E
    STA     $BA
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     $BB
.no_carry:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     $BB
    BCC     .store_final
    BNE     .next_iter
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     $BA
    BCC     .store_final
.next_iter:
    DEX
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    ADC     #$10
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .outer_loop
.store_final:
    TXA
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDY     #$0C
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{592}\nwdocspar

\subsection{set\_blink\_target (\$16A3)}

Sets up the blink cursor from the current combatant.  On the mob's turn,
the mob's packed position (byte 3 of mob data) is split into column and row,
and its appearance (byte 4) is converted to a font character number.
On the player's turn, the player's column and row are taken directly from
{\Tt{}CURRENT{\textbackslash}{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}CURRENT{\textbackslash}{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, and the font character is looked up via {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0C7E\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{593}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}  EQU     $5A74   ; 0 = mob's turn, 1 = player's turn
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{594}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{595}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}}}\moddef{set blink target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $16A3
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    CMP     #$01
    BEQ     .player

    ; --- mob path: convert packed position to col/row ---
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data[3] = packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}           ; A=col, Y=row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; mob data[4] = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}  ; appearance → font char number
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    RTS

    ; --- player path: col/row already separate ---
.player:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}             ; player font column
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}             ; player font row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  | copy pointer \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2} → \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}     ; look up player's font char
    LDA     FONT_CHARNUM
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{596}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{597}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}}}\moddef{Hit chance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
(15AB)
.compute_to_hit:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    CMP      #$01
    BNE      .mob
    LDA      #$1C
    STA      TO_HIT
    JMP      .roll

.mob:
    ; Base chance = dexterity (-1)
    LDY      #$0B
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}?),Y
    TAX
    AND      #$1F
    STA      TO_HIT
    TXA

    ; If DEX bit 5 set, clear DEX bit 4
    ; and add 75% to chance.
    AND      #$20
    BEQ      LAB_15d6
    TXA
    AND      #$EF
    STA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}?),Y
    LDA      #$18
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15d6:
    ; If opponent DEX bit 6 set,
    ; subtract 12.5% (particularly difficult
    ; to hit).
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    TAY
    AND      #$40
    BEQ      LAB_15e2
    LDA      #$FC
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15e2:
    ; If opponent DEX bit 7 set,
    ; add 25% (extremely easy to hit).
    TYA
    AND      #$80
    BEQ      .check_thing_f
    LDA      #$08
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.check_thing_f:
    ; If opponent F bit 2 set,
    ; add 18.75% (down: unconscious, in hand to hand combat,
    ; or resting)
    LDY      #$0F
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    TAX
    AND      #$04
    BEQ      LAB_15fa
    LDA      #$06
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15fa:
    ; If opponent F bits 1,0 < 1
    ; add 9.375% (currently resting)
    TXA
    AND      #$03
    CMP      #$01
    BPL      LAB_1609
    LDA      #$03
    JSR      add_to_to_hit
    JMP      .check_thing_6

LAB_1609:
    ; subtract 3.125% ("running" -- bugged?)
    BNE      LAB_1613
    LDA      #$FF
    JSR      add_to_to_hit
    JMP      .check_thing_6

LAB_1613:
    ; If opponent F bits 1,0 == 3
    ; subtract 9.375% (opponent is defending)
    CMP      #$03
    BNE      .check_thing_6
    LDA      #$FD
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.check_thing_6:
    ; If opponent CON <= 3
    ; add 75%.
    LDY      #$06
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    AND      #$3F
    CMP      #$03
    BCS      LAB_162b
    LDA      #$18
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_162b:
    ; If mob[3] == thing[3]...
    LDY      #$03
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}?),Y
    CMP      (THING_PTR?),Y
    BNE      .limit_to_hit

    ; add Thing[STR]/2 & 0x0F - Mob[STR]/2 & 0x0F
    LDY      #$05
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    ROR
    AND      #$0F
    STA      DAT_5a77
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}?),Y
    ROR
    AND      #$0F
    SEC
    SBC      DAT_5a77
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.limit_to_hit:
    LDA      TO_HIT
    BPL      .adjust_for_automatic_fail
    LDA      #$00
    STA      TO_HIT
    JMP      .roll

.adjust_for_automatic_fail:
    CMP      #$1F
    BMI      .roll
    LDA      #$1E
    STA      TO_HIT

.roll:
    LDA      #$1F
    JSR      get_random
    CMP      TO_HIT
    BMI      .do_hit
    BEQ      .do_hit
    JSR      clear_row_21
    JSR      print_name_of_actor
    JSR      scroll_status_window_up
    LDA      #$D2
    STA      DATA_PTR2
    LDA      #$7C
    STA      DATA_PTR2+1
    JSR      print_centered_row_23
    JSR      scroll_status_window_up
    LDA      #$01
    CMP      \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BEQ      .do_blink
    JSR      print_thing_name_centered_row_23
.do_blink:
    JSR      blink
    RTS
.do_hit:
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BEQ      .hit_mob
    JMP      hit_nonmob?
.hit_mob:
    JMP      hit_mob?
\nwnotused{Hit chance}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{598}\nwdocspar

\subsection{init\_mob\_count (\$0C51)}

Called once during {\Tt{}GAME{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to initialize {\Tt{}TOTAL{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.
Walks all 9-byte character records starting from index~1 (skipping
the group-0 header at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4000\nwendquote}), summing byte~8 (group member count)
of each record until the end sentinel (byte~1 = {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FF\nwendquote}) is reached.

The result is the total number of mobs assigned to groups~1 and above.
At startup, byte~8 contains only the group count in bits~3--0 (the
upper bits---pending XP and status flag---are zero), so the sum is
simply the total mob count.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{599}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}}}\moddef{init mob count~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C51
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDA     #$00                    ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; / clear total
    LDA     #$09                    ; \\ $FA/$FB = $4009 (record 1)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    LDA     #$40                    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ; /
.loop:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 1 of record
    CMP     #$FF                    ; $FF = end sentinel
    BNE     .count
    RTS
.count:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                 ; byte 8 = group member count
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; accumulate
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
    LDA     #$09                    ; \\ advance $FA by 9 (next record)
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}                     ;  |
    BCC     .loop                   ;  |
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1                     ;  |
    BCS     .loop                   ; / always taken
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{600}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{602}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}}}\moddef{classify entity type~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $116B
    SUBROUTINE
; Sets \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 to handler address based on entity type at (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})
\nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .not_zero_page
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    BNE     .type_C3
.type_E4:                      ; $1175 - reused by backward BMI from $1198
    LDA     #$E4
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.type_C3:                      ; $117E - reused by JMP from $11F9
    LDA     #$C3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.not_zero_page:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    BMI     .check_ranges
.type_FC:                      ; $118D - reused by backward BMI from $11F5
    LDA     #$FC
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_ranges:
    CMP     #$C0
    BMI     .type_E4
    CMP     #$D2
    BPL     .check_d5
    LDA     #$D3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_d5:
    CMP     #$D5
    BPL     .check_fe
    LDA     #$16
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_fe:
    CMP     #$FE
    BEQ     .type_fe_entry
    LDA     #$28
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.type_fe_entry:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$1F
    BNE     .check_c0_bits
    LDA     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_c0_bits:
    TXA
    AND     #$C0
    CMP     #$C0
    BNE     .check_1b
.type_F0:                      ; $11DA - reused by backward BEQ from $11F7
    LDA     #$F0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_1b:
    TXA
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1B
    BPL     .check_1d
    LDA     #$CA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    RTS
.check_1d:
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .type_FC
    BEQ     .type_F0
    JMP     .type_C3
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{603}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{604}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}}}\moddef{map value to string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $11FC
    SUBROUTINE
; Maps A to string table index, walks linked list from $803A
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_VALUE_TO_STRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}:
    CMP     #$08
    BMI     .use_as_is
    CMP     #$10
    BPL     .high_range
    ROR
    AND     #$03
    ORA     #$08
    BNE     .use_as_is
.high_range:
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$03
    ORA     #$0C
.use_as_is:
    TAX
    LDA     #$3A
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDY     #$00
.loop:
    DEX
    BNE     .next
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
.next:
    SEC
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     #$00
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{605}\nwdocspar

    ORG     $1432
    SUBROUTINE
; Copies \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}/\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1, then JMP \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1} with A

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1

    TXA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{608}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}}}\moddef{calc combat strength~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $16E0
    SUBROUTINE
; Calculates combat strength using \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    CMP     #$01
    BEQ     .use_y7
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    BNE     .use_y7
    LDY     #$09
    BNE     .got_y
.use_y7:
    LDY     #$07
.got_y:
    TYA
    PHA
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$0F
    TAX
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    TXA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    SEC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .check_5a74
.exit_pla:                     ; $1712 - reused by backward BNE from $1717
    PLA
    RTS
.check_5a74:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BNE     .exit_pla
    PLA
    TAY
    TAX
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$80
    BNE     .use_50
    LDA     #$0D
    BNE     .do_random
.use_50:
    LDA     #$50
.do_random:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .missed
    RTS
.missed:
    TXA
    TAY
    LDA     #$81
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
    LDA     #$0A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    SEC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$1F
    BCC     .cap_ok
    LDA     #$1F
.cap_ok:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{609}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{610}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}}}\moddef{process entity script~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1849
    SUBROUTINE
; Saves entity char, marks as $FE, runs script $0E, dispatches, restores
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_ENTITY_SCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    LDA     $BA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}ENTITY{\_}SCRIPT}}{PROCESS:unENTITY:unSCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}ENTITY{\_}SCRIPT}}{PROCESS:unENTITY:unSCRIPT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{611}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{612}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}}}\moddef{select combat target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $18E4
    SUBROUTINE
; Selects combat target based on \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} (3 paths: <3, 3-4, >=5)
\nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_COMBAT_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    CMP     #$03
    BMI     .path_low
    CMP     #$05
    BMI     .path_mid
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.loop_high:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .skip_high
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BMI     .skip_high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.skip_high:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .loop_high
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .path_low
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
.path_low:
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BNE     .ret_2
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    BEQ     .ret_2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    CMP     #$01
    BNE     .ret_2
    LDA     #$04
    RTS
.ret_2:
    LDA     #$02
    RTS
.path_mid:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop_mid:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .skip_mid
    BMI     .skip_mid
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
.skip_mid:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BNE     .loop_mid
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .path_low
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{613}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{614}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}}}\moddef{dispatch on mode~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1F0C
    SUBROUTINE
; Dispatches on \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}: if $60 (RTS) then \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1} else \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    CMP     #$60
    BEQ     .mode_60
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
.mode_60:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{615}\nwdocspar

\medskip
The 231 bytes from {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1F19\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1FFF\nwendquote} contain an orphaned earlier
version of {\Tt{}HANDLE{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}.  No external JSR, JMP, branch,
pointer, or RTS-trick reference reaches any address in
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1F19--{\textbackslash}{\$}1FFD\nwendquote}; the code is unreachable during gameplay.

The logic mirrors the current {\Tt{}HANDLE{\textbackslash}{\_}MOB{\textbackslash}{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} almost exactly:
threat assessment (strength~$+$~16~$-$~threats, clamped 4\ldots28,
randomised), flee with message~\#\$1E, encounter dispatch, and a combat
flag loop with message~\#\$1F.  However, all JSR/JMP targets point to
addresses from an earlier build where every routine had shifted by a
small offset (e.g.\ {\Tt{}STEP{\textbackslash}{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} was at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}764A\nwendquote} instead of
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}78A8\nwendquote}).  The first five bytes are garbled---an {\Tt{}ORA\ {\textbackslash}{\$}CE12\nwendquote}
into expansion-ROM space followed by two undocumented NMOS~6502
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5A\nwendquote} NOPs---suggesting the entry point was partially overwritten.

The only live byte is the {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}1FFE\nwendquote}, which serves as a
no-op stub for external callers at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4A1F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4BE4\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{616}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}}}\moddef{orphaned encounter handler~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1F19
    SUBROUTINE
; ---------------------------------------------------------------
; DEAD CODE — orphaned encounter handler ($1F19-$1FFF)
;
; Earlier version of \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}.  Unreachable: no
; external reference to any address in $1F19-$1FFD.
;
; Call targets reference an earlier build's routine layout:
;   $0DDF -> \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1} (now $0D98)
;   $0F90 -> \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} (now $0F49)
;   $764A -> \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1} (now $78A8)
;   $7444 -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1} (now $76BE)
;   $0DD1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1} (now $0D8A)
;   $7421 -> \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1} (now $769B)
;   $739F -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1} (now $761E)
;   $0E6C -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1} (now $0E25)
;   $1C3C -> \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1} (now $1B52)
;   $1C91 -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1} (now $1BA7)
;   $5F19 -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1} (now $645F)
;   $1AD8 -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1} (now $1A31)
;   $1341 -> \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1} (now $12FA)
;   $1347 -> \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1} (now $1300)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------

; Garbled entry: ORA $CE12 + two undocumented $5A NOPs
    HEX     0d12ce5a5a

; Event record update (earlier build's entry path?)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; $5A59
    AND     #$E0
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}         ; $5A5A
    LDY     #$02
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y           ; store into event record byte 2
    JMP     .save_pos

; Alternate entry: mark record as deleted
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y

.save_pos:                              ; $1F33
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     $1C6B                       ; setup (unknown)
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    JSR     $0DA4                       ; unknown
    JMP     $1EC5                       ; unknown (return path?)

; Threat assessment
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     $0DDF                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     $0F90                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BEQ     .no_flee

    ; Compute flee probability from strength vs threats
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; strength field
    AND     #$1F
    CLC
    ADC     #$10                        ; base 16
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}
    BMI     .clamp_low
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .in_range
    LDA     #$1C                        ; cap at 28
    BNE     .in_range
.clamp_low:
    LDA     #$04                        ; minimum 4
.in_range:
    ASL
    ASL
    ORA     #$03                        ; form PRNG mask
    TAX
    JSR     $764A                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    TXA
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    BPL     .no_flee                    ; survived — skip flee

    ; Entity overwhelmed — flee, restore position
    JSR     $7444                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     $0DD1                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     $7421                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E                        ; message: flee
    JSR     $739F                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JMP     $1C91                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}

.no_flee:                               ; $1FAF
    JSR     $1C3C                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; entity position
    JSR     $0E6C                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .hostile
    JSR     $5F19                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    CMP     #$01
    BEQ     .one_threat
    JMP     $1C91                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
.one_threat:
    JMP     $1AD8                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}

.hostile:                               ; $1FCD
    JSR     $1341                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.walk_group:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    BEQ     .group_done
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y             ; entity position
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                ; mob position
    BNE     .next_member
    JSR     .set_combat_flag
.next_member:
    JSR     $1347                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    JMP     .walk_group

.group_done:                            ; $1FE5
    JSR     $7444                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     $0DD1                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     $7421                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-XSKCO3EXCSH7NSCHZBYJYA6KSA000000-1}
    LDA     #$1F                        ; message: engage combat
    JSR     $739F                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    JMP     $1C91                       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}

.set_combat_flag:                       ; $1FF6
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y                ; mob byte $0F
    ORA     #$04                        ; set bit 2 = combat engaged
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
; $1FFE: RTS — also serves as no-op stub for callers at $4A1F/$4BE4
    RTS

; Trailing orphan byte
    HEX     61
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{RESET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0 \nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{624}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}}}\moddef{validate input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FDD
    SUBROUTINE
; Validates input: saves $C2/$C3, loops reading input until valid record found
\nwlinkedidentc{VALIDATE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}:
    STA     $5B24
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    $C2                 ; save $C2/$C3
.retry:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{READ_INPUT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}
    CMP     #$00
    BEQ     .done
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    BEQ     .done
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    BNE     .found
    PLA
    JMP     .retry
.found:
    PLA
.done:
    TAY
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    $C2                 ; restore $C2/$C3
    TYA
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{625}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{626}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}}}\moddef{copy record data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $604C
    SUBROUTINE
; Copies data from pointer at ($C2)+6/7 into \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_RECORD_DATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}
    INY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     $BA
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    TAY
    DEC     $BA
    CLC
    ADC     $BA
    TAX
.copy_loop:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29},X
    DEX
    DEY
    BNE     .copy_loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{627}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{628}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}}}\moddef{game input table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $607D
; Game input option table (7 records x 10 bytes + 4-byte header).
; Record format: [enable, col_offset, key, ?, ?, ?, str_ptr_lo, str_ptr_hi, ?, ?]
; Byte 0 of records 1-6 is patched by \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1} based on combat state.
; Header: option count, max_range (patched), init_ptr lo/hi
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}:
.header:
    HEX 07              ; 7 options
.max_range = *
    HEX 03              ; max movement range (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}*3+3)
    HEX D260            ; init function pointer ($60D2 = \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1})
.rec1:                  ; record 1 ($6081) - movement
.rec1_enable = *
    HEX 01              ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29} or 0)
    HEX 07040207
    HEX 05537D311A
.rec2:                  ; record 2 ($608B) - combat option
.rec2_enable = *
    HEX 01              ; enable (patched: ~\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29})
    HEX 2F0103
    HEX 05063E7D0761
.rec3:                  ; record 3 ($6095) - combat option
.rec3_enable = *
    HEX 01              ; enable (patched: ~\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29})
    HEX 570204
    HEX 0604787BB714
.rec4:                  ; record 4 ($609F) - flee option
.rec4_enable = *
    HEX 01              ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29})
    HEX 570301
    HEX 03077F7BC61B
.rec5:                  ; record 5 ($60A9)
    HEX 01140706
    HEX 0102457D8C61
.rec6:                  ; record 6 ($60B3) - rest option
.rec6_enable = *
    HEX 01              ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29})
    HEX 3C0507
    HEX 0203737B3F14
.rec7:                  ; record 7 ($60BD)
    HEX 01640605
    HEX 0401667B0161
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{629}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{630}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}}}\moddef{inc mob counters~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $689F
    SUBROUTINE
; Increments mob counters; Y = count-1 on entry
\nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}:
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    DEY
    BPL     .do_inc
    RTS
.do_inc:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{DIR_SCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29},X
    BPL     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{631}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{632}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}}}\moddef{setup text pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76D2
    SUBROUTINE
; Two entry points: $76D2 (col 0) and $76D8 (col 20)
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $24
    BEQ     .set_row
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS_COL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}:          ; $76D8 - original \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS_COL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1} entry
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $24
.set_row:
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $25
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDA     #$8C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    LDX     #$14
.space_loop:
    LDA     #$A0
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
    DEX
    BNE     .space_loop
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $25
    LDA     #$0A
    SEC
    SBC     $24
    STA     $24
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$8B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{633}\nwdocspar


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{634}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}}}\moddef{get entity threat~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1979
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}:
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{635}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{636}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}}}\moddef{set cursor pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FBC
    SUBROUTINE
; Maps linear position at ($C2)+1 to VTAB ($25) and HTAB ($24)
; Positions 0-39 -> row 21, 40-79 -> row 22, 80+ -> row 23
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_POS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    CMP     #$28
    BCS     .row2
    LDY     #$15               ; row 21
    BNE     .set_pos
.row2:
    SEC
    SBC     #$28
    CMP     #$28
    BCS     .row3
    LDY     #$16               ; row 22
    BNE     .set_pos
.row3:
    LDY     #$17               ; row 23
    SEC
    SBC     #$28
.set_pos:
    STY     $25
    STA     $24
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{637}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{638}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}}}\moddef{read input char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $600A
    SUBROUTINE
; Returns character at ($C2) + $5B24 + 1
\nwlinkedidentc{READ_INPUT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}:
    CLC
    LDA     $5B24
    ADC     #$01
    TAY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{639}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{640}\chapter{High Resolution Character Generator}

The Hi-Res Character Generator (HRCG) is a third-party library from the
Applesoft Toolkit.  It is relocated during {\Tt{}game{\textbackslash}{\_}init\nwendquote} from the hi-res
page staging area {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}32FF\nwendquote} to its runtime address range
{\Tt{}{\$}9600--{\$}A8FF\nwendquote}.  The HRCG code proper occupies {\Tt{}{\$}9600--{\$}97A4\nwendquote}; the
standard font data follows at {\Tt{}{\$}97A5--{\$}9AA4\nwendquote}; and the remaining space
through {\Tt{}{\$}A8FF\nwendquote} is available to the toolkit.

The HRCG initialization entry point is {\Tt{}{\$}92A8\nwendquote} (called via
{\Tt{}INIT{\textbackslash}{\_}HRCG\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}791A\nwendquote}).  Six functions reside at
{\Tt{}{\$}92A8--{\$}95FA\nwendquote}: {\Tt{}HRCG{\textbackslash}{\_}INIT\nwendquote} plus five support routines.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{641}\chapter{Disk I/O Routines}

The disk I/O routines occupy {\Tt{}{\$}B300--{\$}BFFF\nwendquote} at runtime.  Like the HRCG
code, they are not loaded directly to their final addresses by the
EALDR\@.  Instead, the EALDR loads them into the hi-res page area
{\Tt{}{\$}3300--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} (tracks~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}0F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}10\nwendquote}).  During {\Tt{}game{\textbackslash}{\_}init\nwendquote},
the routine at {\Tt{}{\$}6DA5\nwendquote} copies {\Tt{}{\$}3300--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}B300--{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}.

These routines handle all disk access for the main game, including
scene loading and save/restore operations.

The area splits into two distinct regions:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B300--{\textbackslash}{\$}B5FF\nwendquote}: Custom game disk code---a VM-driven sector
  reader with its own data field verifier, context-swap mechanism,
  and embedded bytecode program.
\item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B600--{\textbackslash}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}: Standard Apple~II DOS~3.3 RWTS (Read/Write
  Track/Sector), byte-identical to the system master after relocation,
  with only three patched bytes:
  \begin{itemize}
  \item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B748--{\textbackslash}{\$}B749\nwendquote}: JMP target changed from {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}9B03\nwendquote} (DOS
    file manager) to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}9D84\nwendquote} (game's handler).
  \item {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B7E1\nwendquote}: max-drives configuration byte changed from
    {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}02\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}00\nwendquote}.
  \end{itemize}
  The standard RWTS is fully documented in \emph{Beneath Apple DOS}
  (Worth \& Lechner, 1984) and will not be re-disassembled here.
\end{itemize}

The main program calls two entry points in this area:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lll}
\toprule
\thead{Address} & \thead{Label} & \thead{Called from} \\
\midrule
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B300\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}FIELD\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}LOAD{\textbackslash}{\_}SCENE{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote} (\$6DD8) \\
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B7B5\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}RWTS{\textbackslash}{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}SETUP{\textbackslash}{\_}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}READ\nwendquote} (\$6C18) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\section{DOS 3.3 RWTS (\$B600--\$BFFF)}

The RWTS (Read/Write Track/Sector) at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B600--{\textbackslash}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote} is a copy of
the standard Apple~II DOS~3.3 RWTS from the system master, with the
standard~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}80\nwendquote} page relocation applied (disk pages {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}36--{\textbackslash}{\$}3F\nwendquote}
relocated to~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B6--{\textbackslash}{\$}BF\nwendquote}).  Byte-for-byte comparison with the DOS~3.3
System Master (680-0051-00) confirms that all code is identical after
relocation, except for the three patched bytes noted above.  The
remaining differences are runtime state in the IOB parameter block
at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B7E8\nwendquote} and the contents of the nibble buffers
at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}BB00--{\textbackslash}{\$}BC55\nwendquote}.

The RWTS is fully documented in \emph{Beneath Apple DOS} (Worth \&
Lechner, 1984), chapter~4, and is not disassembled here.  The binary
data is included verbatim from {\Tt{}dos.asm\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{642}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}              EQU     $B7B5   ; RWTS entry: PHP/SEI, JSR \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_CORE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}, CLC/SEC
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_CORE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}               EQU     $BD00   ; RWTS core dispatcher
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}CORE}}{RWTS:unCORE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}CORE}}{RWTS:unCORE}}\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{643}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{644}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4VZT35TKJMQVI6ZN27HVHBNXQI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4VZT35TKJMQVI6ZN27HVHBNXQI000000-1}}}\moddef{dos33 rwts~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4VZT35TKJMQVI6ZN27HVHBNXQI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B600
    INCLUDE "dos.asm"
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{645}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk read field (\$B300)}

{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}FIELD\nwendquote} is the entry point called by {\Tt{}LOAD{\textbackslash}{\_}SCENE{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA\nwendquote}
to read sector data from disk.  It is a trampoline into the disk~VM
interpreter loop at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B36A\nwendquote}, which uses an embedded bytecode program
to control the multi-sector read process.  The carry flag is clear on
entry (set by the caller) to indicate a read operation.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{646}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk read field~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B300
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_READ_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}            ; enter VM interpreter
    NOP                             ; pad
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}READ{\_}FIELD}}{DISK:unREAD:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}READ{\_}FIELD}}{DISK:unREAD:unFIELD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{DISK:unVM:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{DISK:unVM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{647}\nwdocspar

\section{Verify data field (\$B304)}

Searches for the standard data field prologue ({\Tt{}D5\ AA\ AD\nwendquote}) on
the disk, then reads all 342 nibbles (86~secondary + 256~primary) and
verifies each byte equals~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}AF\nwendquote}.  Finally checks the data epilogue
({\Tt{}DE\ AA\nwendquote}).  Returns carry clear on success, carry set on error.

This routine is called internally by the disk~VM (via {\Tt{}JSR\ {\textbackslash}{\$}B304\nwendquote}).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{648}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}}}\moddef{verify data field~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B304
\nwlinkedidentc{VERIFY_DATA_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

; --- Search for D5 AA AD data field prologue ---
    LDY     #$20                    ; timeout counter = 32
.search_d5:
    DEY
    BEQ     .error                  ; timeout
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read disk nibble
    BPL     *-3                     ; wait for data ready
.check_d5:
    EOR     #$D5                    ; check for D5
    BNE     .search_d5              ; not D5, retry
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read next nibble
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$AA                    ; check for AA
    BNE     .check_d5               ; not AA, re-check as D5
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read third nibble
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$AD                    ; check for AD
    BNE     .check_d5               ; not AD, re-check as D5

; --- Found D5 AA AD: read and verify data nibbles ---
    PHA                             ; \\ waste cycles (timing)
    PLA                             ; /
    LDY     #$56                    ; 86 nibbles (secondary buffer)
.read_secondary:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read nibble
