    BPL     *-3
    BIT     $C000                   ; timing sync
    CMP     #$AF                    ; verify nibble = $AF
    BNE     .bad_nibble             ; mismatch → error
    DEY
    BNE     .read_secondary

    LDY     #$00                    ; 256 nibbles (primary buffer)
.read_primary:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read nibble
    BPL     *-3
    BIT     $C000                   ; timing sync
    CMP     #$AF                    ; verify nibble = $AF
    BNE     .bad_nibble             ; mismatch → error
    DEY
    BNE     .read_primary

; --- Verify DE AA data field epilogue ---
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read (discard) checksum nibble
    BPL     *-3
    PHA                             ; \\ waste cycles
    PLA                             ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read epilogue byte 1
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$DE                    ; check for DE
    BNE     .error                  ; bad epilogue
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read epilogue byte 2
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$AA                    ; check for AA
    BEQ     .ok                     ; good epilogue

.error:
    SEC                             ; carry set = error
    RTS

.ok:
    CLC                             ; carry clear = success
    RTS

.bad_nibble:
    STA     $B5F6                   ; save mismatched nibble for diagnostics
    SEC                             ; carry set = error
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VERIFY{\_}DATA{\_}FIELD}}{VERIFY:unDATA:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{VERIFY{\_}DATA{\_}FIELD}}{VERIFY:unDATA:unFIELD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{649}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM loop (\$B36A)}

The disk~VM interpreter loop.  Each iteration swaps the VM context
(zero-page {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}50--{\textbackslash}{\$}5F\nwendquote} $\leftrightarrow$ saved state at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E5\nwendquote})
and then dispatches the next VM opcode.  The VM bytecode program
follows immediately after the {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B370\nwendquote} and controls the
multi-sector disk read sequence.  The loop has no explicit exit; the
VM program returns to the caller by manipulating the stack.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{650}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B36A
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}            ; swap ZP $50-$5F with saved state
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}        ; execute next VM opcode
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}            ; repeat
; VM bytecode program follows at $B373
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{DISK:unVM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{DISK:unVM:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-YZGRORWYCIPHUUXFRQEDWRNPDM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{651}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM bytecode program (\$B373--\$B3FE)}

The VM bytecode program follows immediately after the VM loop.  All
address operands are encrypted (low byte XOR~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}9C\nwendquote}, high byte
XOR~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}AD\nwendquote}); immediate operands are XOR'd with~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7A\nwendquote}.  The program
implements a disk copy-protection verifier: it checks code integrity,
turns on the drive motor, reads data from multiple half-track positions,
and exits with carry indicating success or failure.

Decoded program flow:

\begin{enumerate}
\item Three integrity checks: verifies bytes at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B361\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B362\nwendquote},
  and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B368\nwendquote} (the {\Tt{}SEC\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}SEC\nwendquote} opcodes in
  {\Tt{}VERIFY{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA{\textbackslash}{\_}FIELD\nwendquote}).  Exits with error if any byte was patched.
\item Calls the disk-read subroutine at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B3A8\nwendquote} (embedded below).
  On failure, retries once; on second failure, allows up to~2 errors
  before restarting.
\item The subroutine turns on the motor, waits for spin-up, sets read
  mode, calls the half-track verifier ({\Tt{}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}AND{\textbackslash}{\_}VERIFY\nwendquote}) from
  multiple head positions, then turns off the motor.
\item On success, exits via {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}EXIT{\textbackslash}{\_}OK\nwendquote} (carry clear).
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{652}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm bytecode~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B373
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_BYTECODE}{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}:
; --- Integrity checks ---
; LDA_ABS $B361; SUB_IMM #$38; BNZ $B48D  (verify SEC at .error)
    HEX     04 fd 1e 07 42 02 11 19
; LDA_ABS $B362; SUB_IMM #$60; BNZ $B48D  (verify RTS at .error+1)
    HEX     04 fe 1e 07 1a 02 11 19
; LDA_ABS $B368; SUB_IMM #$38; BNZ $B48D  (verify SEC at .bad_nibble+3)
    HEX     04 f4 1e 07 42 02 11 19
; --- First attempt ---
; CALL $B3A8 (disk read sub); BNZ $B394 (retry on error)
    HEX     05 34 1e
; GOTO $B3A5 (exit OK path, skipping retry)
    HEX     02 08 1e         ;BNZ $B394 (if error → retry)
    HEX     0c 39 1e         ;GOTO $B3A5 (success → exit)
; --- Retry (second attempt, at $B394) ---
; CALL $B3A8; BNZ $B39D (error handler)
    HEX     05 34 1e
    HEX     02 01 1e         ;BNZ $B39D (if error → handler)
; GOTO $B3A5 (exit OK)
    HEX     0c 39 1e
; --- Error handler at $B39D ---
; SUB_IMM #$02; BNZ $B48D (fatal if >2 errors); GOTO $B373 (restart)
    HEX     07 78 02 11 19 0c ef 1e
; --- Success exit at $B3A5 ---
; CALL0 $B492 (\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_EXIT_OK}{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1})
    HEX     09 0e 19
; --- Disk read subroutine at $B3A8 ---
; LDA_ABS $C0E9 (motor on)
    HEX     04 75 6d
; LDA_IMM #$FF; CALL1 $FCA8 (ROM WAIT)  ×2  (motor spin-up delay)
    HEX     03 85 01 34 51
    HEX     03 85 01 34 51
; LDA_ABS $C0EE (Q7L = read mode)
    HEX     04 72 6d
; LDA_IMM #$00; STA_ABS $B5E2 (clear error accumulator)
    HEX     03 7a 06 7e 18
; CALL $B3D0 ×4 (half-track verification passes)
    HEX     05 4c 1e
    HEX     05 4c 1e
    HEX     05 4c 1e
    HEX     05 4c 1e
; LDA_ABS $C0E8 (motor off)
    HEX     04 74 6d
; LDA_ABS $B5E2 (load error count); RET
    HEX     04 7e 18 08
; --- Half-track verifier subroutine at $B3D0 ---
; LDA_IMM #$03; STA_ABS $B44D (set retry counter)
    HEX     03 79 06 d1 19
; CALL1 $B44E (\nwlinkedidentc{READ_AND_VERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1})
    HEX     01 d2 19
; LDA_ABS $C0E7 (phase 3 on — half-track step)
    HEX     04 7b 6d
; CALL1 $B44E ×2
    HEX     01 d2 19 01 d2 19
; LDA_ABS $C0E1 (phase 0 on — half-track step)
    HEX     04 7d 6d
; CALL $B46B (PARK_STEPPER sub)
    HEX     05 f7 19
; LDA_IMM #$03; STA_ABS $B44D (reset retry counter)
    HEX     03 79 06 d1 19
; CALL1 $B44E (\nwlinkedidentc{READ_AND_VERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1})
    HEX     01 d2 19
; LDA_ABS $C0E7 (phase 3 on)
    HEX     04 7b 6d
; CALL1 $B44E ×2
    HEX     01 d2 19 01 d2 19
; LDA_ABS $C0E5 (phase 2 on — half-track step)
    HEX     04 79 6d
; CALL $B46B (PARK_STEPPER); RET
    HEX     05 f7 19 08
; $B3FF: next byte ($A0) is the LDY opcode of \nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_ADDR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}BYTECODE}}{DISK:unVM:unBYTECODE}{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}BYTECODE}}{DISK:unVM:unBYTECODE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}OK}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unOK}}\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}}\\{{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}OK}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unOK}{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-XUCNFCEPISMBQ62XBBUYF4U6FA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{653}\nwdocspar

\section{Search address field (\$B3FF)}

Searches for the D5~AA~96 address field prologue on disk.  The entry
point at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B3FF\nwendquote} sets~Y to~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}FF\nwendquote} (256~inner retries), then falls
through to the search loop.  The outer retry count is loaded from and
saved back to the data byte at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B44D\nwendquote}.  On success, returns with
carry clear, X~=~1, and the last decoded address-field nibble
(sector number) in~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}50\nwendquote}.  On failure, returns with carry set.

The 4-and-4 decoding loop reads three field pairs
(volume, track, sector), each encoded as two disk nibbles whose
even/odd bits must be combined via {\Tt{}ROL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}AND\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{654}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}}}\moddef{search addr field~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B3FF
\nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_ADDR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}:
    LDY     #$FF                    ; 256 inner retries
; $B400: FF is the immediate operand (part of the LDY instruction)
.search:
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_RETRY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}      ; outer retry count
.next_nibble:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read nibble
    BPL     *-3                     ; wait for ready
    CMP     #$D5                    ; first prologue byte?
    BEQ     .got_d5
    DEY                             ; inner countdown
    BNE     .next_nibble
    DEX                             ; outer countdown
    BNE     .next_nibble
    RTS                             ; timeout (carry unchanged)

.got_d5:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$AA                    ; second prologue byte?
    BEQ     .got_aa
    DEY
    BNE     .next_nibble
    SEC
    RTS                             ; timeout

.got_aa:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    BPL     *-3
    CMP     #$96                    ; third prologue byte (addr mark)?
    BEQ     .got_96
    DEY
    BNE     .next_nibble
    SEC
    RTS                             ; timeout

.got_96:
; --- Decode 3 address field pairs (4-and-4 encoding) ---
    LDY     #$02                    ; 3 pairs: volume, track, sector
.decode_pair:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read odd-bits nibble
    BPL     *-3
    ROL                             ; shift data, odd bits in even positions
    STA     $50                     ; save partial
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_DATA_REG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ; read even-bits nibble
    BPL     *-3
    AND     $50                     ; combine: result = decoded byte
    STA     $50                     ; last decoded value (sector on final iter)
    DEY
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_RETRY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}      ; save remaining retry count
    BPL     .decode_pair            ; Y: 2→1→0→FF (3 iterations)

    CLC                             ; success
    LDX     #$01
    RTS

\nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_RETRY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}:
    DC.B    3                       ; $B44D: outer retry counter (default 3)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}RETRY{\_}COUNT}}{SEARCH:unRETRY:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}RETRY{\_}COUNT}}{SEARCH:unRETRY:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}DATA{\_}REG}}{DISK:unDATA:unREG}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{655}\nwdocspar

\section{Read and verify (\$B44E)}

Native routine called by the VM via CALL1.  Searches for an address
field ({\Tt{}JSR\ {\textbackslash}{\$}B3FF\nwendquote}), then verifies the data field
({\Tt{}JSR\ VERIFY{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA{\textbackslash}{\_}FIELD\nwendquote}).  Accumulates errors in
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}ERROR{\textbackslash}{\_}ACCUM\nwendquote} at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E2\nwendquote}.  Afterward, turns off all
four stepper motor phases (preventing motor heating).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{656}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}}}\moddef{read and verify~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B44E
\nwlinkedidentc{READ_AND_VERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SEARCH_ADDR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-J2SFLYLBSPJHVFZHPEHN3SZGUE000000-1}       ; find D5 AA 96 address prologue
    BCS     .skip_verify            ; no address field → skip data verify
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{VERIFY_DATA_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-F7XUTD7KQKIZ2LAWT3LZSLO5AM000000-1}       ; verify D5 AA AD data field
.skip_verify:
    LDA     #$00
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_ERROR_ACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}     ; carry → error count
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_ERROR_ACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}
; --- Turn off all stepper motor phases ---
    LDA     $C0E0                   ; phase 0 off
    LDA     $C0E2                   ; phase 1 off
    LDA     $C0E4                   ; phase 2 off
    LDA     $C0E6                   ; phase 3 off
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}}\\{{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{VERIFY{\_}DATA{\_}FIELD}}{VERIFY:unDATA:unFIELD}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SEARCH{\_}ADDR{\_}FIELD}}{SEARCH:unADDR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VERIFY{\_}DATA{\_}FIELD}}{VERIFY:unDATA:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{657}\nwdocspar

\section{VM subroutine: park stepper (\$B46B)}

VM bytecode subroutine that delays and turns off all stepper motor
phases.  Called via VM opcode~5 (CALL) from the half-track verifier.
The delays allow the stepper motor to settle between half-track
movements.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{658}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm sub park stepper~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B46B
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SUB_PARK_STEPPER}{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}:
; LDA_IMM #$70; CALL1 $B482 (\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1})  — long delay
    HEX     03 0a 01 1e 19
; LDA_ABS $C0E0 (phase 0 off)
    HEX     04 7c 6d
; LDA_ABS $C0E2 (phase 1 off)
    HEX     04 7e 6d
; LDA_ABS $C0E4 (phase 2 off)
    HEX     04 78 6d
; LDA_ABS $C0E6 (phase 3 off)
    HEX     04 7a 6d
; LDA_IMM #$28; CALL1 $B482 (\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1})  — short delay
    HEX     03 52 01 1e 19
; RET
    HEX     08
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SUB{\_}PARK{\_}STEPPER}}{DISK:unVM:unSUB:unPARK:unSTEPPER}{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SUB{\_}PARK{\_}STEPPER}}{DISK:unVM:unSUB:unPARK:unSTEPPER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}LOOP}}{DELAY:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}LOOP}}{DELAY:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-CZ7WUYZMRQOZ776KSWPCNVZLQI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{659}\nwdocspar

\section{Delay loop (\$B482)}

Native delay routine.  Takes the delay count in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote} (passed from
VM accumulator via CALL1).  Inner loop: {\Tt{}DEX\nwendquote} from {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}20\nwendquote} to~0
(32~iterations).  Outer loop: {\Tt{}SBC{\textasciitilde}{\textbackslash}{\#}{\textbackslash}{\$}01\nwendquote} until A~reaches~0.
Total delay $\approx$ 160~×~A cycles.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{660}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{delay loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B482
\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    LDX     #$20
.inner:
    DEX
    BNE     .inner
    SEC
    SBC     #$01
    BNE     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}LOOP}}{DELAY:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-AYPWB6RBUT4LN5CUQ4A26AMLNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}LOOP}}{DELAY:unLOOP}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{661}\nwdocspar

\section{VM exit-with-error bytecode (\$B48D)}

Short VM bytecode fragment that loads {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}20\nwendquote} into the accumulator
and jumps to {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}EXIT{\textbackslash}{\_}ERR\nwendquote}, which swaps context and returns
to the caller with carry set.  Reached by the integrity-check and
error-handler {\Tt{}BNZ\nwendquote} branches in the main bytecode program.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{662}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm sub exit err~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B48D
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SUB_EXIT_ERR}{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}:
; LDA_IMM #$20; CALL0 $B497 (\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_EXIT_ERR}{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1})
    HEX     03 5a 09 0b 19
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SUB{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unSUB:unEXIT:unERR}{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SUB{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unSUB:unEXIT:unERR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unERR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unERR}{PYNWmai0-ZXIAUF3LVQ4RS7ZIP64X3QRMVM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{663}\nwdocspar

\section{VM exit routines (\$B492--\$B49E)}

These native routines exit the disk~VM\@.  Each calls
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}SWAP\nwendquote} to restore the caller's zero-page state, then
returns with carry flag indicating success or failure.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{664}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm exit ok~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B492
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_EXIT_OK}{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}            ; restore caller's ZP
    CLC                             ; carry clear = success
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}OK}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unOK}{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}OK}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unOK}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-GPMJOZWLZ5RVOPUPG24SCBP6HY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{665}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{666}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm exit err~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B497
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_EXIT_ERR}{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}            ; restore caller's ZP
    SEC                             ; carry set = error
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unERR}{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}EXIT{\_}ERR}}{DISK:unVM:unEXIT:unERR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-3PDBUTNAY2LH74GXKBLMC3S7IE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{667}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{668}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BEPMJ3SFV2UOCBYC5OUXROTXJA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BEPMJ3SFV2UOCBYC5OUXROTXJA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm misc b49c~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BEPMJ3SFV2UOCBYC5OUXROTXJA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B49C
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_MISC_B49C}{PYNWmai0-BEPMJ3SFV2UOCBYC5OUXROTXJA000000-1}:
    EOR     #$AD
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}MISC{\_}B49C}}{DISK:unVM:unMISC:unB49C}{PYNWmai0-BEPMJ3SFV2UOCBYC5OUXROTXJA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}MISC{\_}B49C}}{DISK:unVM:unMISC:unB49C}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{669}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM context swap (\$B4CC)}

Swaps 16~bytes between zero-page locations {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}50--{\textbackslash}{\$}5F\nwendquote} and the
saved VM state at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E5--{\textbackslash}{\$}B5F4\nwendquote}.  This preserves the caller's
zero-page state while the VM executes, and restores it afterward.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{670}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm swap~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B4CC
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SWAP}{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    LDX     #$0F                    ; 16 bytes ($50-$5F)
.loop:
    LDA     $50,X                   ; \\ swap ZP with saved state
    PHA                             ;  |
    LDA     $B5E5,X                 ;  |
    STA     $50,X                   ;  |
    PLA                             ;  |
    STA     $B5E5,X                 ; /
    DEX
    BPL     .loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}{PYNWmai0-YFYCU6Q2EWD6JQJOO76Z4EFCFU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP}}{DISK:unVM:unSWAP}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{671}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM data area (\$B4DE--\$B4FF)}

Scratch/data area between {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}SWAP\nwendquote} and the opcode handlers.
Contains mostly zeros with bytes~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4A\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4C\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4E\nwendquote} at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B4EE--{\textbackslash}{\$}B4F0\nwendquote},
mirroring the initial saved-state values for ZP~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}5B--{\textbackslash}{\$}5D\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{672}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XH5TLQEXYFHHOOER46HK6GDTMY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XH5TLQEXYFHHOOER46HK6GDTMY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm data b4de~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XH5TLQEXYFHHOOER46HK6GDTMY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B4DE
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_DATA_B4DE}{PYNWmai0-XH5TLQEXYFHHOOER46HK6GDTMY000000-1}:
    HEX     00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
    HEX     4a 4c 4e
    HEX     00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DATA{\_}B4DE}}{DISK:unVM:unDATA:unB4DE}{PYNWmai0-XH5TLQEXYFHHOOER46HK6GDTMY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DATA{\_}B4DE}}{DISK:unVM:unDATA:unB4DE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{673}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM dispatch (\$B49F)}

Executes one VM opcode.  Pulls the return address from the stack to
locate the current instruction pointer, reads the next opcode byte,
looks up the handler address (low byte) in the table at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B4BF\nwendquote},
and self-modifies a {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5DF\nwendquote} to dispatch to the
handler in page~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{674}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm dispatch~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B49F
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

    TXA
    PHA                             ; save X
    TYA
    PHA                             ; save Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_PULL_IP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}         ; pull IP from stack → $52/$53
    PLA
    STA     $52                     ; \\ restore as VM instruction pointer
    PLA                             ;  | (values set by \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_PULL_IP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}
    STA     $53                     ; /  via stack manipulation)
    LDY     #$04
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}:
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read opcode from VM program
    INY
    BNE     .no_page
    INC     $53
.no_page:
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_HANDLER_TBL}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1},X   ; look up handler low byte
    STA     $B5E0                   ; self-modify JMP target at $B5DF
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_TRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}      ; dispatch (JMP $B5xx)

; --- VM opcode handler table ---
; Each byte is the low address of a handler in page $B5.
; Opcode index → handler address ($B5xx).
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_HANDLER_TBL}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}:
    HEX     79 27 55 5f 6d 8a ad b9 a2 4f ce 26 00
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}HANDLER{\_}TBL}}{DISK:unVM:unHANDLER:unTBL}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}HANDLER{\_}TBL}}{DISK:unVM:unHANDLER:unTBL}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}PULL{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unPULL:unIP}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}PULL{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unPULL:unIP}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{675}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{676}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm pull ip~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B538
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_PULL_IP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE

; Pulls two return addresses from the stack.
; The outer return address (from JSR \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}) becomes the
; VM instruction pointer.  Resumes execution at the inner return
; address + 1 (i.e., returns to the code after JSR \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_PULL_IP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}).
    PLA                             ; \\ inner return address
    STA     $54                     ;  | (from JSR \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_PULL_IP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1})
    PLA                             ; /
    STA     $55
    PLA                             ; \\ outer return address
    STA     $52                     ;  | (from JSR \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1})
    PLA                             ; /  = VM instruction pointer
    STA     $53
    INC     $52                     ; adjust IP (6502 pushes addr-1)
    INC     $54                     ; \\ adjust inner return address
    BNE     .no_carry               ;  |
    INC     $55                     ; /
.no_carry:
    JMP     ($54)                   ; resume at inner return + 1
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}PULL{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unPULL:unIP}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}PULL{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unPULL:unIP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-A5B4HCW5L3AKHGBTUDGDGGKD7U000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{677}\nwdocspar

\section{Disk VM read address (\$B510)}

Shared subroutine used by most VM opcode handlers.  Reads two
encrypted bytes from the bytecode stream at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}52/{\textbackslash}{\$}53\ +\ Y\nwendquote}, decrypts
the address operand (low byte XOR~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}9C\nwendquote}, high byte XOR~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}AD\nwendquote}),
stores the result in~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}54/{\textbackslash}{\$}55\nwendquote}, and advances~Y past both bytes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{678}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm read addr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B510
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}:
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read encrypted low byte
    EOR     #$9C                    ; decrypt
    INY
    BNE     .no_page1
    INC     $53
.no_page1:
    STA     $54                     ; operand low
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read encrypted high byte
    INY
    BNE     .no_page2
    INC     $53
.no_page2:
    EOR     #$AD                    ; decrypt
    STA     $55                     ; operand high
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{679}\nwdocspar

\section{VM opcode handlers (\$B500--\$B5DE)}

The disk~VM has 13~opcodes (indices 0--12).  Each handler's low
address is stored in the table at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B4BF\nwendquote}; dispatch jumps to
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5xx\nwendquote}.  Handlers return to the dispatch loop by jumping to
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}RESUME\nwendquote} at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B4AE\nwendquote}, which reads the next opcode and
dispatches again.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{rllp{5cm}}
\toprule
\thead{Op} & \thead{Addr} & \thead{Mnemonic} & \thead{Description} \\
\midrule
 0 & \$B579 & LDA\_IDX  & ACC $\leftarrow$ *(addr + ACC) \\
 1 & \$B527 & CALL1     & Call native; A=ACC in, A$\to$ACC out \\
 2 & \$B555 & BNZ       & Branch if ACC $\ne$ 0 \\
 3 & \$B55F & LDA\_IMM  & ACC $\leftarrow$ immediate (XOR \$7A) \\
 4 & \$B56D & LDA\_ABS  & ACC $\leftarrow$ *(addr) \\
 5 & \$B58A & CALL      & VM subroutine call (push IP) \\
 6 & \$B5AD & STA\_ABS  & *(addr) $\leftarrow$ ACC \\
 7 & \$B5B9 & SUB\_IMM  & ACC $\leftarrow$ ACC $-$ immediate \\
 8 & \$B5A2 & RET       & VM subroutine return (pop IP) \\
 9 & \$B54F & CALL0     & Jump to native code (no return) \\
10 & \$B5CE & INC\_LOAD & *(addr) += 1; ACC $\leftarrow$ result \\
11 & \$B526 & HALT      & Exit VM (RTS) \\
12 & \$B500 & GOTO      & Unconditional branch \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\subsection{Opcode 12: GOTO (\$B500)}

Unconditional branch.  Reads a 2-byte encrypted address operand and
sets the VM instruction pointer to that address.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{680}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op goto~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B500
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read target → $54/$55
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SET_IP}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}:
    LDA     $54                     ; \\ set IP = operand
    STA     $52                     ;  |
    LDA     $55                     ;  |
    STA     $53                     ; /
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}          ; dispatch next opcode
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{681}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 11: HALT (\$B526)}

Exits the VM by executing {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}, which returns to the caller of
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote}.  This handler is just the {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote} at the end
of {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}---the dispatch table points to~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B526\nwendquote}
which is that instruction.

(No separate chunk needed; {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} provides the {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}.)

\subsection{Opcode 1: CALL1 (\$B527)}

Calls a native 6502 subroutine.  Passes the VM accumulator in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}
and captures the subroutine's return value from~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote} back into the
accumulator.  The~Y register (bytecode offset) is preserved across
the call.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{682}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op call1~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B527
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_CALL1}{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read native addr → $54/$55
    TYA
    PHA                             ; save Y (bytecode offset)
    LDA     $56                     ; A = VM accumulator
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_JMP_IND}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}         ; call native routine via JMP ($54)
    STA     $56                     ; capture return A → accumulator
    PLA
    TAY                             ; restore Y
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}          ; dispatch next opcode
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL1}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL1}{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL1}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL1}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}JMP{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unJMP:unIND}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}JMP{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unJMP:unIND}{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-FHYJF4PP462QWUAWT2MYOPQZQA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{683}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 9: CALL0 / JMP\_NATIVE (\$B54F)}

Jumps to a native 6502 routine and does not return to the VM\@.
Used for operations like ``enter the main program'' or ``jump to
a disk routine'' that take over control flow.  The {\Tt{}JMP\ ({\textbackslash}{\$}54)\nwendquote}
at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B552\nwendquote} also serves as a reusable trampoline for opcode~1.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{684}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op call0~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B54F
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_CALL0}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read native addr → $54/$55
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_JMP_IND}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}:
    JMP     ($54)                   ; indirect jump (no return to VM)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}JMP{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unJMP:unIND}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL0}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL0}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}JMP{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unJMP:unIND}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL0}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL0}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-6ROXAR4TXGMCPDTWBEIOUIUDBY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{685}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 2: BNZ (\$B555)}

Branch if the VM accumulator is nonzero.  Reads a 2-byte encrypted
target address, then either branches (reuses {\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}SET{\textbackslash}{\_}IP\nwendquote})
or falls through to the next opcode.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{686}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op bnz~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B555
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_BNZ}{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read branch target → $54/$55
    LDA     $56                     ; test accumulator
    BNE     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SET_IP}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}          ; nonzero → branch (reuse GOTO tail)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}          ; zero → continue
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}BNZ}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unBNZ}{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}BNZ}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unBNZ}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}{PYNWmai0-BBUI5IBSOBSYGICTQMG22WDXIU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{687}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 3: LDA\_IMM (\$B55F)}

Loads an immediate value into the VM accumulator.  The operand is a
single encrypted byte (XOR~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}7A\nwendquote}).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{688}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op lda imm~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B55F
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_LDA_IMM}{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}:
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read encrypted byte
    INY
    BNE     .no_page
    INC     $53
.no_page:
    EOR     #$7A                    ; decrypt
    STA     $56                     ; accumulator = value
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unIMM}{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unIMM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-YYOHR72I2K632KNEY4FRZXJYXY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{689}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 4: LDA\_ABS (\$B56D)}

Loads a byte from an absolute address into the VM accumulator.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{690}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op lda abs~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B56D
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_LDA_ABS}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read address → $54/$55
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_LOAD_IND}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}:
    LDX     #$00
    LDA     ($54,X)                 ; ACC = *(address)
    STA     $56
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOAD{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unLOAD:unIND}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unABS}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOAD{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unLOAD:unIND}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unABS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{691}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 0: LDA\_IDX (\$B579)}

Indexed load.  Reads a 2-byte base address, adds the VM accumulator
as an offset, then loads the byte at (base~+~ACC) into the
accumulator.  Useful for table lookups.  Falls into
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}LOAD{\textbackslash}{\_}IND\nwendquote} to perform the actual load.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{692}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op lda idx~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B579
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_LDA_IDX}{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read base addr → $54/$55
    LDA     $56                     ; index = old accumulator
    CLC
    ADC     $54                     ; base_lo + index
    STA     $54
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     $55                     ; propagate carry
.no_carry:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_LOAD_IND}{PYNWmai0-NZ7I5IVD6ZTADYVYPTUJZ74JME000000-1}        ; load from ($54/$55) → ACC
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}IDX}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}LDA{\_}IDX}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unLDA:unIDX}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOAD{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unLOAD:unIND}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}LOAD{\_}IND}}{DISK:unVM:unLOAD:unIND}{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-IZL4O3A7R7NJ65AFOK2WBU3GKA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{693}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 5: CALL (\$B58A)}

VM-level subroutine call.  Pushes the current absolute IP onto the
6502 hardware stack, then branches to the operand address.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{694}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op call~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B58A
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_CALL}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read target → $54/$55
    TYA
    CLC
    ADC     $52                     ; \\ resolve absolute IP
    STA     $52                     ;  | (base + Y offset)
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     $53                     ; /
.no_carry:
    LDA     $52                     ; \\ push IP for RET
    PHA                             ;  |
    LDA     $53                     ;  |
    PHA                             ; /
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SET_IP}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}          ; GOTO target address
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{695}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 8: RET (\$B5A2)}

VM-level subroutine return.  Pops the IP previously pushed by
opcode~5 (CALL) and resumes execution there.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{696}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op ret~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5A2
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_RET}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}:
    PLA                             ; \\ pop saved IP
    STA     $53                     ;  | (high byte pushed last)
    PLA                             ;  |
    STA     $52                     ; / (low byte pushed first)
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}RET}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unRET}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}RET}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unRET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{697}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 6: STA\_ABS (\$B5AD)}

Stores the VM accumulator to an absolute address.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{698}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op sta abs~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5AD
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_STA_ABS}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read address → $54/$55
    LDA     $56                     ; A = accumulator
    LDX     #$00
    STA     ($54,X)                 ; *(address) = ACC
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}STA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSTA:unABS}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}STA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSTA:unABS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{699}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 7: SUB\_IMM (\$B5B9)}

Subtracts an encrypted immediate value from the VM accumulator.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{700}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op sub imm~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5B9
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_SUB_IMM}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}:
    LDA     ($52),Y                 ; read encrypted byte
    INY
    BNE     .no_page
    INC     $53
.no_page:
    EOR     #$7A                    ; decrypt
    STA     $54                     ; temp
    LDA     $56                     ; A = accumulator
    SEC
    SBC     $54                     ; ACC - immediate
    STA     $56                     ; accumulator = result
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}SUB{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSUB:unIMM}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}SUB{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSUB:unIMM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{701}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode 10: INC\_LOAD (\$B5CE)}

Increments the byte at an absolute address and loads the new value
into the VM accumulator.  Atomic read-modify-write.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{702}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op inc load~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5CE
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_INC_LOAD}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1}       ; read address → $54/$55
    LDX     #$00
    LDA     ($54,X)                 ; read current value
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; increment
    STA     ($54,X)                 ; write back
    STA     $56                     ; accumulator = new value
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}INC{\_}LOAD}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unINC:unLOAD}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}INC{\_}LOAD}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unINC:unLOAD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{703}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Dispatch trampoline (\$B5DF)}

The self-modifying {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} instruction whose low byte is patched by
{\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} before each handler call.  The byte at
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E0\nwendquote} is overwritten with the handler's low address from the
opcode table.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{704}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm trampoline~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5DF
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_TRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}         ; self-modified: low byte patched
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{705}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Error accumulator (\$B5E2)}

Three bytes between the dispatch trampoline and the saved state.
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E2\nwendquote} is the error accumulator used by {\Tt{}READ{\textbackslash}{\_}AND{\textbackslash}{\_}VERIFY\nwendquote}
to count failed sector reads across multiple attempts.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{706}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm error accum~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5E2
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_ERROR_ACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}:
    DC.B    0                       ; error count (updated by \nwlinkedidentc{READ_AND_VERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1})
    DC.B    0,0                     ; scratch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{707}\nwdocspar

\subsection{VM saved state (\$B5E5--\$B5FF)}

The 16-byte region at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5E5--{\textbackslash}{\$}B5F4\nwendquote} holds the saved copy of
zero-page {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}50--{\textbackslash}{\$}5F\nwendquote} when the VM is not executing.  The context
swap routine ({\Tt{}DISK{\textbackslash}{\_}VM{\textbackslash}{\_}SWAP\nwendquote}) exchanges these with the live
zero-page values on each VM entry and exit.  Bytes~11--13 (\$5B--\$5D)
hold initial values {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}4A\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4C\ {\textbackslash}{\$}4E\nwendquote}.

Bytes at~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5F5--{\textbackslash}{\$}B5FF\nwendquote} are additional VM workspace:
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}{\$}B5F6\nwendquote} stores a mismatched nibble from {\Tt{}VERIFY{\textbackslash}{\_}DATA{\textbackslash}{\_}FIELD\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{708}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm saved state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5E5
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SAVED_STATE}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}:
;            $50                        $54                  $58
    HEX     00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 4a 4c 4e 00 00 00 00
;           saved ZP $50-$5F; bytes 9-11 ($59-$5B) = $4A,$4C,$4E
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SCRATCH}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}:
    HEX     00                      ; $B5F5
    HEX     00                      ; $B5F6: bad nibble storage
    HEX     00 00 00                ; $B5F7-$B5F9
    HEX     a0 a0                   ; $B5FA-$B5FB
    HEX     00 00 00 01             ; $B5FC-$B5FF
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SAVED{\_}STATE}}{DISK:unVM:unSAVED:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SCRATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unSCRATCH}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SAVED{\_}STATE}}{DISK:unVM:unSAVED:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SCRATCH}}{DISK:unVM:unSCRATCH}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{709}\nwdocspar
